| | Hi friend, While Tom is busy fighting for us in Congress, Tom’s Extreme Liberal Opponents are out on the campaign trail trying to court National Progressive Donors and moving their policy agendas as far to the Left as needed in order to appease their demands.

That’s an opportunity for them to get a head start on campaigning that Team Kean is going to have to make up for, and we need YOUR help to do that.
---
[**STAY AHEAD**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=f53d3eb9f9724fa98b28acd2fdbc44f1&_e=e7EjhR9CaR-KAyxppK2HPRu4nPVm0LcAqPEW1ckG0v_SB0fl1cXsOL-NxBbC8OU5uTgQULbES9WdIzGk8UVjnmR3UoLrDKn2LeJBFD03YGvLbZDpSDbOvLtF8ZFVm7nP7stxT6B1Nxwr-r2pKNl_9XhYI_bG2fGlG9MwBAD-BrCWwkWurXGCh0La9WSh_eH1MZ9FG-7TWM4n3VYYKo2XXISIrheYBcQAp7-uFovUQPSuPdeP37dWLK8fqwaIHWSc45__xxT2BKsZNpZEaNBv3c4n8A8jugpIBcjpzSnNDjBvoHQqtrjQvr2blZVRvSCyCYNI9hf-tMGRozWcmOXq4Uy7zpEG0g-tMRAZFYtu6yS5tH7Bw2s6FORWyv3lt47c)

We don’t just call political campaigns “races” for nothing. From start to finish, we can take (or lose) the lead at any time. **[Right now, our opponents are gaining on us.](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=f53d3eb9f9724fa98b28acd2fdbc44f1&_e=e7EjhR9CaR-KAyxppK2HPRu4nPVm0LcAqPEW1ckG0v_SB0fl1cXsOL-NxBbC8OU5uTgQULbES9WdIzGk8UVjnmR3UoLrDKn2LeJBFD03YGvLbZDpSDbOvLtF8ZFVm7nP7stxT6B1Nxwr-r2pKNl_9XhYI_bG2fGlG9MwBAD-BrCWwkWurXGCh0La9WSh_eH1MZ9FG-7TWM4n3VYYKo2XXIt4RbEoyqcss8DzYZOeXnEvzONjGnqhHspiMwO47yMubcI5BOkMwgiL8AUYB-zHCEChNjkysPL9AXkxlhti-8TiYN970VmKOyEA_LEh5nyaKnVDXYDYDXvfWNHUjBUdyz5obvcPCvKbLi_9dD-Uv3k6bhEQtyzwjn8Gn1SiY5GA)** We don’t want that. You don’t want that. Nobody wants that, except the Extreme Democrats in Congress who would LOVE to have another ally pushing their crazy agenda. It’s still early and we can stop that from happening, [**but we need your help in doing that right now.**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=f53d3eb9f9724fa98b28acd2fdbc44f1&_e=e7EjhR9CaR-KAyxppK2HPRu4nPVm0LcAqPEW1ckG0v_SB0fl1cXsOL-NxBbC8OU5uTgQULbES9WdIzGk8UVjnmR3UoLrDKn2LeJBFD03YGvLbZDpSDbOvLtF8ZFVm7nP7stxT6B1Nxwr-r2pKNl_9XhYI_bG2fGlG9MwBAD-BrCWwkWurXGCh0La9WSh_eH1MZ9FG-7TWM4n3VYYKo2XXJbLdOUil0GAs_MF5tO4x_CZ8VbrRpEc274X_daNZsW2iTvAfE723dRvo9HGxsM8cec3tKG-RbxcORJLN689hFucVVv2eCNWM4fEAJ1NulWmH0C6inJ-1l1ICw_3JqpyobsUbMQQvEpavnjSJZ1AZmw3jltGK6VuC_cz9vPzaidd) This race is just getting started, friend and we need to keep it running, not walking, away from our opponents. Maybe my words fell on deaf ears.

Maybe I just set my expectations too high.

I was confident that more Americans who are TIRED of seeing career politicians destroy our country would have stepped up. But it hasn't happened yet.

Friend, this is Frank LaRose - **Green Beret & strong Christian conservative. I just announced my candidacy for the most IMPORTANT Senate race in the country.**

I reached out recently humbly asking for YOUR support as I work to fire Biden's personal puppet & 47-year politician, Sherrod Brown, & **help the Republican Party take back the Senate.**

Biden & Democrats are counting on you to ignore this race. They can't stand the fact that I'm a proud Christian conservative & veteran, and they're raising millions to silence my announcement.

People think they have to write huge checks to make a difference. But I'm here to tell you that every last dollar counts - _even just $10 or $20 bucks goes a long way._

**[So, I'm humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a9748de06f4e4144b79476a528173288&_e=xDqqh60ldBZVgjq_GEgWaWKaH7wR0XArGYjnXVfBlW4RmNRlzdTQcbxlhEvrDRvUqGxR7opNUgpbo4ah6xmBDtuNEwJviyL59W1ZWSnSku4Naz8R8HjwxwZ1m9c0WpNieW2SCdd_USebg9-YCLeVLco1JnlKdow8Jx1j1vtS2-zaiYAYk6-1Pou7Ed0vFHRP0JvY8Tbriou7giOmwLrA8P2N4r5XseJsBzd17FY4RBLjYBRsAw2EsjmpZ8c5U9MnwmKT1N-7c7WKEcwqrjndTNVceTGuGpcMrFaXrL93zoxOhRgsepHyenxebe2Xw6gqcwiLL4YowMT8RPAOzjG9zAYC-pZhfnZuOPv4ynRKAM3apx2wMRCy1ka1sghWo8bM23hR2L__2UO94DIw4-sX_A%3D%3D "So, I’m humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.")**

Look, I'm a decorated war veteran, father & husband - so I'm not the kind of person who asks for help unless it's absolutely necessary.

So please, Friend, before the end of the day, will you stand with me?

If we're going to take back the Senate from extreme liberal politicians like Sherrod Brown, it starts with WINNING THIS RACE.

clean_body: Maybe my words just fell on deaf ears. | | | | | | | Maybe my words fell on deaf ears. Maybe I just set my expectations too high. I was confident that more Americans who are TIRED of seeing career politicians destroy our country would have stepped up. But it hasn't happened yet. Friend, this is Frank LaRose - Green Beret & strong Christian conservative. I just announced my candidacy for the most IMPORTANT Senate race in the country. I reached out recently humbly asking for YOUR support as I work to fire Biden's personal puppet & 47-year politician, Sherrod Brown, & help the Republican Party take back the Senate. Biden & Democrats are counting on you to ignore this race. They can't stand the fact that I'm a proud Christian conservative & veteran, and they're raising millions to silence my announcement. People think they have to write huge checks to make a difference. But I'm here to tell you that every last dollar counts - even just $10 or $20 bucks goes a long way. "So, I’m humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around." | | Look, I'm a decorated war veteran, father & husband - so I'm not the kind of person who asks for help unless it's absolutely necessary. So please, Friend, before the end of the day, will you stand with me? | | Thanks & God bless, Frank | | Friend >> BEFORE YOU GO! If we're going to take back the Senate from extreme liberal politicians like Sherrod Brown, it starts with WINNING THIS RACE. ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. | | | Well, folks — it's crucial that we address the concerns raised by Republican Nick Begich's candidacy for Congress against Mary Peltola. In the previous election, Begich presented a platform that would have had detrimental effects on Alaskans. He advocated for reduced federal investment in Alaska, limited infrastructure development, and diminished accountability for individuals like Donald Trump. body:
On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us

| |
---
| | | _"I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."_
Friend,

On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us, the American people.

We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction.

If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years.

Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American.

**We need Tim Scott as our next president!_[If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=6a26182d59f94ebc8e654fe56816eb1a&_e=2nnoZO4gz8dzSOSXHuZsUTBzX0UrZnb2t-yICzx4OC4n7qnrNZxMd53KrbOZSxjLPonrWIOCi75bVDYbs6e1TzIMsnoNo8H02vcIzB-27k696PvTPWUgcCWeiYnK-xJ98N-9saASB5vRlJSzZwAl9GHulOAqGifgd_FKxwre_TZrhxe66YT9p9AAUd368DilGy21Ip0T4DFCjVCI2DPlMl3z68oEJ1nlGgkOFz8rcOCWVZSdbq4DcBwaWKWS_pDYhs02oTWMZrVfAp9sPgqbg9hKhINOGrx4cAciyokAK82AyzKgbqHo1EJoL9VYHtvsLoMIcc-PBKRn4cKxK-Mbr_hKEEI7KQMzVLwo2z2sz1DUQiydtp47IIcblQfKE9wrEQbB96x-ASwN17hfmhZWKxAk1JT3RMRKZsKPmqm4Tw8%3D "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?")_**

* Restart the Keystone Pipeline
* Secure the Border
* Stand up to China
* Restore Parental Rights

You can count on him to **FIRE** Attorney General Merrick Garland, **FIRE** FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government.

**Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States.**

He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. **But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from.**

Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn't have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future.

Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He's going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream.

America's future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won't become reality unless we help Tim win!

clean_body: On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us | | | | | "I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States." Friend, On January 20, 2025, someone will say these words and become the 47th President of the United States. Who? That's up to us, the American people. We need to elect a President we can be proud of, someone we can trust to do the job with integrity and lead our country in the right direction. If you wanted a blueprint to ruin America, you'd keep doing exactly what Joe Biden has allowed the radical Left to do for the last few years. Tim Scott wants to protect America, bring faith back to our country, and provide opportunities for every American. We need Tim Scott as our next president! "If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to support his campaign?" | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT" On Tim's first day in office, he will: Restart the Keystone Pipeline Secure the Border Stand up to China Restore Parental Rights You can count on him to FIRE Attorney General Merrick Garland, FIRE FBI Director Christopher Wray, replace the political appointees in the Department of Justice, and restore confidence and integrity in our government. Simply put, Tim Scott will preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States. | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT" He has already done a great job as a conservative U.S. Senator from South Carolina since 2013. But to really know Tim, who he is, and what he believes, you have to see where he came from. Tim grew up in a single-parent household. His mom worked long days and nights to keep a roof over their heads. While Tim didn't have much growing up, his family instilled in him a strong faith in God, faith in America, and faith in the future. Tim believes that America is the land of opportunity. He believes that America can do for anyone what she has done for him. He's going to fight to ensure every person has the opportunity to live the American Dream. America's future will be bright under President Tim Scott. But that future won't become reality unless we help Tim win! "Can you please make a contribution of any amount to support Tim Scott’s campaign?" | | | "SUPPORT TIM SCOTT" Thank You, Tim Scott for America | | | "JOIN ME NOW" If you 're able-bodied, you work. If you take out a loan, you pay it back. And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail. America needs more victors and less victims. These aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them. "If you agree, will you join my team?" | | | "STAND WITH ME" Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness, and victimhood over victory. We CANNOT let them destroy our values and destroy our country. I believe that with faith and American values, our country's future can be brighter than ever before. But this fight isn't going to be easy. "I need your help! Will you join me in the fight for America’s future?"** Thank You & God Bless - Tim Scott | | | "STAND WITH ME" | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA 7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312 North Charleston, SC 29406

| Friend, Colorado needs your help. For over a decade, we have been under relentless attack by the radical left and our party has been playing defense for far too long.
Now, as we kick of the 2024 Election season, the Colorado GOP is under new management!
The America First leadership of the Colorado GOP is going on offense against the radical left and the RINOs within our own party. We are intent on making up lost ground in the 2023 Municipal Races and the 2024 Presidential Election.
Colorado is back on the political stage and we intend to keep it that way!
With the new programs that we are rolling out state-wide at the Colorado GOP, we will be able to protect the people of Congressional District 3 from the likes of Adam Frisch, and with your help, we can elect a Republican to Congressional District 8 and make Yadira Caraveo a one-term Congresswoman.
In order to make this happen, we need your financial support.

| As we enter a new era for Colorado Republicans, we will fight to put an end to the inflation, the big spending, the massive amounts of foreign aid to Ukraine that are bankrupting our country and we will continue to fight for our Second Amendment.
Your support of the Colorado GOP with a generous donation today will move us one step closer to Saving America and bringing back a prosperous America for each and every American citizen.
Please donate today! Thanks to our efforts, our team was able to activate a 5x match opportunity exclusively for you. This is your chance to contribute and make it count, so please donate to the Colorado GOP now!

body:

We need serious people to solve them. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_t=CiLpIWYUxUN3s3gcLO86whlhS6LwcfDIN9BVgRWPFLC_qyhb2ndOfdkSIs-fo30Av3jAZY8r35Bk3tEKf2jaQhQVu4JGie-e1vgncdkQ7UI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_t=CiLpIWYUxUN3s3gcLO86whlhS6LwcfDIN9BVgRWPFLC_qyhb2ndOfdkSIs-fo30Av3jAZY8r35Bk3tEKf2jaQhQVu4JGie-e1vgncdkQ7UI%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_e=l3W72sxhFcNTZuupVcdnrQV8BavCdPeOulp4WvmsZwWBIEGI2wzoVDr46t4lVUXBy-jxS4RW5L42E1HHcUDjpRolbY8sYVjm9LEtPEMyX78K5H6snzjUA5_z-z6xnqg0dBOLUNl9J5IqTH5qOC2WxAS7-x9OEXTYy-lXkUsE-YGSCX2EUPOPFDGbGvb7FDIKiEszMyziLV4Y4ZeKgZ447nHh3tptc1L8XbGTj3KCh6eflvRaJi-HvUVoTt2dYpGVS4EwgOsluQ8ztFrD1XRT21GZmOo8vKHTX7IQ2ptZ8eg5uwaRd7kj-xpIbQGB29jTuB51KkwOXVRpDUWHcV0WIh-tDg1jzLCMzTGGp3wAdgJXhgEHdLQaRvAphszA42n24ekY3LVSiXAaK1qZYtgx4g%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**WATCH NOW
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_e=l3W72sxhFcNTZuupVcdnrQV8BavCdPeOulp4WvmsZwWBIEGI2wzoVDr46t4lVUXBy-jxS4RW5L42E1HHcUDjpRolbY8sYVjm9LEtPEMyX78K5H6snzjUA5_z-z6xnqg0dBOLUNl9J5IqTH5qOC2WxAS7-x9OEXTYy-lXkUsE-YGSCX2EUPOPFDGbGvb7FDIKiEszMyziLV4Y4ZeKgZ447nHh3tptc1L8XbGTj3KCh6eflvRaJi-HvUVoTt2dYpGVyfyUU_nBNadeLHQAiZE0nzUo1lbyo49MxuaQu7sJ190xt4_K38QNpe7S4aH843kTwik6RoiuRAd1qh09jM29zgVtDrUHprp85VMUx4g_deKiBjrz2UOYF5_V5VoT1sHNB4XNG28EQYM12WxxtRtBUQ%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_e=l3W72sxhFcNTZuupVcdnrQV8BavCdPeOulp4WvmsZwWBIEGI2wzoVDr46t4lVUXBy-jxS4RW5L42E1HHcUDjpRolbY8sYVjm9LEtPEMyX78K5H6snzjUA5_z-z6xnqg0dBOLUNl9J5IqTH5qOC2WxAS7-x9OEXTYy-lXkUsE-YGSCX2EUPOPFDGbGvb7FDIKiEszMyziLV4Y4ZeKgZ447nHh3tptc1L8XbGTj3KCh6eflvRaJi-HvUVoTt2dYpGVTAeo736zeH7ZChllJ9kJbVEb5Pfz6qY0CvNu0_EfvQ7aYWbSutK0Nv27T9FHTCYPFYKx_0lun4Qe4bLqODRkBLe4YEkCVp13R2ypxErR-VkM_wRRhxUEy8R13dL9tCCSJyAvEcbEFlr4QC5N3FZLGw%3D%3D)

American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Peter,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_e=l3W72sxhFcNTZuupVcdnrQV8BavCdPeOulp4WvmsZwWBIEGI2wzoVDr46t4lVUXBy-jxS4RW5L42E1HHcUDjpRolbY8sYVjm9LEtPEMyX78K5H6snzjUA5_z-z6xnqg0dBOLUNl9J5IqTH5qOC2WxAS7-x9OEXTYy-lXkUsE-YGSCX2EUPOPFDGbGvb7FDIKiEszMyziLV4Y4ZeKgZ447nHh3tptc1L8XbGTj3KCh6eflvRaJi-HvUVoTt2dYpGVkh-HCinu2MN3VK27JA4UBaqDQ90XfZiHNiEt83SImhCEkb5wkgPp5PCAFTTCGhaauZqJTeoa84w7tVkDBD1pAhNWHBnCOFmMrLw_7g7dlLB2EyOUgabGflfklnwqVDg5Rzs9tMvOK53lvL6Nvt3Y4Q%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_e=l3W72sxhFcNTZuupVcdnrQV8BavCdPeOulp4WvmsZwWBIEGI2wzoVDr46t4lVUXBy-jxS4RW5L42E1HHcUDjpRolbY8sYVjm9LEtPEMyX78K5H6snzjUA5_z-z6xnqg0dBOLUNl9J5IqTH5qOC2WxAS7-x9OEXTYy-lXkUsE-YGSCX2EUPOPFDGbGvb7FDIKiEszMyziLV4Y4ZeKgZ447nHh3tptc1L8XbGTj3KCh6eflvRaJi-HvUVoTt2dYpGVJoVhilQvPUDALlv5t4DftdPV9Hhkogpmx7szYhZ8MWQgwXbZDrQdFgKccK12GgLonThUrW8PWz_saw5CEBAHTmMmW7BNRY_pxQtrHuuyHLK2-O3kUNX1FivyKu_MGggwwmIVQ8pijHTU1JLRDpFqlw%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1fe7fdde1a764865b277b94cc17be023&_e=l3W72sxhFcNTZuupVcdnrQV8BavCdPeOulp4WvmsZwWBIEGI2wzoVDr46t4lVUXBy-jxS4RW5L42E1HHcUDjpRolbY8sYVjm9LEtPEMyX78K5H6snzjUA5_z-z6xnqg0dBOLUNl9J5IqTH5qOC2WxAS7-x9OEXTYy-lXkUsE-YGSCX2EUPOPFDGbGvb7FDIKiEszMyziLV4Y4ZeKgZ447nHh3tptc1L8XbGTj3KCh6eflvRaJi-HvUVoTt2dYpGVil5qZtLNjNibDJJ0m1rnFwiG4NNDKLa2vpF1IrXaudaCOsij7-7to__jwEWEm2n_OvKVcWzZiOpR4Bfbw5I9bbVQjXKoFLW4JJQ_LeyR62fw18zuHNQZVwlUYxQXnySQfkl-LHh206aEzvINNlIHmA%3D%3D)

* * *

clean_body: We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them. | | Peter, I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family. But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. That’s why I am running. As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate. American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system. We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them. When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. Peter, Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
| Not shying away from Trump’s latest political attacks, Adam responded on MSNBC:
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3053%2E5257348%2EqbMrLn)
**BREAKING NEWS** , Derek:
The Justice Department issued a letter to the twice-impeached, twice-indicted ex-president Donald Trump stating that he is the target of a DOJ investigation into his efforts to overturn the results of the 2020 election.
Not shying away from Trump’s latest political attacks, Adam responded on _MSNBC_ :
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230719_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3053%2E5257348%2EqbMrLn)
_“**We found evidence of a conspiracy to defraud the United States** , we obviously found **evidence of the President’s complicity in the events of January 6th and the interference with the peaceful transfer of power.**”_
When Adam says it’s about time this investigation reached its end, **we agree.**
But Donald Trump loves to play the victim, and he has legions of enablers who will fight the Justice Department every step of the way — from Kevin McCarthy to the MAGA Republican senators who are enabling Trump to attack Adam more and more every day.

body:
| Most of us probably remember the day the Supreme Court made gay marriage legal. It could’ve even been the first time you even paid any attention to politics growing up.

**Flash forward to now** – where the Supreme Court ruled that businesses have the right to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans. State and national governments are pushing for laws that completely destroy LGBTQ+ rights, especially for young people. The GOP is doing everything it can to keep our country in the past and is making it clear they don’t give a shit about anyone but themselves while doing it. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH AT THIS POINT! We need to mobilize young people to get rid of this nonsense. clean_body: | Most of us probably remember the day the Supreme Court made gay marriage legal. It could’ve even been the first time you even paid any attention to politics growing up. Flash forward to now – where the Supreme Court ruled that businesses have the right to discriminate against LGBTQ+ Americans. State and national governments are pushing for laws that completely destroy LGBTQ+ rights, especially for young people. The GOP is doing everything it can to keep our country in the past and is making it clear they don’t give a shit about anyone but themselves while doing it. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH AT THIS POINT! We need to mobilize young people to get rid of this nonsense. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = We demand a government that advocates for all young people, no matter their gender or sexuality. — NextGen PAC | At NextGen, we Identify, Engage and Mobilize young voters , meeting them where they're at with issues that are directly affecting them. = NextGen PAC 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=1)

Dear Peter, We’re excited to announce that tomorrow morning, July 20th at 9 a.m. Eastern Time, [Mr. Kennedy will testify](https://www.kennedy24.com/kennedy_testify_censorship_collusion_government_social_media?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=2) at _a House Select Subcommittee on the_** _Weaponization of the Federal Government_** about the federal government’s disturbing role in censoring American citizens. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZhUp9daUnX3YniIdwjNqQp&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=3 "RFK Jr testifies in Congress on censorship") Mr. Kennedy’s testimony will contribute to the pushback against the rampant collusion between government agencies and tech platforms to censor speech that does not align with the interests of the Washington establishment. **Statement from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. on tomorrow’s hearing** : _“Recent revelations in the Twitter Files and_ [_Missouri v. Biden_](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk_jr_responds_federal_judge_freedom_of_speech_censorship_ruling?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=4) _show how deeply institutionalized government censorship has become. “It is dressed up in euphemisms like, ‘working with our partners in tech,’ but make no mistake, this is a systematic program to control what Americans can say and think. As such, it is antithetical to democracy. In a democracy, the people tell the government what to think, not the other way around.”_ Yesterday, 102 Democrats signed a letter asking that Mr. Kennedy be disinvited from the hearing. Quite ironic to censor someone testifying at a hearing on censorship. The hearing might make interesting viewing! **You can** [**watch the livestream here**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZhUp9daUnX3YniIdwjNqQp&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=5)**.** **Freedom of speech is the foundation of democracy**. [**If you believe in the First Amendment, please chip in to make sure that this vital Constitutional right is passed down to future generations**.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=6) Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is one of the most censored American voices of our time. Take a moment to watch his important testimony tomorrow morning and share this email with anyone you know who cares about the issues of censorship, free speech, and democracy. Sincerely, Team Kennedy
[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=7)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=8) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=9) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=10) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_to_testify_on_censor3&n=11)
* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Let me know if I will see you on August 9th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=f7ac0f0a5b&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | My birthday is coming up, and the gift I really want is to celebrate it with you, my core team of supporters. Can you join us for food, fun and maybe an embarrassing round of “Happy Birthday"? Wednesday, August 9th
5:30 pm Plumbers Union Hall
1519 Rollins Road, Burlingame [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8896b5bb02&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=3846a1d43f&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=9c964b49b7&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
---

name: Don Huffines
subject: HLF Session Review: Property Taxes
body:
A Review of the 88th Texas Legislature: Property Taxes
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-x/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## HLF Session Review: Property Taxes
## _" Texas taxpayers were lied to and screwed out of PERMANENT property tax relief."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, July 19, 2023 -- Since the Texas Legislature started its regular session in January with a historic surplus, we had an opportunity to set Texas on the path to eliminating the school property tax.Unfortunately, the property tax package passed by the Texas Legislature this month fell well short of the expectations of Texas taxpayers.While the amount of money dedicated to property tax relief in this agreement is significant--the second largest effort in Texas history--and the numerous ways of delivering tax relief appear impressive,**[there are several shortcomings in this measure approved by the Texas Legislature:](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-j/)**_**1.** Inadequate Funding_ _**2. **Reduced Spending on Compression_ _**3.** Fails to Provide Meaningful Property Tax Relief_If Texas leaders are going to get serious about eliminating our school maintenance and operations property tax (M&O), the Texas Legislature must take **[seven steps that lock the state into a path to accomplish this within eight years:](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-t/)**_**1.** Freeze school M&O property taxes for school districts at their current levels_ _**2.** Limit the increase of state general revenue used for spending to only 4% per biennium_ _**3.** Require 90% of the remaining state general revenue surplus be used to buy down school M&O property taxes until they are eliminated_ _**4.** Require the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate for local taxing units to be a rate that produces revenue equal to a unit's total tax levy from the previous year_ _**5.** Require voter approval for ANY increase in a taxing unit's property tax revenue by changing the Voter-Approval Tax Rate to be equal to the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate_ _**6.** Limit voter-approved tax increases to no more than 3.5% per year_ _**7.** Put these changes into the Texas Constitution to protect Texans from fickle policymakers_ [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-h/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-k/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-b/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-n/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-z/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zdiutyd-l-v)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zdiutyd-yuddtktydi-p/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. Freeze school M&O property taxes for school districts at their current levels 2. Limit the increase of state general revenue used for spending to only 4% per biennium 3. Require the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate for local taxing units to be a rate that produces revenue equal to a unit's total tax levy from the previous year 5. Require voter approval for ANY increase in a taxing unit's property tax revenue by changing the Voter-Approval Tax Rate to be equal to the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate 6. Limit voter-approved tax increases to no more than 3.5% per year 7. Put these changes into the Texas Constitution to protect Texans from fickle policymakers The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of liberty , prosperity , and virtue in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.### Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas: | | | | ---|---|--- (214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible. By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. |

| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrahtvg4lv86n082dm72d38kab7hkbg81rh383c8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3im1o32c1h2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb5m1651h4sk2duj505p2su1se13p0iurbct59ao_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3im1o32c1h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

# THURSday, JULY 20, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today marks the 54th anniversary of the day when man first walked on the moon. Apollo 11 astronaut Neil Armstrong planted his boot on the lunar surface at 11 p.m. ET while the world watched on TV.

In today's edition, we're talking about the hit song "Try That in A Small Town," along with a hamburger chain that requires a doctor's note if employees want to wear masks, and the 18th annual Granny Basketball National Tournament.

## U.S. Suspends Funding to Wuhan Covid Lab
The Biden administration [suspended all federal funding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsRHAaTgaGLt3TtaGHfOVyFwbJJorx91c6d_-GXvq_bdIucudw_40ahrXWKS-MnTWqQoCSYCToMKxGQ6Sho56_eau2GLgXlSMOKNMQZ0CLOZGftPFpaegOu7ziAAqMGUOpqnDUXT17P3nr0fvVDvIpeEXKrx-W7cmmJ1vyuTzouS926HFJr-ynMh4BRwNgSJc75twkY95p5eQsYE8Xc0hIPEjD2WlmnlZwZqciIGxc-2xEb1yLPx7lTwVOuj4Jc7rJV-XqkWGSOs4CxOwLuL86ZTzeIXt23yH-7rv0v8xMAAP__hypmAA) to the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China over the Institute's refusal to provide answers about safety and security at the facility.

Many believe the coronavirus originated from a leak at the lab. The Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) began a review of the Wuhan Institute last September, and found it [not in compliance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQRb_GdI6GMcFD4eI17vLaLZEJY_DK2MiYRPn7FVtvfXXPkc7XY3y4EENa_ruNTfV5dM8aXjyClggS1YjNbDwzsmrYtD0NdG_bXjercVr7vlOk1KRgGhQiDNS53nvoiHhugkFABRoBBtXf1Y2Y2onuNBN50m4QHfAcai637xxSXdnHT35xuT3z1kSz1rofQv0TaAXa9NnzUa9JoL3AAi1ogbYlgfY85HJd08apyudZD-nPNIe0SF_yJt_n6pKMbpLZe1l4z6UKtE0x8_4OMYaj16KDZXMh_urr3zV-AgAA__8pC19K) with federal regulations.

HHS officials also told the lab that given its persistent lack of transparency, the U.S. is seeking to go beyond a suspension and cut off funding permanently.
## Hunter Biden Investigators Testify to Congress
A pair of IRS whistleblowers with 12 years of investigative experience confirmed to Congress Wednesday that Hunter Biden and his companies [pulled in $17 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0Lty4yAUgOGnQR0aQDdUUGyjzttuqeFysM4GCQ8Hm_jtM0md-m_--f7d9pvFhNf9rz3B1Jh36yu-YBcLV4KrYVddMBFAwdCBkbNe9STlvHSHmXwIY4gRtAx28uB8cN7OUs9u1dKNHRol1CAWJcQ6zNPQa9DS6UkHraNe7MpGAQFrLv3_jFc9IKZ3fkHpfT67ZI5aH8SGP0xtTG2ttT7mzwsafXemtkdOWNETU5vDABeP9sT05sfzqlCIW6Ls0VYgXuwHBC6Xk8eSTx5zAbxfnPKzeCCOhXg7kGoCl3KDwitQxYhAXTHh0TAlpHlho7ifFtPPYP3d6ysAAP__0clxvw) from foreign sources over several years. The two IRS agents testified that they felt the Justice Department blocked their investigation into the source of the money. They were critical of [Attorney General Merrick Garland](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PtCAURn-NdhjED7CgeBu7edstDcJV7gbBwJ0h8-83s_V2T_IU5-R8PbaHwYDx_G8u0HSkzVjCF2xcMsGZGDbROn0ACBha0P2sFjX1_Sxbr8cRYADolVVG7tZNYCfnJOezc8shXItacDFwKThfhnkaOgWq39WknFKHkmZpRg4OKeXuO2EkD0d4pxfkzqarDdoT3aUZ_jVibcRaa-3ibiPU8vkbsd4pIKEtjVhtimeG8pmYC6seCwXYQ6qQCyMohMeb-fQswD6EgqcnZtN1IREA889IkNmODiK7c9pZttEsE5eqzdrdFUPAMstm5OdlMPwa0t_BfgIAAP__3e1xJQ) for refusing so far to appear before Congress to discuss the case. Democrats portrayed the issue as a routine disagreement between Justice Dept. leaders and employees, but Republicans said it indicated an official cover-up of financial misdeeds.
## 'Small Town' Song Infuriates City Folks
Conservative country singer Jason Aldean's controversial music video "Try That in A Small Town" has been yanked from Country Music TV even as [it hit No. 1](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLmOg0AQRL9myBrNwTEEBE7IvOmGqIEGxoIeaw4j__3KjjcslVT19H7v4x3d4Xj7wZP6tPoR5-ReNMoWtARtRl0s_UqkyRTUq8Z2tlaqaYu9n3FWlsiQpUmtNFWTanStsFsb1RiFheu11Ea2WsrONLUpLVk12dou1q62xU5UkhaXfCgf3nHaaT3e_kWhnP1ZHP2e0jMKcxN6EHq4rqs8I386oQdiyFHo4czRzUIPTNcnPjB6BjwWQoboeQOcfE6wZY6wuxSB8zlRAAUYYfaZU3jDdwTSC1IOHMEz7O5zggFuN0XVsHER-uV5ueNwsWlFJbcT3fHlTP9r-wsAAP__7sFwQw) on the iTunes Billboard chart.

The video shows news footage of recent riots while Aldean sings that this kind of thing may happen in the cities, but people in small towns wouldn't allow it. It is explicitly pro-gun, pro-police, and pro-small town. ([See Video Here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vgzAQQH-NvYH8Ab5j8FC1ZanSoR2qTuiAI7gycUQMKP--Sueu70lPel-n7kQhhsv5nRb2eUodDTns3CkojCqM7Ywc_cRs2Er22mGDtdYO5OwnA1UDwI1yUJMmADI4VBVh32s3kAzeKGMVGKUa62pbIqPuscYRcUKgRlSKx5DTWv6kcMkzT_Gedl7LIS0y-jnn603YJ2FaYdrjOMp72vLW88M_COVhFrbdhX3pdffxthWvn8_fcvXj9QgxhpsDUanzQiH-JfP_h78BAAD__3BUUJ8))

Many people have [called the song racist](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuyozAQBb8GsqHE8JAIFGxC5k03pMZowOMSkkuSzfrvb9nxTc9JuvvfZbmQeAn7XzrYli0utBZ58aI0oALsFqyd3ZiRu5ptO5rJDG076vpmXafIacTWTGM_9BMPgyJuJ31FowybWiwq7JRGpaZuHLrGsGmvZjDOmM1omqpesZMSU3OPEsqNN_-OL07NGo_a21spj1x1fyqcK5zP82y2-D_wmT9_hfPBTqjCeY3PUNIbsoSdE9wpxwDkHVMA-kwZvFw5kYevneSSgUIRWJMcDI8UYX8GyDHsgAoVJIkl18m6xyneSx511av9IPFftPJ7qZ8AAAD__8H4bB0), making it the latest battleground in the culture wars. On Twitter, Aldean explained that he was praising small-town communities and didn't apologize.

clean_body: The Biden administration suspended all federal funding to the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China over the Institute’s refusal to provide answers about safety and security at the facility. | | | | | | THURSday, JULY 20, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today marks the 54th anniversary of the day when man first walked on the moon. Apollo 11 astronaut Neil Armstrong planted his boot on the lunar surface at 11 p.m. ET while the world watched on TV. In today's edition, we're talking about the hit song "Try That in A Small Town," along with a hamburger chain that requires a doctor's note if employees want to wear masks, and the 18th annual Granny Basketball National Tournament. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We appreciate hearing from our readers! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying The Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | U.S. Suspends Funding to Wuhan Covid Lab The Biden administration to the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China over the Institute's refusal to provide answers about safety and security at the facility. Many believe the coronavirus originated from a leak at the lab. The Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) began a review of the Wuhan Institute last September, and found it with federal regulations. HHS officials also told the lab that given its persistent lack of transparency, the U.S. is seeking to go beyond a suspension and cut off funding permanently. Hunter Biden Investigators Testify to Congress A pair of IRS whistleblowers with 12 years of investigative experience confirmed to Congress Wednesday that Hunter Biden and his companies from foreign sources over several years. The two IRS agents testified that they felt the Justice Department blocked their investigation into the source of the money. They were critical of for refusing so far to appear before Congress to discuss the case. Democrats portrayed the issue as a routine disagreement between Justice Dept. leaders and employees, but Republicans said it indicated an official cover-up of financial misdeeds. 'Small Town' Song Infuriates City Folks Conservative country singer Jason Aldean's controversial music video "Try That in A Small Town" has been yanked from Country Music TV even as on the iTunes Billboard chart. The video shows news footage of recent riots while Aldean sings that this kind of thing may happen in the cities, but people in small towns wouldn't allow it. It is explicitly pro-gun, pro-police, and pro-small town. () Many people have , making it the latest battleground in the culture wars. On Twitter, Aldean explained that he was praising small-town communities and didn't apologize. Tim Scott 's super PAC has reserved $40 million worth of ad time for the fall, the largest buy of the 2024 presidential race so far. The ads will run in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. A special election has been scheduled for Sept. 19, a week before the legislature returns to session. He warned that otherwise, a patchwork of state NIL rules could make it hard to control the booming endorsement business. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: I’d be really grateful if you took the time to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I'm hoping you'll read this all the way through.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. I wanted to take a few minutes today to share something personal with you, but it's going to take a bit of explaining. **If you get to the end and still don 't understand my commitment to America, then I'm just appreciative that you took the time to read this in its entirety.**

I wanted to take some time to discuss my background so you understand where I'm coming from when I'm fighting for the American people.
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExzrTIqMwoYfmztDaWH3jcv_HHgu88-1regE39Tf6rGdfxhRcbMv4QgLOY3aw8JCMhCpFXCy6QyvpZB5NqmBIYeRGjbqeZEWC6H25L052iZnJ_DbshcNNxckkbvt3y5hDSF1w48V9mhum-x69zxrIzGB "Kevin as a baby with his dad")
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExyhKCaveFsnATyQxeD_4DFZwH7_FNMM4Wbr_hesPY-88zabrkPB_z97p-xc6PdP60l0-lAgapzXQesvgsec9R_TP0hud_gZ0Oh8sLu9apcFMDaY1DhsNLyKQY_vHptQnsM39lrEu7p1uafnw524AcuK "Kevin with his siblings in 1968")
---
_My dad and I, circa 1966._ | _My siblings, Shelly and Mark, and I, circa 1968._

I come from a working-class background. My grandparents were immigrants. My mom, Roberta, was a homemaker. My dad, Owen, was an assistant city fire chief. **They instilled a strong work ethic in me that I carry with me every day.**
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExzVzbOd6P_ScgbcyfiTeIk36N5dKJRDMKVpPrYIKECKajagmF3ASPOjRy0y_sgYvuha8cgMhJetkKmKLVDx3x1AIDnT0sesQA5o4A5uvKQhkIG4Geyz-mSNdCmi0La8yn4ytM_zWGdLb2CMf7cTzQxa "Kevin working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt.")
---
_Working the counter at Kevin O's Deli & McCarthy's Yogurt. (Sorry for the image quality, but at least you'll know it's authentic!)_

When I was 19, I ran my first business, Kevin O's Deli, selling sandwiches out of the back of my uncle's yogurt shop. Eventually, I sold the deli to pay my way through college. It taught me a lot about personal responsibility, and **I quickly learned how overregulation by the government affects small businesses. **
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExyfUyt02dEjwH1trAUpIiEKvnrLodFPnDKKGe2uCtfNLBNFVtIex_l1zVCetnSusVXJI84gjHqhDvp4VDjl0SqGBWIDf0S1TCW8p5cUhxwe7zaD3ReA-9TLRsp93pQmVKaaly_dEHNRuLEEsjkQVfiJ "Kevin speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010")
---
_Speaking with a farmer on the campaign trail in 2010._

After Kevin O's Deli and my experience with government overreach, I decided it was time to make a change. I knew public service would be a positive way for me to channel my frustration as a former small business owner, while also helping others in similar situations. Little did I know that working in the California State Assembly would pave the way to holding one of the most prestigious roles in our country: _**Speaker of the House of Representatives.**_
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExwM2Y7IG-8Hj4egw5zWfOIwjKR8ehAdE8i9azDSafW-bsaanHeKBC2OhBzfZ5VuKnSNOBqzxiQW-xUIaTJ1K1IkU-HPCWNQmhMjlm4pT9LVZQioy9mBOX_08XKMEHk0e_Niz-EFNeWWp1Vd6nKUhDyf "Celebrating Republicans’ success in taking back the House in 2022.")
---
_Celebrating Republicans ' success in taking back the House in 2022_

This brings me to my main point: **my Commitment to America isn 't some political ploy - _it 's deeply personal._**

**As Speaker of the House, I promise to deliver on our commitment to America and the American people.

[If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford - $5, $10, even $25 if you can - to help me continue this fight.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExyOuRwNxWoErhTFhM9rhZNRv4ZEIgwhv8bBFU0mkfzeAcBejyMuyKF6Bdt_IrnMLGTrrvlEQXxjbcLeYyvArlbH1eBufx1YyG88q5cUSfsX4xgUiuLgP40K2TVKrIGnxZ3NcJKdJKpgIL7zQHbUHluU "If you support my efforts as Speaker, please chip in whatever you can afford – $5, $10, even $25 if you can – to help me continue this fight.")**

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExwOrMsRtOELdEwsdx5CWQmiBpq7ZDZapNVSup4P_H1sVMqhm8vqf-QhA9GDXCDOHbtXkOygxCzD9vtVWjY-Au9SF9gYquoosOHhKKuPfZNGTDikbNh2-8xRASHvIiYMjG02K1_rWtEB0_CfluqBfECf "STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY")
---

If you've read this through to the end, thank you so much for your time. I hope you understand why our commitment to America is so important. I'm so grateful to have your support.

Thank you,

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d424ecb92ee4e15ab822d745f354518&_e=WDjAN8HWf0pqYxBn1lDuwswJHR_TE1s8HMfNTK_y9MtuYfaIVvL8GJlRejBNe3ZBrge0mM9qIDxo5U7fHX3hTKkexJVDZNusVyrbTbnU0dOkJCAAYoktvRt4KbkqI_mLFT-11lM3rMY9ysbq1nHe6ABab6nhg07e1bI3gnJ866uH5f74zeaAl6zP2B66OOJYv6JPW0hntBvvbm28L_A7dAUoNrwula2DC_eQEB0mqNaJYWrNUp3l0wi5z3EbY4xwLAqM7helhTQpkc9tBrBFFS5JXmewLDNBnaX5o2J2ExwJRPimLt-VgjWKcFgCYy8W064RfMRRFRrGNorSKnL3YMznOuSI38OLwPtRF90c8DRjjESlvWTBR7ouBsYTG3wwgA4D2Xc3BO0RQoKCBlEIxCh0Qq3KCETbKFpDRZW9kxW0LDK0n-tmBu8cdiIlL-KT "KOM Signature")

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Get this limited-edition shirt for a gift of any amount
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)

Fellow Conservative,

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**WATCH NOW
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5eb8cf7f9f0f47a8a54cc9cf67066e49&_e=qIF8zkVtyLROs8ctNWpKixwGA3oqfTau1tUJ9UuphoarG4eggVEVwHckqqVOiYiLGa9wGjQ3veA7LT5TDb489aU1wM3CV-ifodDHkY14Ydv8n1uHLnnF8ZfA4hHZBhQ__jDzpxpDIBkrNdh3ycTiGV2fqusybdguN3Ia4qt9Pl3tKJhr8LjXBO2uXBxxuxFrxjlZO3i3zbA0BIlnnZtfAUmn0-dzLF2MxfgOBNjIIs9BYHeIzfhLotiYzbCvIj3HeViBys8XwGmI9qMcdpfrVuxzFroyjWE2xENgR2oyliVXd3cYtn2ZZbVi5LHxILTvTUQaKbc897HKhj2P0tBCTClYW4ONtg-ZMGjg1ztUxQUdBz6IpzPESYw4QGhX24Xnw9SJQw2iu0EFIjs3VpNbOg%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5eb8cf7f9f0f47a8a54cc9cf67066e49&_e=qIF8zkVtyLROs8ctNWpKixwGA3oqfTau1tUJ9UuphoarG4eggVEVwHckqqVOiYiLGa9wGjQ3veA7LT5TDb489aU1wM3CV-ifodDHkY14Ydv8n1uHLnnF8ZfA4hHZBhQ__jDzpxpDIBkrNdh3ycTiGV2fqusybdguN3Ia4qt9Pl3tKJhr8LjXBO2uXBxxuxFrxjlZO3i3zbA0BIlnnZtfAUmn0-dzLF2MxfgOBNjIIs9BYHeIzfhLotiYzbCvIj3HpMimeOAQxi0jhMryWzlLUBCjtYxwF0aQyhDIAE30kGFeHweWtrDBKoL9NPu7ptzSpdii-DjNUim90JKZkFB9jjwxHeW7AM-d7Z9-Zs5f2GXm9Qm3l2o9HD9VN_8mhIv-D_OYJdPUsVrE5uk9siNXHA%3D%3D)

American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Fellow Conservative,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5eb8cf7f9f0f47a8a54cc9cf67066e49&_e=qIF8zkVtyLROs8ctNWpKixwGA3oqfTau1tUJ9UuphoarG4eggVEVwHckqqVOiYiLGa9wGjQ3veA7LT5TDb489aU1wM3CV-ifodDHkY14Ydv8n1uHLnnF8ZfA4hHZBhQ__jDzpxpDIBkrNdh3ycTiGV2fqusybdguN3Ia4qt9Pl3tKJhr8LjXBO2uXBxxuxFrxjlZO3i3zbA0BIlnnZtfAUmn0-dzLF2MxfgOBNjIIs9BYHeIzfhLotiYzbCvIj3HWyvP8r6VVdYcOofd1PvFprmQrWdEQH-Qwp0sFLM2XT29M_nQF0mpFFGHlRx7zR9nsks6MRW8NRILpW3zlJiWoneWZSFlCxdHKPPVohA2ZZEBRM_FVYkx3rsUWG0CQfQeTTHigEcfUz1s2rnrmTcUXA%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5eb8cf7f9f0f47a8a54cc9cf67066e49&_e=qIF8zkVtyLROs8ctNWpKixwGA3oqfTau1tUJ9UuphoarG4eggVEVwHckqqVOiYiLGa9wGjQ3veA7LT5TDb489aU1wM3CV-ifodDHkY14Ydv8n1uHLnnF8ZfA4hHZBhQ__jDzpxpDIBkrNdh3ycTiGV2fqusybdguN3Ia4qt9Pl3tKJhr8LjXBO2uXBxxuxFrxjlZO3i3zbA0BIlnnZtfAUmn0-dzLF2MxfgOBNjIIs9BYHeIzfhLotiYzbCvIj3H1Bz7cQEVV3xv0gWclLImfWbAxgbZy5csn3a1oRrCInhGA0alc5KQNFsslhbqAR5VHOfU1xzeXqEi5lasZXqgScOjNt9E4OX8947ZAn-94imKzANoBZ0xtPFy8kztPLgach3JtKxD0MCxLmHfycFuWQ%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: The most important conversations of 2023
body:
You have to watch this | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/conversations?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

This may be one of the most important conversations you listen to this year. My friends Dr. Jay Bhattacharya, Dr. Scott Atlas and others held a critical roundtable along with Hillsdale College to discuss where we went wrong in our government's heavy-handed approach to lockdowns, treatment of our children, and harmful policies.

In this particular conversation, they cover the topic, "how deadly was COVID-19 actually." Please [click](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d03eaa44a4&e=9828080a05) the thumbnail below, [watch this potent conversation](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=a65f1287ec&e=9828080a05) and share it with as many people as you can:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=25d750ff76&e=9828080a05 "The Real Risk of Death with COVID")
---
| This incredibly-important six minutes of information regarding the real risk of death from Covid! Why wasn't a critical conversation like this leading our decisions?

We still suffer from government overreach. They took advantage of us once; we cannot let it happen again. This is, in part, why I wrote the book, "[_We've Been Played: Exposing the Triad of Tyranny_](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c54ada3ed0&e=9828080a05)."

Please continue having [these conversations](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=444458fb26&e=9828080a05) and stay vigilant against further mandates and government overreach. Remember, President Reagan once said: "The nine most terrifying words in the English language are ‘I’m from the government and I’m here to help.’”

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Orphaned wolf pups are in danger if we don’t act now
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Orphaned wolf pups are starving and alone. Protect them and the planet before it’s too late: Donate $27 and help us reach our $3,800 goal!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886296?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886297?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886298?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
A sleepy wolf pup opens his eyes. He wanders out of the den looking for mom. But he doesn’t find her returning home with a meal. Instead, he finds the forest floor coated in blood. And a few feet away, _mom’s mangled body lies limp_ , shredded by bullets. Now, **he is left all alone to starve or face the same fate as his mother.** [**Wolf pups shouldn’t have to fight for their lives, orphaned and alone: protect wolf families and the planet NOW and donate $27 to help us reach our $3,800 goal by midnight tonight!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886300?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting wolves across the country. And right now in the Northern Rockies States, _there are no federal safeguards to keep gray wolves safe_ from them. But **there are only 6,000 wolves left in the lower 48 states.** And trophy hunters and Big Polluters are actively fighting against protections for wolves -- all so they can kill for sport and take over their lands for mining, logging, and other practices. If they get their way, there would be dire consequences for wolves and the planet.
Wolves are at a tipping point, Friend. The good news is that it isn’t too late to save them yet. Thanks to generous and kind supporters like you, wolves still stand a chance against the greedy interests working against them. But to give them that chance, we have to act now -- while there are still wolves left to save. Will you join us in this fight before we lose wolves forever?
**Don’t let another wolf pup lose its mother. Donate $27 and help us reach our urgent $3,800 goal for wolves and the planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886296?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886297?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886298?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
For trophy hunters, it’s not enough to just take the lives of innocent wolves. They resort to helicopter chases and torturous snares that fill a wolf’s last hours with _**panic, dread, and insurmountable pain.**_ To make matters worse, wolf pups are left orphaned after their mothers are gunned down in the woods. Without their mothers, wolf pups can suffer from _**hypothermia, starvation, and predation.**_
Not even wolves in Yellowstone are safe from the pattern. The park **recently lost a record high of 25 wolves, leaving only 89 behind.** Yet _the states that border Yellowstone still have limited safeguards_ to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters and their inhumane practices!
All the while, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are pushing against protections for these precious creatures. They hope to kill them for sport and invade their habitats for the sake of corporate greed. Their actions have contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species.
If these greedy private interests succeed, it could be the final nail in the coffin for wolves. Friend, we can’t just sit back and watch while innocent wolf lives and their habitats are on the line. Wolves need your help, and they need it now. Please, will you stand up for these voiceless animals before we lose them forever?
**These vicious hunting practices have to end. Rush your $27 donation today to help save wolves and the planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886296?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886297?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886298?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1886299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in? They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
Wolves had begun to make a slow but promising recovery over the past six decades. But this recovery is under threat as states in the northern Rockies refuse to grant them ESA protections. Others are selling off the public lands they live in, shrinking the areas where they can be safe.
Friends of the Earth is fighting back and working to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs and protect our planet. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. The ESA allows us to shield endangered species from senseless violence and also block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits. Friend, your membership gift today can help save wolves from vicious attacks on the ESA and protect the future of our planet.
But we are facing pushback from private trophy hunting interests, and we need to step up our efforts before it’s too late. If just 1 of every 8 people reading this contributes, we can reach our $3,800 goal -- will you rush your $27 membership donation now?

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dear Friend, | Orphaned wolf pups are starving and alone. Protect them and the planet before it’s too late: Donate $27 and help us reach our $3,800 goal! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == A sleepy wolf pup opens his eyes. He wanders out of the den looking for mom. But he doesn’t find her returning home with a meal. Instead, he finds the forest floor coated in blood. And a few feet away, mom’s mangled body lies limp , shredded by bullets. Now, he is left all alone to starve or face the same fate as his mother. == Trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting wolves across the country. And right now in the Northern Rockies States, there are no federal safeguards to keep gray wolves safe from them. But there are only 6,000 wolves left in the lower 48 states. And trophy hunters and Big Polluters are actively fighting against protections for wolves -- all so they can kill for sport and take over their lands for mining, logging, and other practices. If they get their way, there would be dire consequences for wolves and the planet. Wolves are at a tipping point, Friend. The good news is that it isn’t too late to save them yet. Thanks to generous and kind supporters like you, wolves still stand a chance against the greedy interests working against them. But to give them that chance, we have to act now -- while there are still wolves left to save. Will you join us in this fight before we lose wolves forever? Don’t let another wolf pup lose its mother. Donate $27 and help us reach our urgent $3,800 goal for wolves and the planet! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == For trophy hunters, it’s not enough to just take the lives of innocent wolves. They resort to helicopter chases and torturous snares that fill a wolf’s last hours with panic, dread, and insurmountable pain. To make matters worse, wolf pups are left orphaned after their mothers are gunned down in the woods. Without their mothers, wolf pups can suffer from hypothermia, starvation, and predation. Not even wolves in Yellowstone are safe from the pattern. The park recently lost a record high of 25 wolves, leaving only 89 behind. Yet the states that border Yellowstone still have limited safeguards to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters and their inhumane practices! All the while, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are pushing against protections for these precious creatures. They hope to kill them for sport and invade their habitats for the sake of corporate greed. Their actions have contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species. If these greedy private interests succeed, it could be the final nail in the coffin for wolves. Friend, we can’t just sit back and watch while innocent wolf lives and their habitats are on the line. Wolves need your help, and they need it now. Please, will you stand up for these voiceless animals before we lose them forever? These vicious hunting practices have to end. Rush your $27 donation today to help save wolves and the planet! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Did you know that wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in? They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species! Wolves had begun to make a slow but promising recovery over the past six decades. But this recovery is under threat as states in the northern Rockies refuse to grant them ESA protections. Others are selling off the public lands they live in, shrinking the areas where they can be safe. Friends of the Earth is fighting back and working to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs and protect our planet. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. The ESA allows us to shield endangered species from senseless violence and also block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits. Friend, your membership gift today can help save wolves from vicious attacks on the ESA and protect the future of our planet. But we are facing pushback from private trophy hunting interests, and we need to step up our efforts before it’s too late. If just 1 of every 8 people reading this contributes, we can reach our $3,800 goal -- will you rush your $27 membership donation now? There’s too much on the line to lose wolves forever. Donate $27 now and help us reach our $3,800 goal to save wolves and the planet! ### ROANOKE COUNTY STUDENTS FREE OF LUNCH DEBT

Roanoke County Schools received a check last week to pay off $99,000 worth of outstanding student lunch debt accumulated since the coronavirus.
For some students, school lunch is the only meal they get throughout the day. I am grateful to see families here in the Valley receive some relief from this grant. Next step - universal free school lunch!
---
| |
### SWVA FREE DENTAL CLINIC

People living in or near Southwest Virginia can take advantage of free oral care on July 28-29 as the Mission of Mercy dental clinic returns to UVA-Wise's Convocation Center.
Dental clinic hours will take place on Friday and Saturday from 7 am - 5 pm. Patients are encouraged to arrive early. Pre-registration begins today at 12 noon. Attendees are encouraged to wear comfortable clothes and to bring food and drink for the day. However, no overnight parking on the UVa-Wise campus will be allowed.
Call (804) 620-4032 for more information.

### [Joshua Cole for HD-65](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s92Bz6P3x9mhvcqLUXSVEOTZcWAMfZ5OZIDQRP2emq_4CHHSowkK8Vb1fRHRYX3KyquACT92eqPS58ZYhR4istt9dNNOm58sVxA67NbEq_wucA8NnS2S2VHfOqJlwPzjEPvhrLXfcGs=&c=GuuYGVAzhPNEbUomEmVE2R7s-3ykKZgXu2TJIRTIE3qi_Rq5qzZd_g==&ch=kFDZr7xJbc2WLhpseFjcrf95sjmyiI8Xk5YlblTd_LYpebJNdld0mg==)

Joshua has a proven track record delivering results.
As a resident since childhood, Joshua has not only seen the troubles that Fredericksburg, Stafford, and Spotsylvania face, he's made strides to fix them as a public servant and delegate. As a son of the region, the welfare of its people is his primary mission as a leader. His work proceeds him, and Joshua has championed a government that serves the people. Whether cutting through red tape or reaching across the aisle of government, Joshua delivered common-sense legislation to help all Virginians.

### RRP School Supply Drive
---
This year Roanoke Refugee Partnership is assisting 21 children as they prepare for returning to school for the 2023-2024 school year. They are hoping to provide each child with two $25 gift cards to Walmart or a VISA gift card so that the family can go with the mentor and purchase the items needed for their child (children).
All gift cards will need to be received by August 4th, 2023 to ensure enough time to prepare prior to school starting. We appreciate all of your support!
Gift Cards can either be mailed or dropped off locally.

---
West End Farmers Market is every Tuesday and it is filled with an abundance of Virginia-grown vegetables and so many ways to make these delicious, nutritious fruits and veggies affordable.
Starting this week, any child who visits the West End Farmers Market can receive $5 to spend on fruits and vegetables at the market. Stop by the market manager's table for details.

Visit a library for a fun, free activity!

### July 21-30
---
