clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | | ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH | | | | == | == | ROANOKE COUNTY STUDENTS FREE OF LUNCH DEBT Roanoke County Schools received a check last week to pay off $99,000 worth of outstanding student lunch debt accumulated since the coronavirus. For some students, school lunch is the only meal they get throughout the day. I am grateful to see families here in the Valley receive some relief from this grant. Next step - universal free school lunch! | | SWVA FREE DENTAL CLINIC People living in or near Southwest Virginia can take advantage of free oral care on July 28-29 as the Mission of Mercy dental clinic returns to UVA-Wise's Convocation Center. Dental clinic hours will take place on Friday and Saturday from 7 am - 5 pm. Patients are encouraged to arrive early. Pre-registration begins today at 12 noon. Attendees are encouraged to wear comfortable clothes and to bring food and drink for the day. However, no overnight parking on the UVa-Wise campus will be allowed. Call (804) 620-4032 for more information. | == | == | | | CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT | | | | == | == | == Joshua has a proven track record delivering results. As a resident since childhood, Joshua has not only seen the troubles that Fredericksburg, Stafford, and Spotsylvania face, he's made strides to fix them as a public servant and delegate. As a son of the region, the welfare of its people is his primary mission as a leader. His work proceeds him, and Joshua has championed a government that serves the people. Whether cutting through red tape or reaching across the aisle of government, Joshua delivered common-sense legislation to help all Virginians. | | | | | == Canvass For Sam and Trish! Join us Saturday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on July 22nd at Lakewood Park, 12:30 pm. Located at 1402 Brandon Ave SW Roanoke, VA 24015. | | | == Canvass for Lily Franklin! On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event! Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com or call 540-353-3645. South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018 | | | IN THE COMMUNITY | | | == RRP School Supply Drive This year Roanoke Refugee Partnership is assisting 21 children as they prepare for returning to school for the 2023-2024 school year. They are hoping to provide each child with two $25 gift cards to Walmart or a VISA gift card so that the family can go with the mentor and purchase the items needed for their child (children). All gift cards will need to be received by August 4th, 2023 to ensure enough time to prepare prior to school starting. We appreciate all of your support! Gift Cards can either be mailed or dropped off locally. | == | == Grades Over Guns Needs Volunteers The Grades Over Guns event is calling for volunteers and donations for the upcoming back-to-school event on August 12! ALLY is looking for event volunteers, as well as donations of school supplies like backpacks and notebooks. If you're interested, contact: Jason Hariston: Jason.hariston@tapintohope.org or (540) 915-5193), or Jay Small: building bridgesoverbarriers@gmail.com or (540) 632-0823 Help encourage our youth to choose school and education over gun violence! | == | == Kids Harvest Bucks at West End Farmers Market West End Farmers Market is every Tuesday and it is filled with an abundance of Virginia-grown vegetables and so many ways to make these delicious, nutritious fruits and veggies affordable. Starting this week, any child who visits the West End Farmers Market can receive $5 to spend on fruits and vegetables at the market. Stop by the market manager's table for details. | == | == Roanoke Public Library Events Roanoke public libraries have a July packed with fun, family-friendly events. They are hosting daily events such as a Storytime in the Garden at the Envision Center, a kids watershed activity, zumba, free family photos, an end of summer carnival, and more at their various locations as July wraps up! Visit a library for a fun, free activity! | == | == Mingle at the Market - July 22 Mingle at the Market in Vinton is back again! Glam'r Kiti and Adrenaline 6 are sure to rock and shock you with some amazing music on the HomeTrust Bank Stage. Blue Ridge Beverage will be there along with Las Tapatias Taco Truck and Ken & Jane Burgers & Dogs. Make sure you stop by Saturday! | == | == Sunflower Festival - July 21-30 Visit the 3rd Annual Sunflower Festival at Sinkland Farms for its last two weekends! Open on Fridays 4-8 pm, open on Saturdays and Sundays 11 am - 8 pm. Admission includes: parking, 1 Sunflower per adult ticket, access to sunflower fields and walking trails, local vendors, access to food trucks, live music, Kidz Zone, games, etc., learning stations, and more! | == | | | | | == | Join the Roanoke City Democrats! Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month at a new location, Virginia Heights Community Church, 2014 Memorial Ave SW, beginning at 7 pm. However, the meeting in July is virtual only. Sign up for meeting reminders and other information==. Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm. | | | Join Roanoke Young Dems! Meetings will occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies. Contact:mailto:YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com to get involved! | == | | | | == | | Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime. My very best, | | | Del. Sam Rasoul | | | == == == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate | | | | | | | Sam Rasoul for Delegate | P.O. Box 13842, Roanoke, VA 24037 | | Sent by mailto:info@sam4va.com powered by

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: It’s about service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_t=G-WzLbaSGxclTwzF7JaNTPzoOiQltup5esiRUEOtI0OHxfMKe9yAHrNkyzC6F-62GydXjbPpzwSku-avEgdxP13-bbnr0DwWPny4WIoMBS4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_t=G-WzLbaSGxclTwzF7JaNTPzoOiQltup5esiRUEOtI0OHxfMKe9yAHrNkyzC6F-62GydXjbPpzwSku-avEgdxP13-bbnr0DwWPny4WIoMBS4%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl0KPQNp2kWlPUEQOWVtHh8rVbsmiHvBcpYQ8XUL9wjeDv-Fg2KZBRwWAYNV-YnmxOWeguNkMHFjUSPutfg-HfT1a3yGrLy4zXtDDpGdwBc2IzUDOY6HRVAvRStoO_JXnhcGdkp8IIZPiUusoGPzCGj7LWcrlxZHOPiEJ1GgCuTOEfR8E3ZHsgP4632ktECyYabZ9VG3BiR92SBf4K7_5iY-JCGgiuGQpOvo8wANVEjGT9xUS30HTdzPCXWSmGy8qoDnMHLgiLaDPmHHmHmdx0nKb-wjLpvhT-erYmDycv7w471rSTCmRu9gkWaBAsDtqc8Qwu4ZcfO6lAw-7FIsk8l3qnv4hcZYoouKMsuUeNTgRVFhL2zcUl_6GcBUzQxfeaQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**WATCH NOW
**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl0KPQNp2kWlPUEQOWVtHh8rVbsmiHvBcpYQ8XUL9wjeDv-Fg2KZBRwWAYNV-YnmxOWeguNkMHFjUSPutfg-HfT1a3yGrLy4zXtDDpGdwBc2IzUDOY6HRVAvRStoO_JXnhcGdkp8IIZPiUusoGPzCGj7LWcrlxZHOPiEJ1GgCuTOEfR8E3ZHsgP4632ktECyYabZ9VG3BiR92SBf4K7_5iY-JCGgiuGQpOvo8wANVEjGTWnkF-OqEmtfStJcsiCiZhMQETmr1r9W2AvD0AaKj3WNd-bBRplB_RQ65-J-kgIaqb6AoRPe2iV1xBJYPWXSZmId2AbVaZhosgE-g4eI1oalXnxTLYrxn3CUiLqXE6yejbChc44XlM5ToYquBJ6JEsg%3D%3D)
As a leader on the field of battle, you need to think about the greatest impact you can make. During my military career, it was defending and protecting our great nation. **Now, I want to represent YOU in the United States Senate.**

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl0KPQNp2kWlPUEQOWVtHh8rVbsmiHvBcpYQ8XUL9wjeDv-Fg2KZBRwWAYNV-YnmxOWeguNkMHFjUSPutfg-HfT1a3yGrLy4zXtDDpGdwBc2IzUDOY6HRVAvRStoO_JXnhcGdkp8IIZPiUusoGPzCGj7LWcrlxZHOPiEJ1GgCuTOEfR8E3ZHsgP4632ktECyYabZ9VG3BiR92SBf4K7_5iY-JCGgiuGQpOvo8wANVEjGTubquLUO2yCIMfTVM8F7CgqUcXmoIBgnGejOKsxa8c1txH9S5L2N5pSmoZ3SHOLw7JI8vdPU3T24WEjvyiAQtAJaBNqibaW5SU6UIoB3jztiHMZb4y0rpvkwjaZnwgts8-0ZPBH0HnxdGee_ZK0jcog%3D%3D)

American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Fellow Conservative,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl0KPQNp2kWlPUEQOWVtHh8rVbsmiHvBcpYQ8XUL9wjeDv-Fg2KZBRwWAYNV-YnmxOWeguNkMHFjUSPutfg-HfT1a3yGrLy4zXtDDpGdwBc2IzUDOY6HRVAvRStoO_JXnhcGdkp8IIZPiUusoGPzCGj7LWcrlxZHOPiEJ1GgCuTOEfR8E3ZHsgP4632ktECyYabZ9VG3BiR92SBf4K7_5iY-JCGgiuGQpOvo8wANVEjGTH985JyJ78ywm56TJaQcJgNIa1imW6DNLAJQBPtnqWCYDPtEM-s-fCCXJmqWBnbq42Th3R2XzcyKNnTiR3_p_0R2ygqI-b4ALp6NTGifpSujqqRT0PzA0f2S6vDzUKOGnFj8rnTaZa0F1KiRZ3hHx5w%3D%3D) **

Hooyah,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl0KPQNp2kWlPUEQOWVtHh8rVbsmiHvBcpYQ8XUL9wjeDv-Fg2KZBRwWAYNV-YnmxOWeguNkMHFjUSPutfg-HfT1a3yGrLy4zXtDDpGdwBc2IzUDOY6HRVAvRStoO_JXnhcGdkp8IIZPiUusoGPzCGj7LWcrlxZHOPiEJ1GgCuTOEfR8E3ZHsgP4632ktECyYabZ9VG3BiR92SBf4K7_5iY-JCGgiuGQpOvo8wANVEjGTEXdlZT7cAlYRbW_F8WwSBYeZBpLJ5iC7PIs8wS8dGZ6ocNGGXHBBC6MIKq7Ribxk__m3mR4W2TmcIW_rcWGYwrxdWaHolD4d9bZ9kj7IBDuiGHvm3wIrz2Qf2lFmIvYFXRzHt0YsmkV2-6Ny7kAHeA%3D%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl0KPQNp2kWlPUEQOWVtHh8rVbsmiHvBcpYQ8XUL9wjeDv-Fg2KZBRwWAYNV-YnmxOWeguNkMHFjUSPutfg-HfT1a3yGrLy4zXtDDpGdwBc2IzUDOY6HRVAvRStoO_JXnhcGdkp8IIZPiUusoGPzCGj7LWcrlxZHOPiEJ1GgCuTOEfR8E3ZHsgP4632ktECyYabZ9VG3BiR92SBf4K7_5iY-JCGgiuGQpOvo8wANVEjGTs2rFIxRViZcZMzTtlDUf2_6kSxdSj6t5h4KhAcfWZLZOdwKOeYbD9Pp_HNKlKB1-0_duh2YBQsWiQIK-DkNLHTPLs8_TErgf3Qnca2M7_aQi9-blqUffjZGea2kRmuYLBu59eB_1nvE_6fgtoyCEgA%3D%3D)

* * *
---

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtlxx3eCPFKqD9tNoGaFyRJc0SR_wRZG8DPiYCvb4vKjljuG_XCdJ7xKxwEj3Y9PWUvqGVwNHzRwl0dicf6E1KgcqV740SbDvspGty7bgGXhg_9sC6zUQZFE6iW3mKg2zeV7cUuSCB3xZ9TXqhcTlwPovZPoq9PrfllQmVAlvGLXsHvIrjUHTFe5OhGr6dLFH_DA%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl2JMfRA_MXxKe5Qa1mVfx9vL7N-pP0Bu2ma06DquKUmEApUfL13k-Szo4HOMcHgP4Yj5VQbiC6xEHgXCgur5xA9XYbvk_TPT8M4O62TjQpzJwEXVhIV5P7I6_RGfJ7uVR1u_MqtVe0b2IfwzgJLAcPaFFOsOduQ_80lX1cUA-XF-N9-gu8fxAm9p5HOZfCabvg%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c5cb2fd9a308464796f7291aaeb1c4e0&_e=V_PUaF6T9lJqaaFTrGRtl2iYKAgCZW55aNs2rSWYcav9Nkq2VEM5D78rPCGlFs075wSqsxKXXxmClHqEYK_8z_T1hoV6fJn3XPcGDSdNrRKAs1swlbK-OAySfgn8wqCwS6OHZEyCPV5mI1pD0-VppV-2TME3nJfusIF-vVEeOh3u5eqdeROSXa8mzRzmO2yowBeCFWstiaEjkgkd1dZ9_DURRTUyrdIXAjsY9h5ZPMA%3D)

name: James Carville via Blue Amp Action
subject: I’ll give it to you straight
body:
Jacky Rosen urgently needs your help.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2ce9506-ae44-48e3-a0c7-d7c37253be7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1e8b19d-89a6-4442-af4c-f495448c6522/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’ve got a BIG problem in Nevada, Peter. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat Sen. Jacky Rosen – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control. The GOP is going ALL IN on Jacky as a top target for defeat. I just got word that she needs to raise $10,000 by midnight to keep her reelection campaign on track to fight back against the GOP’s attacks – but she’s nowhere near close. [So I’ve got to ask you, Peter: Will you rush $10 or more right now – split between Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action – to make sure Jacky wins Nevada’s battleground race and defends our Demo](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2dd71ed-de03-4fdd-966f-a5e97c34b0da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26b872cf-f000-4479-994d-c1d878ac5672/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Look, I’ll give it to you straight: Democrats barely won Nevada’s Senate race last year. After McConnell and his cronies flooded the race with over $55 million, his extremist candidate came within 7,928 votes of flipping that seat red – which is less than a single percentage point. Now, Jacky’s race is shaping up to be neck and neck, too. With The Washington Post calling her one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this election AND a recent poll showing her already TWO POINTS DOWN, it’s going to be a tough race to win. Unless folks like you come through with the grassroots support Jacky needs to pull ahead, Democrats will likely lose Nevada AND the Senate. Facts are facts. name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8kmzuLtqwU5AejXtNUODvA&sysid=1)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8kmzuLtqwU5AejXtNUODvA&sysid=1)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8kmzuLtqwU5AejXtNUODvA&sysid=1)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8kmzuLtqwU5AejXtNUODvA&sysid=1)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29554%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aR%2bcYYYzCw0D31V9nETe3Q&sysid=1)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8kmzuLtqwU5AejXtNUODvA&sysid=1)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
|
---
****
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8kmzuLtqwU5AejXtNUODvA&sysid=1)
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662023%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=prpyYImY3ZhYg6P4SyPgPQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662023%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=prpyYImY3ZhYg6P4SyPgPQ&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662024%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FQHAuof8XqcoOf4CwiOnqA&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662035%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1W1a9TGSGC3SWOONaLvbwA&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662036%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RMssOd5j362W0qACW5%2b%2byA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662037%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GGQqv5yccO2h4CrKIq5SnA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662038%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zzmGVlW4nhiRljb9SjInuQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662039%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V%2fMQ1NwYKq8rGz%2fW5lY6qw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662030%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JcgomQDbWO%2fWuXdrOIcy7A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662031%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vv2WhC%2b%2bFU62UJqjHLATuA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662032%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KAtpFt%2blu8zfw0B6otcoTQ&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662033%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ih2bxJgsRrlpWV0vSpk6Cw&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662034%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jl6EtL88dReqpvQ%2b646Q0Q&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662045%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SeS6Ojsav4RUscIXQ%2fat3g&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662046%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N%2f2r%2btHNktIizSXxxCiSpQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
I need you to read every word of this email. | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ae5004dc333c4610b6f3689489ad5201&_e=Phv0ql-S8fF5joD6vCw-Xaq3V89UxxyuXKqK65m25tR-s8XkWZsQEopI8CbBJNDNVa89eUFdpQb_QmEtgdWmRmDbyq6WjiAHsnYgkuf4YJZFPQRWmzessKeSDZEEvrM1Imd08ImlGaQPSzwb0_sbqSKXMDfpG-vzGUjKVTOW8GzhFXpyD3Gp07X9UmutR6s6biJFLNz9nvvEYKCgSMyMrS52HyhQ9DLzBd1avNRz4pIJ2SS5-7yDrm3hYItcVmjJV_I-q0E0ei0l0HnZpL81b73CCtNXbN7cLL-Fk3Wz8uWKjAWsot4XFbsgISSP3rWvHf-t_fYZDOuBcyXSEi024ChpHnyb99kFRaefDWuNxrLJgKgq52vDZAubKrB7U-XAx2d1fw0QvPcNl6HS6VX4JeGoHkRTI_6BqfBiMPeJVK4%3D)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life – America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ae5004dc333c4610b6f3689489ad5201&_e=Phv0ql-S8fF5joD6vCw-Xaq3V89UxxyuXKqK65m25tR-s8XkWZsQEopI8CbBJNDNVa89eUFdpQb_QmEtgdWmRmDbyq6WjiAHsnYgkuf4YJZFPQRWmzessKeSDZEEvrM1Imd08ImlGaQPSzwb0_sbqSKXMDfpG-vzGUjKVTOW8GzhFXpyD3Gp07X9UmutR6s6biJFLNz9nvvEYKCgSMyMrS52HyhQ9DLzBd1avNRz4pIJ2SS5-7yDrm3hYItcVmjJV_I-q0E0ei0l0HnZpL81b2I8YcMne2aaRLPC-kefVbWUqHQ9C63qo7cDQrJq6u1qzBTKNZfT3QXRTGHIlnnWPoTfG1aCYv9uEYZEfpq5nTlLOkPmBXxyKD-EOzvTWNGc3u06dkYskbESnD6lLqqjq1gxC2lLSHpR-E5wBQMk4UE%3D)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT - DONATE TODAY**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ae5004dc333c4610b6f3689489ad5201&_e=Phv0ql-S8fF5joD6vCw-Xaq3V89UxxyuXKqK65m25tR-s8XkWZsQEopI8CbBJNDNVa89eUFdpQb_QmEtgdWmRmDbyq6WjiAHsnYgkuf4YJZFPQRWmzessKeSDZEEvrM1Imd08ImlGaQPSzwb0_sbqSKXMDfpG-vzGUjKVTOW8GzhFXpyD3Gp07X9UmutR6s6biJFLNz9nvvEYKCgSMyMrS52HyhQ9DLzBd1avNRz4pIJ2SS5-7yDrm3hYItcVmjJV_I-q0E0ei0l0HnZpL81b5QDhwHTDumk3cAKyB9VMsE8oQp8ciSZ1ULDvvZr9dAJrqYKk01eDnq-Zlc-2fxZhgy9iH_-yOz-iuOxFFYURuKeVUuLT5u9y4-7304cEEgOVwhFUTORgrM7JOenMf45GHPO0AYRhjEQglSkWf6Rujc%3D)
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ae5004dc333c4610b6f3689489ad5201&_e=Phv0ql-S8fF5joD6vCw-Xaq3V89UxxyuXKqK65m25tR-s8XkWZsQEopI8CbBJNDNVa89eUFdpQb_QmEtgdWmRmDbyq6WjiAHsnYgkuf4YJZFPQRWmzessKeSDZEEvrM1Imd08ImlGaQPSzwb0_sbqSKXMDfpG-vzGUjKVTOW8GzhFXpyD3Gp07X9UmutR6s6biJFLNz9nvvEYKCgSMyMrS52HyhQ9DLzBd1avNRz4pIJ2SS5-7yDrm3hYItcVmjJV_I-q0E0ei0l0HnZpL81b_KM174UGapHDScpqMvgbAckp9AB6fm7xHK4KE66WqZ_C4aeAc6kKgbZQ0fvidFmbUzIjnr3UAFfa0GNAA5hzHyh-iAqcMDLqfEjNOwWBqFW-2qS39ejX1ACNa0BGq7sIkFLKuf1QiEr_8hYzZgS4Ao%3D)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ae5004dc333c4610b6f3689489ad5201&_e=Phv0ql-S8fF5joD6vCw-Xaq3V89UxxyuXKqK65m25tR-s8XkWZsQEopI8CbBJNDNVa89eUFdpQb_QmEtgdWmRmDbyq6WjiAHsnYgkuf4YJZFPQRWmzessKeSDZEEvrM1Imd08ImlGaQPSzwb0_sbqSKXMDfpG-vzGUjKVTOW8GzhFXpyD3Gp07X9UmutR6s6biJFLNz9nvvEYKCgSMyMrS52HyhQ9DLzBd1avNRz4pIJ2SS5-7yDrm3hYItcVmjJV_I-q0E0ei0l0HnZpL81b4jruQdPL7TfeFbW4B6NeavI-R0N7gv1icnHZG_YKtWQcY138MFPdwZ6SOLo8OENfnYXKi-5H0BL8zBFClCe_8Z36RMKQgdRHwjskvoH83xxR5BVNNU36Og3kssvF1TIhiO3B4bs6BK2rQiQhTsUbRo%3D)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=ae5004dc333c4610b6f3689489ad5201&_e=Phv0ql-S8fF5joD6vCw-Xaq3V89UxxyuXKqK65m25tR-s8XkWZsQEopI8CbBJNDNVa89eUFdpQb_QmEtgdWmRmDbyq6WjiAHsnYgkuf4YJZFPQRWmzessKeSDZEEvrM1Imd08ImlGaQPSzwb0_sbqSKXMDfpG-vzGUjKVTOW8GzhFXpyD3Gp07X9UmutR6s6biJFLNz9nvvEYKCgSMyMrS52HyhQ9DLzBd1avNRz4pIJ2SS5-7yDrm3hYItcVmjJV_I-q0E0ei0l0HnZpL81bya7ij9gFZIdmsuS6CPtWhe6kZNO-CRxEUSyTOy2BTpIhdtPZTYvzvwbGf9qjIwP-ahiO1NEZwisN88FSAV-251MQpzFkqMJtKgN5UMbqniGh6UpZXRTAVy7be9DhChUS-8M7XDbJzynX-GjlIrL6Tc%3D)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,

clean_body: I need you to read every word of this email. | | | Knock, Knock, Knock. This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country. My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life – America. My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that. We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities. I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia. But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different... It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon. Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones. In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability. We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny. I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values. I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families. We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them. Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish. I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter. Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us. name: Hung Cao
subject: Knock knock knock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zob00d8ue8vi667treqdvo2p084ivi6vb7mt03l8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm8p30sph2bs)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za98qpo902lpcetd91offq1vckj8ho7mb9h86sao_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm8p30sph2bs)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqm0vj9u83ks9lll92gokhhbictv3g4r1u9bkjho_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm8p30sph2bs)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zadmf91qljni0m8sjbuhlm1ql6vg1hv6ruldp74g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm8p30sph2bs)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z72kqqfci8i1qs0iprj5hp9hm0c98pef3oi849l8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm8p30sph2bs)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi60jjfui91orgtidijgmbi9our6galbc8nei23g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm8p30sph2bs)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---

---

name: Ralph Northam
subject: The Democratic Party of Virginia needs our help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_mLQPfcuUqxrkesFS0FjqLPajF_xdfUv0vSLqb6yJKY=/110WeyXwn3X5TV5lE6kJxQd_XXggbvc3PjaZ44CGitk=?refcode=202307)
---
Friend, It is with great urgency that I'm reaching out to you today. I know you remember the joy Virginia Democrats shared in 2019 when we won back the General Assembly for the first time in over twenty years. I also know you shared in my despair when the Virginia GOP managed to win back control of the House of Delegates and the Executive Mansion two years ago. Once again, all 140 seats in the General Assembly are on the ballot. And, once again, we must come together as Virginia Democrats to take back the House of Delegates and strengthen our majority in the State Senate. We've proven time and again that, _when we elect Democrats, good things happen._ Look at all we did during my time as Governor: we passed Medicaid Expansion, made historic investments in rural broadband and improving Interstate 81, expanded voting rights, protected the rights of our LGBTQ+ citizens, abolished the death penalty, legalized marijuana, and raised the minimum wage - all while making Virginia the best place to do business for two years straight. But our work isn't done. All of our progress is on the line this November. That's why I need you to stand with me in supporting the Democratic Party of Virginia's efforts to protect everything we accomplished together. [**Will you please consider splitting a donation of $25 or whatever you can do between the Democratic Party of Virginia and The Way Ahead today? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/_mLQPfcuUqxrkesFS0FjqLPajF_xdfUv0vSLqb6yJKY=/KRh2LXsmZi1_Dn1A0yz0hyGpgBUJ6mpImT6OqrZ_kjc=?refcode=202307) We're pooling all of our resources together to take back the General Assembly, and right now I can think of no effort more deserving of our support. Together, we will win back our Commonwealth. Sincerely, Dr. Ralph S. Northam 73rd Governor of Virginia

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_mLQPfcuUqxrkesFS0FjqLPajF_xdfUv0vSLqb6yJKY=/110WeyXwn3X5TV5lE6kJxQd_XXggbvc3PjaZ44CGitk=?refcode=202307) Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/_mLQPfcuUqxrkesFS0FjqLPajF_xdfUv0vSLqb6yJKY=/Wm6epkCNN8n5m_3mk61qdnTDOUTCnXJOBNQ-g9GjXko=) |

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: I almost lost died defending the Capitol on January 6th...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Mark Lamb declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230720-1-f&t=1&akid=826%2E734936%2EDhCTn_)
---
Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired by far-right leaders like Sheriff Mark Lamb.
Mark Lamb recently declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
I am writing because inciting, cheering, and making excuses for an attack on our democracy should not be a prerequisite or credential to be in Congress or any position of trusted authority.
But that is part of Mark Lamb’s claim to fame. It’s why he can credibly run for U.S. Senate against Ruben.
So I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help elect Ruben. To help send a message that we cannot allow insurrectionist-cheerleaders to get into the United States Senate.
So please:
[**Can you make today the day you make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230720-1-f&t=2&akid=826%2E734936%2EDhCTn_)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230720-1-f&t=3&akid=826%2E734936%2EDhCTn_)
Mark Lamb says the insurrections were “very loving, Christian people.”
I can assure you they were not spreading the word of God as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how Christian and loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed.
I wonder how Christian and loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield.
But Mark Lamb doesn’t even have the courage to stand up for law enforcement officers injured or killed on duty that day. When asked about us, he said he wasn’t there and couldn’t say what was true or not.
I am going to do everything I can to help elect my friend Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking:
[**Can you contribute to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today? Use this link to give whatever you can afford to make sure he defeats Mark Lamb and anyone who runs against him in this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230720-1-f&t=4&akid=826%2E734936%2EDhCTn_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-july23.s7nZFC&refcode=em230720-1-f&t=23&akid=826%2E734936%2EDhCTn_)**
---
****

---
****

clean_body: Mark Lamb declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego. Peter - My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired by far-right leaders like Sheriff Mark Lamb. Mark Lamb recently declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego. I am writing because inciting, cheering, and making excuses for an attack on our democracy should not be a prerequisite or credential to be in Congress or any position of trusted authority. But that is part of Mark Lamb’s claim to fame. It’s why he can credibly run for U.S. Senate against Ruben. So I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help elect Ruben. To help send a message that we cannot allow insurrectionist-cheerleaders to get into the United States Senate. So please: Mark Lamb says the insurrections were “very loving, Christian people.” I can assure you they were not spreading the word of God as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how Christian and loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed. I wonder how Christian and loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield. But Mark Lamb doesn’t even have the courage to stand up for law enforcement officers injured or killed on duty that day. When asked about us, he said he wasn’t there and couldn’t say what was true or not. I am going to do everything I can to help elect my friend Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you very much, Aquilino Gonell Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

Fellow Conservative,

I’m grateful for the opportunities that our nation has given me. With hard work, I was able to start my own business, employ other veterans just like me, and live the American dream with my family.

But I felt the pull to serve again - this time in the United States Senate. **That’s why I am running. **

[**WATCH NOW
**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afda90439cad4eebbf36a1e53c108b45&_e=aEtDVEk9YIBkmM-cWiTg6l7OzMJT5U0fuOz-8JGqqCFOG2-LQBgc3jQhKknaEcFjjR29DBYQHHqqNQXgku5bQjJwd2RpOc_lg7L3lOilbMFaBmo-FCm3lumq4TNNYjQbU4RKrRu0p5SvB76UAj8cka3EU5lfSR4kvHMLbrKqbWCvyP5CofS9DkY0O6hNezGw6_Ynjc_xACnZylM94o7LhRn1-B0ngGzr9UZgUGZs2AmeHo1lM9cGq0PJkEbGooPyprZUj4LZoyTidA6RJTboMDum7kzREsOMMURcw8X5FhDbAYBgcqTqTCtCtNg8g8kDKxuc-Yfate0kc8dtWm5yWjzHaWCvlabSPtq9f90h7RarOgMHLiNzl3Kma7CTHOauF7ZNo0cmYa5wGqdXHEx0RQC-56G0i6yVbN8ws08boqY%3D)

[**JOIN THE MISSION
**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afda90439cad4eebbf36a1e53c108b45&_e=aEtDVEk9YIBkmM-cWiTg6l7OzMJT5U0fuOz-8JGqqCFOG2-LQBgc3jQhKknaEcFjjR29DBYQHHqqNQXgku5bQjJwd2RpOc_lg7L3lOilbMFaBmo-FCm3lumq4TNNYjQbU4RKrRu0p5SvB76UAj8cka3EU5lfSR4kvHMLbrKqbWCvyP5CofS9DkY0O6hNezGw6_Ynjc_xACnZylM94o7LhRn1-B0ngGzr9UZgUGZs2AmeHo1lM9cGq0PJkEbGooPyDdgnyMZ-EUuIvlfUjjbn0pnw5W6myN5wEAoWbR0fuW6MqD9ElyCk1LQoqjhzxj7Ol0o7I2LmBDnzz7xfnUTpk4_udLJf5qRwezmLkZOk99WMVe8KvLyIIzjCne3kjc83ZTk3HP0xsL3IOctY4ei8SpBfsdFiKrOgLj2h0StUPlI%3D)

American citizens are facing tough decisions right now. We’re dealing with a crisis at our border, inflation has a stranglehold on our families, and we must fix our education system.

**We have some serious challenges facing our nation. We need serious people to solve them.**

When I was asked to serve - it was a serious decision to do so - **but when your country calls and needs you, you MUST answer. **

Fellow Conservative,**[now I ask you to join this fight with me.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=afda90439cad4eebbf36a1e53c108b45&_e=aEtDVEk9YIBkmM-cWiTg6l7OzMJT5U0fuOz-8JGqqCFOG2-LQBgc3jQhKknaEcFjjR29DBYQHHqqNQXgku5bQjJwd2RpOc_lg7L3lOilbMFaBmo-FCm3lumq4TNNYjQbU4RKrRu0p5SvB76UAj8cka3EU5lfSR4kvHMLbrKqbWCvyP5CofS9DkY0O6hNezGw6_Ynjc_xACnZylM94o7LhRn1-B0ngGzr9UZgUGZs2AmeHo1lM9cGq0PJkEbGooPyDrTfISyZgnL04o69SSeVCusTJeUTizjiDmo4QwvCeP0ncUr-OLGOyuLcZCOr_QxqAtcehGNdwxVXhi_3qzqzFGakwzivqj8iThfB3U8I2tAONh30k1LelZg9t3ZfKIfVcLf4jLsSaL5vS0YGVeEfkY-omks_2a9wAydhJqmK_T0%3D) **

name: Green Beret Frank LaRose
subject: Maybe I set my expectations too high.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaRose for Senate
body:
Maybe my words just fell on deaf ears.
Maybe my words just fell on deaf ears.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr79cacng84dtjppd9id0rnu95iaigk6o0oav7k8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm4ob2c5h2bs)
---

Maybe my words fell on deaf ears.

Maybe I just set my expectations too high.

I was confident that more Americans who are TIRED of seeing career politicians destroy our country would have stepped up. But it hasn't happened yet.

Friend, this is Frank LaRose - **Green Beret & strong Christian conservative. I just announced my candidacy for the most IMPORTANT Senate race in the country.**

I reached out recently humbly asking for YOUR support as I work to fire Biden's personal puppet & 47-year politician, Sherrod Brown, & **help the Republican Party take back the Senate.**

Biden & Democrats are counting on you to ignore this race. They can't stand the fact that I'm a proud Christian conservative & veteran, and they're raising millions to silence my announcement.

People think they have to write huge checks to make a difference. But I'm here to tell you that every last dollar counts - _even just $10 or $20 bucks goes a long way._

**[So, I'm humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu7cf8jn9miofa3iqkd64qmg8dponh4vlhs1ig90_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm4ob2c5h2bs "So, I’m humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.")**

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z22199e674kjt7dmckp3rntuhgjvt9voslhe9q00_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm4ob2c5h2bs)
---

Look, I'm a decorated war veteran, father & husband - so I'm not the kind of person who asks for help unless it's absolutely necessary.

So please, Friend, before the end of the day, will you stand with me?

---
| | [STAND WITH FRANK LAROSE](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkoa0007g2oq2phcmsb6td8j8547ork8nce6vl0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm4ob2c5h2bs)
---

Thanks & God bless,

Frank

---

---
| | **Friend >> BEFORE YOU GO!**

[Can you chip in a monthly recurring $5 donation and become a founding member of Frank's campaign?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zta781j9gqd65jsah07m1mon9h1gjj9qits0ueao_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm4ob2c5h2bs "Can you chip in a monthly recurring $5 donation and become a founding member of Frank’s campaign?")

If we're going to take back the Senate from extreme liberal politicians like Sherrod Brown, it starts with WINNING THIS RACE.

_**But in order to do that, we need a HUGE coalition of grassroots patriots like YOU to step up. Sherrod Brown has already raised over $8 MILLION in 2023, and we need to catch up FAST.**_

So please, please, please: Can we count on you to step up today?
| | [Chip in a monthly recurring $5 donation to help Frank win this race & take back the Senate >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjhtu5q4o008aahtadoe1kji6i184nppu2da0sa0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm4ob2c5h2bs)

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662150%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I9Jzq5rhGAOgHSo5vOUvIQ&sysid=1 "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it’s Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I’ve ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662151%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6areG5VJPE2Sq6VSkJuySg&sysid=1 "I have three urgent
matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662152%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZxcahK30Zv6HG4kaxV8L1w&sysid=1 "So here it goes: our House
Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.
Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim
House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662153%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6o5ZtX8uuj%2b5KFvGt475ig&sysid=1)[**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662154%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3fN%2bxoj%2beu1VXwILqFC%2b0A&sysid=1) _[**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662165%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mQvYc8hRLsW7ciHPT9ZXKg&sysid=1)**
---
Look, I don’t like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That’s why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662166%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u%2bX5HXJw4nQdwHf3to0i9Q&sysid=1 "Here’s my plan: I set a
goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five
or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we’ll catch up just in time before our June deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We’ve stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662153%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6o5ZtX8uuj%2b5KFvGt475ig&sysid=1)[**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662154%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3fN%2bxoj%2beu1VXwILqFC%2b0A&sysid=1) _[**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c662165%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mQvYc8hRLsW7ciHPT9ZXKg&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---

clean_body: This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. | | | | | | "Kellyanne Conway" Hey there, it’s Kellyanne... "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:" 1. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL June deadline?" Look, I don’t like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC. They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. That’s why this email is especially important. "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." If everyone reading this gives that much, we’ll catch up just in time before our June deadline. YOU are key to my goal. We’ve stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you? Thanks for all you do for freedom. - Kellyanne Conway * | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:
I want to share with you my hand-picked list of judicial appointments I'd make as President of the United States.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=28e073c4f0064948af466b761593f6b3&_t=kz_rnMcABxMdyuBmMiKuAN6jzD3_4RI1besUBnlAfRsLbWHKI6fqILlgPTT9Up-INcCdiqhSOSS5oEFE5X7eqfLQSWWK7_VA2QVoxIpT-T4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=28e073c4f0064948af466b761593f6b3&_t=kz_rnMcABxMdyuBmMiKuAN6jzD3_4RI1besUBnlAfRsLbWHKI6fqILlgPTT9Up-INcCdiqhSOSS5oEFE5X7eqfLQSWWK7_VA2QVoxIpT-T4%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=28e073c4f0064948af466b761593f6b3&_e=YdLUZuTpENrQTbcSVkD-grdVoOF0pcRVzqY1wZlFX_cN3PR0rHNK-sUk-hpo1MSOarW6QIvgWeR8kGn8Urv2IyEZ5JlqmWsXjQTXl4XLfELgR7B06yH1UIpJuhcmsUho-bnyMzQijVHWkmW4jgvDxg45oAfVTiuhnhmMGL-2Evj1XQG2u10MQjgRLLsag8YFI102aO6nOkbiuxOM3sXaKFnLnYNUtj7ppn4vey-JJGg_oYuEuBAcwkEF5bhlpx3mnYzYAHZ8dG-VWrFTjaJcldPuHWuh0ytJ9hPnSNXlUwo4WTbiZH-sMrHljBrM0hUY5tG3v3qhCSbXwygfTWdCvpuvo4BRBVTHf8_1MooWwUVVFkmj03exKBtuUa-nuMTVULPledLfOC8GzSm_S8ZCx_SqCx2zXHunGx7IMSTC9cQ%3D)
Fellow American,

A strong, constitutionally-minded judicial system is one of the pillars of American society.

Just this year, the Supreme Court was responsible for overturning affirmative action, protecting religious freedoms, and standing up to Biden’s outrageous plan for forgiving student debt.

Our courts remain the last line of defense against the overreach and weaponization of the federal government. That’s why I’ve already announced by hand-picked lists of Judicial appointments for the U.S Supreme Court and federal Courts of Appeals.

_**Take a look at the list below:**_

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=28e073c4f0064948af466b761593f6b3&_e=YdLUZuTpENrQTbcSVkD-grdVoOF0pcRVzqY1wZlFX_cN3PR0rHNK-sUk-hpo1MSOarW6QIvgWeR8kGn8Urv2IyEZ5JlqmWsXjQTXl4XLfELgR7B06yH1UIpJuhcmsUho-bnyMzQijVHWkmW4jgvDxg45oAfVTiuhnhmMGL-2Evj1XQG2u10MQjgRLLsag8YFI102aO6nOkbiuxOM3sXaKFnLnYNUtj7ppn4vey-JJGg_oYuEuBAcwkEF5bhlpx3mnYzYAHZ8dG-VWrFTjaJclXxHFDVhmMGj1xTLEyOfs7XelS3AHE1An1ivSwlA64EYvsKT3IAVEUT68fX8O2EOztF8HTIAU0h1aY4J-ysAgNtEEWBhzoyh1tqUeDXeCp4Rj720ZZvtPAV4bIcMy0cwaEHhWqzoeO9K-nrI9yD1N34%3D)
Joe Biden might be more concerned with the race and gender of his judicial nominees, but my sole criterion was to select candidates with an unwavering commitment to an originalist understanding of the United States Constitution.

**As President I will appoint judges who will protect the integrity of our constitutional Republic. And I will do it without apology.**

Fellow American, I will continue to be transparent when it comes to these important decisions I must make as president. **[If you like the direction, can I count on your support today? Even $5 will help make sure Americans can hear our message!](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=28e073c4f0064948af466b761593f6b3&_e=YdLUZuTpENrQTbcSVkD-grdVoOF0pcRVzqY1wZlFX_cN3PR0rHNK-sUk-hpo1MSOarW6QIvgWeR8kGn8Urv2IyEZ5JlqmWsXjQTXl4XLfELgR7B06yH1UIpJuhcmsUho-bnyMzQijVHWkmW4jgvDxg45oAfVTiuhnhmMGL-2Evj1XQG2u10MQjgRLLsag8YFI102aO6nOkbiuxOM3sXaKFnLnYNUtj7ppn4vey-JJGg_oYuEuBAcwkEF5bhlpx3mnYzYAHZ8dG-VWrFTjaJclVY6R8YcN53oolQaFoyZqgt-xF50W06j4nWVKZ5qbx6yw_Y46Hdxqj1MvPRfI5N_wvVUs6IiBlDwzF7tIE0-ILndnE0uNgnXqDRfAQxI8VWDPpad-6zhT85r925y33ocsaxDwjN1lOwuEYxOypwJCRM%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=28e073c4f0064948af466b761593f6b3&_e=YdLUZuTpENrQTbcSVkD-grdVoOF0pcRVzqY1wZlFX_cN3PR0rHNK-sUk-hpo1MSOarW6QIvgWeR8kGn8Urv2IyEZ5JlqmWsXjQTXl4XLfELgR7B06yH1UIpJuhcmsUho-bnyMzQijVHWkmW4jgvDxg45oAfVTiuhnhmMGL-2Evj1XQG2u10MQjgRLLsag8YFI102aO6nOkbiuxOM3sXaKFnLnYNUtj7ppn4vey-JJGg_oYuEuBAcwkEF5bhlpx3mnYzYAHZ8dG-VWrFTjaJclVG-InWE_UiWKdUyk0UCA-JEpPpqpw4vB-d1UVQM--Abfh3HFjzeiqQArp85Eu9liVK3eP1bacIwFWmh2ql2goGSMdTQk-D9UD7W6A1ZneATz2pwI4Wb2kW0Kj4YklLDsMKi29QT4qfTt7LPN2apXg4%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** JOIN OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=28e073c4f0064948af466b761593f6b3&_e=YdLUZuTpENrQTbcSVkD-grdVoOF0pcRVzqY1wZlFX_cN3PR0rHNK-sUk-hpo1MSOarW6QIvgWeR8kGn8Urv2IyEZ5JlqmWsXjQTXl4XLfELgR7B06yH1UIpJuhcmsUho-bnyMzQijVHWkmW4jgvDxg45oAfVTiuhnhmMGL-2Evj1XQG2u10MQjgRLLsag8YFI102aO6nOkbiuxOM3sXaKFnLnYNUtj7ppn4vey-JJGg_oYuEuBAcwkEF5bhlpx3mnYzYAHZ8dG-VWrFTjaJclaVaNe6DHkyNAl4H2x_MGxe30buvkq86JZXCSUxwv3Qm9cy4305ChkRWl2yECpdvG7REKcW5T-_1t9jaqlvIEOTT1ryBtPmg1IQibga2JH3SWedzzz1GlNLHmFsIykfpDwSx9Un4vyuzpXmzTTZjEwU%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I want to share with you my hand-picked list of judicial appointments I'd make as President of the United States. | | Fellow American, A strong, constitutionally-minded judicial system is one of the pillars of American society. Just this year, the Supreme Court was responsible for overturning affirmative action, protecting religious freedoms, and standing up to Biden’s outrageous plan for forgiving student debt. Our courts remain the last line of defense against the overreach and weaponization of the federal government. That’s why I’ve already announced by hand-picked lists of Judicial appointments for the U.S Supreme Court and federal Courts of Appeals. Take a look at the list below: Joe Biden might be more concerned with the race and gender of his judicial nominees, but my sole criterion was to select candidates with an unwavering commitment to an originalist understanding of the United States Constitution. As President I will appoint judges who will protect the integrity of our constitutional Republic. And I will do it without apology. Fellow American, I will continue to be transparent when it comes to these important decisions I must make as president. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

you](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66752619/417473535/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230719Summer_N_TN_90DO_7_G_N_EBother&express_lane=true&amount=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzOTJmZjZlLWZmMjYtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zVtVgzTm1QsTrnDzYoTbtZImh4rqOWrEY22gcYTzd0=) In June, we celebrated Juneteenth and Pride across the Commonwealth. Regardless of the month, we celebrate Black culture and stand together in solidarity with members of the LGBTQIA+ community and continue to be committed allies in this fight for equal rights. And we are determined to continue to fight to elect municipal and local officials, along with a Supreme Court Justice, who will proudly represent our LGBTQIA+ community. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66752620/417473536/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230719Summer_N_TN_90DO_7_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzOTJmZjZlLWZmMjYtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zVtVgzTm1QsTrnDzYoTbtZImh4rqOWrEY22gcYTzd0=) **The good news:** On June 27, a Pennsylvania court rejected a lawsuit from GOP lawmakers seeking to strike down a 2019 law that established no-excuse mail-in voting. Every Pennsylvanian has the right to make their voice heard, and this confirmed the convenience for so many Pennsylvanians who can vote from the comfort of their home. Thankfully, in our key battleground state, mail-in voting remains protected.

**The bad news:** We were all heartbroken and disappointed by the U.S. Supreme Court’s Decision to strike down affirmative action. To the individuals who feel pain from this decision, our message is clear: We know Pennsylvania is at its best when we bring down barriers to ensure all of us can thrive, and we remain committed to doing our part to help make that happen. This also serves as a stark reminder of the importance of electing leaders who will prioritize appointing and confirming fair-minded federal judges and justices who share our vision and also value the impacted communities we center in our work.

**Moving forward:** As July wraps up, we’re preparing for back-to-school season, where we will be ramping up our voter registration efforts at colleges, universities, and even high schools ahead of the important General Election in November. Currently, our State Supreme Court has a Democratic majority, but looking ahead to 2025, three justices will be up for retention election, which means the upcoming judicial election in 2023 is CRITICAL!

[**The New Pennsylvania Project was founded to consistently engage Pennsylvanians year-round to expand the electorate centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth. We are out on the ground from McKeesport to Harrisburg, Chester City to Easton, Bensalem to Philadelphia, registering community members to vote and mobilizing these first-time voters to the polls for November and beyond. Chip in $25 right now to help us prepare for the November elections, where we have the chance to defend democracy at the polls. Thank you for your support.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66752621/417473537/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230719Summer_N_TN_90DO_7_G_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzOTJmZjZlLWZmMjYtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zVtVgzTm1QsTrnDzYoTbtZImh4rqOWrEY22gcYTzd0=)

In solidarity,

Team NPP | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._ _**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66752622/417473538/1465444750?refcode=EM_F_230719Summer_N_TN_90DO_7_G_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzOTJmZjZlLWZmMjYtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9zVtVgzTm1QsTrnDzYoTbtZImh4rqOWrEY22gcYTzd0=)**_

clean_body: We wanted to fill you in on what’s been happening so far: We wanted to fill you in on what’s been happening so far: = | Hey, We hope you’re having a great summer so far, filled with that PA summer sun, maybe a trip to Hershey Park, and quality time with family and friends. Here at the New Pennsylvania Project, we’ve been hard at work expanding the electorate, and we wanted to fill you in on what’s been happening so far: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In June, we celebrated Juneteenth and Pride across the Commonwealth. Regardless of the month, we celebrate Black culture and stand together in solidarity with members of the LGBTQIA+ community and continue to be committed allies in this fight for equal rights. And we are determined to continue to fight to elect municipal and local officials, along with a Supreme Court Justice, who will proudly represent our LGBTQIA+ community. = The good news: On June 27, a Pennsylvania court rejected a lawsuit from GOP lawmakers seeking to strike down a 2019 law that established no-excuse mail-in voting. Every Pennsylvanian has the right to make their voice heard, and this confirmed the convenience for so many Pennsylvanians who can vote from the comfort of their home. Thankfully, in our key battleground state, mail-in voting remains protected. The bad news: We were all heartbroken and disappointed by the U.S. Supreme Court’s Decision to strike down affirmative action. To the individuals who feel pain from this decision, our message is clear: We know Pennsylvania is at its best when we bring down barriers to ensure all of us can thrive, and we remain committed to doing our part to help make that happen. This also serves as a stark reminder of the importance of electing leaders who will prioritize appointing and confirming fair-minded federal judges and justices who share our vision and also value the impacted communities we center in our work. Moving forward: As July wraps up, we’re preparing for back-to-school season, where we will be ramping up our voter registration efforts at colleges, universities, and even high schools ahead of the important General Election in November. Currently, our State Supreme Court has a Democratic majority, but looking ahead to 2025, three justices will be up for retention election, which means the upcoming judicial election in 2023 is CRITICAL! = In solidarity, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

subject: Chuck Rocha on Meet The Press
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# Chuck on Meet The Press
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear friends, We have some crucial updates to share with you, featuring our President and Founder, Chuck Rocha. Firstly, Chuck recently appeared on Meet The Press, where he highlighted the Democratic Party's shift away from effectively engaging blue-collar workers, resulting in a loss of voters to Trump.

Watch the interview here: [https://twitter.com/MeetThePress/status/1679953528150986763](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=4f0f41a320&e=b8f90417f9) In addition, we highly recommend reading the Politico article titled "Democrats Have a Man Problem. These Experts Have Ideas for Fixing It." Chuck is quoted in the article, providing valuable insights into the challenges Democrats face in connecting with regular working-class individuals who are simply trying to make ends meet.

Read the article here: [https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2023/07/16/democrats-masculinity-roundtable-00106105](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=f6e140ad49&e=b8f90417f9) At Solidarity Strategies, we are committed to empowering individuals and creating positive change. Chuck's expertise and perspectives serve as valuable resources for understanding the current political landscape. If you have any questions or would like to discuss these topics further, please don't hesitate to reach out. We value your feedback and engagement.
Best regards,
Roberto Nava Solidarity Strategies
