name: Will Hurd
subject: Quick Question: Are you voting?
body:
77% of Americans don't vote in primaries...| | | [Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_s=92d78df5bf9f4c16b6795cc316b7327c&_t=ZiDmKS6kG0EuO61kLYC0-Ig1_d4Sy4Cd1OKA92IN49byky5rEjKgPOzMO7-MjIla9XgX0cjyotRgsvP3EoWtt0i_cmAFrfuDfczhAVx7sIk%3D)

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqrenjs1so6h855ujpqhrn5kj8953p4mos8pp95g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdrvket0adc2o27nm25eceiul5qnhsgu7qnr6jfg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi3g9km3gbc0jin7r9bsth0km4mv5d392klcbi00_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaiuus3fkobinhqibbrrs305o1sciig3bao18pfg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjr6m3817u37jb2lceaj8fragfbg3m7crtfmgld0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztgiiatpe7qems9hb5akqs17o6lhb00du6n3731o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7bn7v6ios3mknisa96giifni1l3fgomniipq5gg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z44h4ejec16rr5pd2fbbr0dp9o0hulpbvlaqg110_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znclv7h8e3t550admqsihiq638p80lqonq8l7h78_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsae0gi15aar67mlmshtbj5bcob43av9vca6df4g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm2oj6c9h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

**Your support is critical in our fight to defend democracy and protect the integrity of our elections.**
**_The cliche here is true - hope for the best and plan for the worst. We’re planning for the worst, which is why I’m reaching out to you._**

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action:** ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Ten Truths, No Lies
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsmDF9XDNl

Vivek 2024

Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on
truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of
these facts.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osmDF9XDNl

Fellow American,

TRUTH. There's only one. Not
yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic
political climate where spin is all the Administrative state
knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to
say them:

God is real.
There are two
genders.
Human flourishing
requires fossil fuels.
Reverse racism is
racism.
An open border is no
border.
Parents determine the
education of their children.
The nuclear family is
the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
Capitalism lifts
people up from poverty.
There are three
branches of the U.S. government, not four.
The U.S. Constitution
is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

CHIP IN
IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH

America was founded on these
truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths,
our standing as a nation would mean nothing.

If you agree with these 10
TRUTHS, I need you on my team.

This is about more than a
campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Will you
join me today by chipping in $1 or more?

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

STAND WITH THE TRUTH

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Calling on all Moms, Dads, Grandparents - please read
body:
I have some bad news for you.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztnp9qqnragc6dbd0lkcam9tiemg6fl0b4g3j568_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

Hello Friend,

I have some bad news for you.

Washington, D.C. won't fix all our problems. **In fact, the swamp and politicians in D.C. can 't even stop overt socialist indoctrination from taking over schools across the country. **

Whatever they want to call it - Critical Race Theory or socialist curriculum - it's all the same. It's teaching kids that they live in an evil place and nothing short of a full cultural revolution can save the United States from "evil capitalism".

_It 's even being endorsed by the country's largest teacher union!_

There is one organization that gives me hope.

[I want to introduce you to the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE).](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk60tq5bhjap955t8ht46knp4u2t1f9fib7jke00_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs) FEE is equipping both high school and college students with the ideas of liberty - free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberty, and personal responsibility.

FEE helped defeat the ideas of communism during the cold war with their publication, _the Freeman_ , and advancing the written works of the great free-market thinkers like Hayek, Hazlitt, Mises, and others.

These days, FEE is a leader in effectively engaging, inspiring, and equipping young Americans to embrace and advance the ideas and principles of liberty.

One way, the Foundation for Economic Education accomplishes this is through their "FEE In the Classroom" program.

FEE in the Classroom workshops educate and inspire high school and college students on the core ideas and principles of free enterprise, limited government, entrepreneurship, and strong personal character--right in their classrooms where the Left has controlled for decades.

[In the past 12 months, FEE has taught over 55,000 students in our seminars. You can sponsor "FEE in the Classroom" by donating $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,00 or even more by clicking here >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3n0qcu37i2059fe0h9hcd7l6ep402d061pnmesg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)
[Donate >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr0mhqojn9f0nd22br89ekc2vronbedl2n056cvo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)
We cannot leave education to the Marxist professors.

I personally have kids and I know how valuable it is to teach liberty to the next generation.

Too often kids will ask - "why haven't I heard about these ideas before?" It's because they are actively being suppressed from our curriculum.

[I am asking for your IMMEDIATE support. Can you please send an urgent donation of $250, $100, $50, $25, or any amount you can generously afford? Click here to donate >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziv16tnnbjm4thsbcubsqc61tr3v43eshj0fnj1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles this fall semester!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5lvdq38aivdqruogcuechjo4jl1ki0edhblrac0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z33v5ipgmq0u9bu8l4n4qsi6br8a30sqinj3sg50_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

**_It 's no secret that woke teachers are trying to indoctrinate kids. Even with laws banning the teaching of CRT concepts, numerous teachers go on platforms like Facebook & TikTok to profess how they will still teach socialism to kids_.**

It's worrying that individual liberty, limited government, personal responsibility, and free markets are not given adequate time in classrooms. No law is going to change that immediately.

It's going to require us to expand pro-liberty programs to students. That's exactly where FEE in the Classroom succeeds where no politician is able to.

And no one knows the importance of pro-liberty lessons more than FEE's president Zilvinas Selinas. He grew up in Lithuania battling communism before proudly making America his new home.

How valuable is FEE in the Classroom? Let's just say I wish all of Congress were to take their seminars on liberty. Our country would be a completely different place.

[FEE is looking to raise $35,000 online to expand FEE in the Classroom to take on new demands from teachers concerned with socialism in schools. Stand with me and rush your support today:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqev5k66m34vej7lbc7g0q827nc0fgla71mk15rg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zufag0biccj4qqtsjc01qc6gs0556qncmupoksr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkle95jqpb174ul2vk5hhnbdpsghbl3a59ebf378_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpkdqecq4sno3vm9lg5mtgbsopi7irmkk92e3pfg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztlqelp51pt3ofldgqr4e8cf86nidd58j3u988gg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5st7nqnujif81icrd5prskv773hfv0q57hpu528_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2cdleqb90ccfhkvbsqmhe1aces424clfo5e3dto_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zst8arthqmefqn1a5ngp97i00759o5jap3ldogjg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>> ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkga7h881ctqmt0vqtvpnl9ig7adtt581l6p36s8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm6o36cph2bs)

If you are as concerned with the direction of the country as I am, then please help out FEE in the Classroom. This is a program that isn't going to politicians. It's going directly to programs that teach kids about the principles of liberty.

Too often conservatives and libertarians are focused on policy and elections. We desperately need more educational programs to offer alternatives to the woke nonsense being taught.

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

American Defense News

Handouts for wealthy families and favors to special interests while working families fall behind. But we can change that. Hoosier Democrats are fighting for an economy that uplifts the working class, strengthens our unions, and expands the middle class. **[Chip into our movement today to create good paying union jobs, invest in our local schools, and protect our environment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66757777/417492957/405560545?refcode=230719-Bottomup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmZhZTFkOC0wNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWqoxTEsZRaukkx8HMcs-MMt6ACRUbzQGNluq__87PM=)** Republican policies have made our state fall to the bottom of the rankings for quality of life, health outcomes, public education, and much, much more. **[We can change that — together. name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: D'Angelo Virgo joins NPP as Director of Programs; Rick Hicks promoted to lead Capital Region
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
Welcome D'Angelo and Congrats to Rick!
Graphic congratulating Rick Hicks and welcoming D'Angelo Virgo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Instagram%20Post%20Square%20%282160%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29_2.png]
NPP CEO Kadida Kenner is excited to announce the addition of D'Angelo Virgo and the promotion of Rick Hicks to the New Pennsylvania Project organizing team!
D’Angelo Virgo is the Director of Programs. A Philadelphia resident, he is an educator, campaign strategist and community organizer. He brings over a decade of grassroots and community organizing, civic education and a wealth of political knowledge.
D’Angelo has a Bachelors of Arts degree in Political Science from Millersville University and a Masters of Arts in International Relations from London Metropolitan University. A lover of music, he is also a classically trained violinist.
Rick Hicks is the new Regional Organizing Director for the Capital Region. Born and raised in Harrisburg, Rick is the proud father of five sons and has volunteered or worked as a program director in the Harrisburg community for more than three decades. Rick has worked on numerous successful campaigns in the city of Harrisburg, as well as running for Magisterial District Judge in 2011.
Rick is also a proud Marine Corps veteran who takes pride in serving his country, as well as his community.
Meet our entire team: https://www.newpaproject.org/npp-team/ [https://www.newpaproject.org/npp-team/] #ExpandTheElectorate #DefendDemocracy.
Tweet of the Week
Twitter screenshot promoting NPP's Social Media Giving Day fundraiser [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0107.jpg]
It's not too late to participate in our Social Media Giving Day fundraiser! Every dollar you donate helps us register more voters across Pennsylvania. To learn more about donating visit: NPP Social Media Giving Day Donation [https://secure.everyaction.com/6zznDAQRNkO-gIEx6vLbjQ2]
News You Can Use
Transgender Pennsylvanians struggle through the state's name change rules [https://www.phillyburbs.com/story/news/state/2023/07/11/pa-name-change-process-a-barrier-to-trans-people-reform-could-help/70385074007/?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
( Bucks County Courier Times)
A legal name change is inherently complicated, but the fees and complexities of the process in the commonwealth keeps tens of thousands of transgender and nonbinary Pennsylvanians like Davis from starting or finishing what can be a crucial step in their transition.
Freedom Caucus Chair Vows to Block Spending Bills From Floor if More Cuts Aren’t Made [https://themessenger.com/politics/freedom-caucus-chair-vows-to-block-spending-bills-from-floor-if-more-cuts-arent-made?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
(The Messenger)
Setting the stage for more internal strife, House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry, R-Pa., told The Messenger Monday he will obstruct floor debate over spending bills that do not contain deeper cuts.
U.S. House Republicans strip funding for Philly LGBTQ center [https://www.phillyvoice.com/congress-funding-philly-lgbtq-william-way-community-center/?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
(Philly Voice)
GOP members of the House appropriations committee put forth an amendment to strike funds earmarked for the William Way Community Center and LGBT Center of Greater Reading
How Philadelphia Kept Thousands of Tenants From Being Evicted [https://www.nytimes.com/2023/07/13/headway/philadelphia-tenants-eviction.html]
(The New York Times)
A pandemic-era program that forced landlords to try mediation in good faith with tenants if they owed less than $3,000 in back rent before evicting them has been wildly successful in Philadelphia—America’s poorest big city—in both keeping tenants in their homes and landlords receiving payment.
Pennsylvania, New Mexico secretaries of state interviewed as part of special counsel’s 2020 election interference probe [https://www.cnn.com/2023/07/14/politics/special-counsel-pennsylvania-new-mexico-2020-election/index.html?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
(CNN)
Pennsylvania Secretary of State Al Schmidt reportedly met with special counsel Jack Smith in March to discuss election-related issues, information that comes as Smith continues to investigate efforts to overturn the 2020 election.
Upcoming Events
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/HU_CS_TheRoots_1080x1080_FB_CarouselAd_Sponsors.jpg]
The New Pennsylvania Project will be out registering voters at The Roots concert on July 29th, as well as every concert in the series through September , at Harrisburg's Riverfront Park. If you'll be at any of the shows, make sure to stop by our table, check your voter registration status, and grab some FREE NPP swag!
Shows we'll be at are:
*
July
26th:
Jason
Isbell
and
the
400
Unit
*
July
29th:
The
Roots
*
Aug.
26th:
The

Sept.

To learn more about the concert series, click here [https://concertseries.harrisburgu.edu/summer-series/] .
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.

To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP

name: Giffords.org
subject: [SIGN ON] Show your support for universal background checks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Background checks save lives. That’s why we need to pass them at the federal level.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_july23/?source=em230720-1-15&refcode2=6168.3935704.PJEszT&akid=6168%2E3935704%2EPJEszT)
Team - background checks save lives.
According to new FBI data attained by gun violence news source _The Trace_ , enhanced background checks enacted in November 2022 have stopped hundreds of young adults who should not be able to buy a gun from obtaining one. This is all thanks to the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ that you and this team helped make a reality.
This is a huge first step, and one we should be extraordinarily proud of, but there’s still more we must do. Universal background checks are still key to ensuring that people who are legally prohibited from owning guns can’t access them via private sellers or other loopholes.
Enhanced background checks have already proved they can save lives. Now it’s time to take the next step, which is why we’re asking: [**Will you sign on today to join us in calling on Congress to pass universal background checks?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_july23/?source=em230720-1-15&refcode2=6168.3935704.PJEszT&akid=6168%2E3935704%2EPJEszT)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_july23/?source=em230720-1-15&refcode2=6168.3935704.PJEszT&akid=6168%2E3935704%2EPJEszT)**
Since our founding ten years ago, one of our main goals at GIFFORDS has been to pass universal background checks. This commonsense legislation would save countless lives across our country.
Let’s renew our call to action together and tell Congress we aren’t backing down in the fight to save lives from this senseless violence.
[**Click here to add your name in support of universal background checks >>**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_july23/?source=em230720-1-15&refcode2=6168.3935704.PJEszT&akid=6168%2E3935704%2EPJEszT)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_july23/?source=em230720-1-15&refcode2=6168.3935704.PJEszT&akid=6168%2E3935704%2EPJEszT)**
Thank you for your support of keeping our communities safe through universal background checks.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6168%2E3935704%2EPJEszT) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Background checks save lives. That’s why we need to pass them at the federal level. Team - background checks save lives. According to new FBI data attained by gun violence news source The Trace , enhanced background checks enacted in November 2022 have stopped hundreds of young adults who should not be able to buy a gun from obtaining one. This is all thanks to the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act that you and this team helped make a reality. This is a huge first step, and one we should be extraordinarily proud of, but there’s still more we must do. Universal background checks are still key to ensuring that people who are legally prohibited from owning guns can’t access them via private sellers or other loopholes. Enhanced background checks have already proved they can save lives. Now it’s time to take the next step, which is why we’re asking: Since our founding ten years ago, one of our main goals at GIFFORDS has been to pass universal background checks. This commonsense legislation would save countless lives across our country. Let’s renew our call to action together and tell Congress we aren’t backing down in the fight to save lives from this senseless violence. Thank you for your support of keeping our communities safe through universal background checks. \- The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Tom Fitton
subject: The Biden Administration is Teaching our Military Cadets to Hate America!
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers like you and me!
body:
We forced the release of stunning records from the U.S. Air Force Academy that address Critical Race Theory, as well as "white privilege" and Black Lives Matter.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Earlier this month, we forced the release of stunning records from the U.S. Air Force Academy that address Critical Race Theory, as well as "white privilege" and Black Lives Matter.
They included an "instructional" slide purporting to show "_Correlations between Republican Party Identification and Old-Fashioned Racism among White Americans_ " and another that states "_The U.S. too has a creation myth: The Declaration of Independence ..._"
Incredible...especially since this claptrap is paid for by taxpayers like you and me!
Believe me, Judicial Watch's release of these documents is creating a firestorm.
But there is _so much for more for us to do_ to expose and challenge the abuse of taxpayer dollars to promote this racist propaganda in our military and other public institutions.
[That’s why I am asking you to give us your support with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64240&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64240&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Judicial Watch is the _national leader_ in exposing the scandal of taxpayer funds being used to indoctrinate school children and others in racist propaganda.

We have _already_ forced the release of similar smoking-gun records and instructional materials from the U.S. Military Academy at West Point and the U.S. Naval Academy.

And now we have caught the Biden Defense Department red-handed fomenting racialism, racial separatism, and anti-white hatred among the rising leadership of the U.S. Air Force, too!

Our lawsuits against the Biden Defense Department show that it is using repackaged revolutionary Marxist propaganda to teach cadets how to hate America...the country we will count on them to defend!

**[That’s why your decision to give us your support today is so important.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64240&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64240&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Judicial Watch attorneys are pursuing a number of cases that touch on the madness of Critical Race Theory and other leftist programs and policies that divide Americans based on race, gender and sexual orientation. We're going after school districts, government agencies, politicians and bureaucrats who push this hateful revolutionary agenda.

Just like when we first exposed taxpayer-funded Critical Race Theory indoctrination in public school systems, our revelations about taxpayer-funded racist propaganda in the military academies are sparking a grassroots revolt and congressional investigations!

**Had it not been for Judicial Watch, the ugly truth about these taxpayer-funded programs in our military academies would have remained hidden from the American people.**

But backed by our loyal members, we demanded the truth.

We used federal and state Freedom of Information laws to demand teaching materials, emails, letters, transcripts, and notes regarding interactions between activists, academy faculty and administrators, and diversity consultants.

And when they refused our lawful open records requests, we sued them in federal court!

**[Now, we need your help to redouble our efforts to challenge government secrecy at all levels, and educate the American people about what we uncover.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64240&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64240&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Your donation today will help us continue to expose and challenge the Left's multi-front efforts to destroy our nation.

Thank you in advance for giving your support to Judicial Watch...it will make a real difference for America and our nation’s future!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64240&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

subject: REMINDER: An extraordinary NEGOP+ member opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Meet the first woman in U.S. history to successfully lead a presidential campaign | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12614971?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a1ba9a2bb7&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| In just one month, NEGOP+ members will have the opportunity to hear from a woman who made history while working on Donald J. Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.

**We are excited to organize this event for NEGOP+ members, as Nebraskans have a significant role to play as engaged voters in the Presidential primary election less than a year away!**

[**NEGOP+ Booster Club membership includes**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=87447a4e07&e=25844e23a8) a Booster Club Membership Card, a NEGOP+ Club Pin, free and discounted entry fees to NEGOP events, and a specialty Booster Club Item. This is a great time to kick-off your NEGOP+ membership with the opportunity to spend an evening with Kellyanne Conway!

**Event Details**
**Date:** August 18th
**Time:** 6:30 pm CT
**Location:** Divots Conference Center, 4200 West Norfolk Ave, Norfolk, NE 68701

**About Kellyanne Conway**
---
| |
---
Kellyanne Conway served as Campaign Manager of the come-from-behind victory of Trump-Pence 2016, making her the first woman in U.S. history to successfully helm a presidential campaign.

For nearly four years, Kellyanne served as Assistant to the President and Senior Counselor to the President at the White House, working on a range of issues affecting domestic and global policy.
---
| She is the Founder and former President of The Polling Company, Inc./WomanTrend a privately-held, woman-owned corporation she operated from 1995-2016.

She is one of the most quoted and noted pollsters on the national scene, having provided commentary on thousands of television shows on ABC, CBS, NBC, PBS, CNN, CNBC, MSNBC, HBO, Comedy Central, MTV, Fox News Channel, on the paid speaking circuit and for numerous radio shows and print stories. Throughout her multiple decades in market research, Kellyanne has provided primary research and advice for clients in all 50 states and has directed hundreds of demographic and attitudinal survey projects for statewide and congressional political races, trade associations, and Fortune 100 companies. Kellyanne is a “fully-recovered” attorney, licensed to practice law in four jurisdictions (Maryland, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and the District of Columbia). She holds a law degree, with honors, from George Washington University Law Center and completed her undergraduate studies at Trinity College and Oxford University.

Kellyanne has served on numerous boards and advisory councils. Her new business, KAConsulting, provides clients strategic advice, polling, and media training to corporate, political and nonprofit clients. Kellyanne is a Fox News Contributor. Her memoir, Here's The Deal, published in May of 2022, was a #1 New York Times bestseller. She is mom to four amazing teenagers.

**[Join NEGOP+ Today](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=523d89e517&e=25844e23a8)**
If you're not already a member, here's your perfect chance to become part of this impactful gathering of active Conservatives. Join the membership to ensure your place at this **Do Not Miss Event** , and stand alongside us as we strive to strengthen the Republican Party's influence in Nebraska!

---
| [BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8e9a2ac875&e=25844e23a8 "BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »")
---
| We greatly appreciate your continued support and eagerly look forward to your participation as we work together to uphold our shared values.
---
| Best Regards,

Eric Underwood
Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b01d655821&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871
[Add us to your address book](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=7bd9b0c6e1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=7bd9b0c6e1).
---

subject: Investing in our freedoms, our leaders, and the future of our nation

clean_body: We want to hear from YOU, Peter...Biden is lying through his teeth| | | Peter, Violent crime is skyrocketing, but the Biden Administration REFUSES to do anything about it. The Department of Justice seems more interested in than doing its job to protect everyday Americans from the crime crisis the Democratic Party has created. What an absolute disgrace. Peter, it’s obvious to anybody paying attention: Our team needs to know what real American voters like YOU think about this critically important issue. | | CRITICAL POLL QUESTION DO YOU AGREE THERE IS A TWO-TIERED JUSTICE SYSTEM IN AMERICA? | | Let’s not beat around the bush, Peter. Biden denies the government is being weaponized against his political enemies, but we think he’s lying through his teeth. Where do you stand, Peter? Thank you, NRSC HQ | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

The summer is heating up, but that doesn’t mean Mad and Team Dean are slowing down! I wanted to make sure you saw the latest coverage of some of Mad’s work around the country and at home in PA — take a look: **** The summer is heating up, but that doesn’t mean Mad and Team Dean are slowing down! I wanted to make sure you saw the latest coverage of some of Mad’s work around the country and at home in PA — take a look:

Madeleine joined _MSNBC’s_ Jonathan Capehart to discuss both the Judiciary Committee hearing with FBI Director Christopher Wray – where he faced attacks from House GOP leaders – as well as the ongoing WGA strike and the need for fair contracts for all workers. You can watch their entire conversation **[here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66761180/417505515/737777009?refcode=07202023_md_media_en_1&refcode2=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWViYzUwNC0wYzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTfroH2HdO-0PSKJDDNca-8zrDkivSMT4PqS3AFnWJ8=&emci=8b3ab90e-4f26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66761181/417505516/737777009?refcode=07202023_md_media_en_1&refcode2=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWViYzUwNC0wYzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTfroH2HdO-0PSKJDDNca-8zrDkivSMT4PqS3AFnWJ8=&emci=8b3ab90e-4f26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569) | | [ **WATCH HERE** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66761182/417505517/737777009?refcode=07202023_md_media_en_1&refcode2=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWViYzUwNC0wYzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTfroH2HdO-0PSKJDDNca-8zrDkivSMT4PqS3AFnWJ8=&emci=8b3ab90e-4f26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)

Mad recently visited Customs and Border Protection facilities on the southern border in El Paso, TX, with several other House Democrats. They were pleased to see much improved conditions for migrating families as well as those experiencing homelessness or struggling with substance use disorder. **[You can read more about the visit and the bipartisan border reform legislation, The Dignity Act, here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66761184/417505519/402452525?refcode=07202023_md_media_en_1&refcode2=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWViYzUwNC0wYzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTfroH2HdO-0PSKJDDNca-8zrDkivSMT4PqS3AFnWJ8=&emci=8b3ab90e-4f26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)** | [ **READ MORE** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66761185/417505520/402452525?refcode=07202023_md_media_en_1&refcode2=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWViYzUwNC0wYzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTfroH2HdO-0PSKJDDNca-8zrDkivSMT4PqS3AFnWJ8=&emci=8b3ab90e-4f26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)

Having lived in Glenside for nearly her entire life, Mad was proud to visit FarmerJawn Community Greenhouses in Elkins Park. The community at FarmerJawn is increasing access to healthy, nutritious food options for those living in food deserts by growing farm-fresh, organic produce right here in PA-04. **[Read more about Mad’s visit and FarmerJawn’s work here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66761187/417505522/671609744?refcode=07202023_md_media_en_1&refcode2=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWViYzUwNC0wYzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTfroH2HdO-0PSKJDDNca-8zrDkivSMT4PqS3AFnWJ8=&emci=8b3ab90e-4f26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)** | [ **READ MORE** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66761188/417505523/671609744?refcode=07202023_md_media_en_1&refcode2=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWViYzUwNC0wYzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTfroH2HdO-0PSKJDDNca-8zrDkivSMT4PqS3AFnWJ8=&emci=8b3ab90e-4f26-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=2aebc504-0c27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)

Also in Elkins Park, Madeleine spoke about the preservation of historic Lynnewood Hall:
“All of us are familiar with this grand mansion and estate in our community, and it is so exciting to see the start of the restoration of the historic Lynnewood Hall. **Its future as a hub for arts, culture, education, and outdoor space in Cheltenham is a tremendous win for Montgomery County.”**

Madeleine requested federal funds to support the rehabilitation of the La Mott Community Center, which shares grounds with Camp William Penn — once one of the largest federal training camps for Black troops during the Civil War. The center has also served as a polling location and a school throughout its storied history.

clean_body: The summer is heating up, but that doesn’t mean Mad and Team Dean are slowing down! I wanted to make sure you saw the latest coverage of some of Mad’s work around the country and at home in PA — take a look: ** The summer is heating up, but that doesn’t mean Mad and Team Dean are slowing down! I wanted to make sure you saw the latest coverage of some of Mad’s work around the country and at home in PA — take a look: Madeleine joined MSNBC’s Jonathan Capehart to discuss both the Judiciary Committee hearing with FBI Director Christopher Wray – where he faced attacks from House GOP leaders – as well as the ongoing WGA strike and the need for fair contracts for all workers. You can watch their entire conversation | | Mad recently visited Customs and Border Protection facilities on the southern border in El Paso, TX, with several other House Democrats. They were pleased to see much improved conditions for migrating families as well as those experiencing homelessness or struggling with substance use disorder. | Having lived in Glenside for nearly her entire life, Mad was proud to visit FarmerJawn Community Greenhouses in Elkins Park. The community at FarmerJawn is increasing access to healthy, nutritious food options for those living in food deserts by growing farm-fresh, organic produce right here in PA-04. | Also in Elkins Park, Madeleine spoke about the preservation of historic Lynnewood Hall: “All of us are familiar with this grand mansion and estate in our community, and it is so exciting to see the start of the restoration of the historic Lynnewood Hall. Its future as a hub for arts, culture, education, and outdoor space in Cheltenham is a tremendous win for Montgomery County.” | Madeleine requested federal funds to support the rehabilitation of the La Mott Community Center, which shares grounds with Camp William Penn — once one of the largest federal training camps for Black troops during the Civil War. The center has also served as a polling location and a school throughout its storied history. | Thanks for tuning in and catching up with us! name: Donald J. Trump
subject: URGENT: I RECEIVED A LETTER INFORMING ME. . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Stating I am the target of a GRAND JURY investigation

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhkghunk05hgpr6tu4fd6ln2ont94j5dgek0oujg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9p34c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
On Sunday night, while I was with my family, my attorneys gave me HORRIFYING news.
The deranged prosecutor with Biden’s Department of Justice sent a letter, stating that **I AM A TARGET OF THE JANUARY 6TH GRAND JURY INVESTIGATION.**
**They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT.**
Let me be perfectly clear: I DID NOTHING WRONG. I AM COMPLETELY INNOCENT.
This is just another vicious act of Election Interference on behalf of the Deep State to try and stop the Silent Majority from having a voice in your own country.
It’s quite the coincidence that this news comes JUST AFTER a series of polls show that all of our Republican opponents are LOSING BADLY to Crooked Joe Biden – and that I AM THE ONLY CANDIDATE projected to beat him in a free and fair election.
This letter also comes just after our FEC report revealed a TREMENDOUS number of small-dollar donors, proving that the _AMERICAN PEOPLE_ stand by our movement.
The Special Counsel’s office has already wasted $9 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money on never-ending witch hunts to try and destroy our movement – not to mention the $32 MILLION wasted in Mueller’s Russia, Russia, Russia witch hunt.
When I keep touring the country and hear voters tell me, “President Trump, you’re our only hope!” “President Trump, we NEED you back in the White House!” – I know that I could never stop fighting to save our country, no matter how vicious these witch hunts ever become.
**The fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

Our [**Hold The Line Headquarters**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=f5d7d3bfe3ac4006929409a06712dad5&_e=2J5jwSBLz43muySalJcJpPO9dlA5gHYGCtocM0d_UAY1UDoHHtYh3EQIyLqYxYwZOsqcAntqwRCzCCOmJ-C-MuYFhzF5juvTTH-JHmgGkdWKR0wUnqQhnoxrkMYFehe02GPcKIzBHdt6ZoS_2SZ43ugfedhvZWpJw3p6Gq_EvEzhAkQCH4vyKjtZTYjGUu_Mn8-cRdRSB-fByApvhJmyfdIO0830WbLeEJkWFoU9srlA97dCIUTv5iOOogCJqx4zh60va1BGv2BTgQzbdeVQ0Bz_WinGu23wvhF3vkNXe4vPhrnMuAEZxdNFVoF2tGCh), Camp Elah is our home base in that fight. name: Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi
subject: Our son, Raja
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[_**Hi, Peter! We’re Raja’s parents, Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi -- and we’re reaching out to tell you why we’re so proud of our son. We’d love it if you would read this whole email -- but if you’re short on time, will you chip in $14 to help us reach 507 grassroots donations for Raja before midnight? It would mean the world to him to have your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66762729/417510804/-1810142053?source=20230720_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTJhMTAxZS0wZTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HC7Q6Lx9OppOUonOA9y4iGpu6ZpTXCY6A-A2bshNG88=) Peter, our family comes from humble beginnings. We faced economic hardship when we first immigrated to the United States. But we worked hard to achieve the American Dream. And as parents, we couldn’t be more proud of Raja for helping others do the same. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66762730/417510805/-1810142053?source=20230720_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTJhMTAxZS0wZTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HC7Q6Lx9OppOUonOA9y4iGpu6ZpTXCY6A-A2bshNG88=) _Us with Raja in Washington!_
---
[_**Peter, our son has never taken anything for granted. Raja knows what it’s like to struggle. It’s why he works so hard to make sure every American has a shot to defy the odds just like he did. We know this in our hearts: Raja is exactly who we need in Congress. That’s why we’re stepping in for him today. So please, can we count on you to chip in just $14 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66762731/417510806/-1810142053?source=20230720_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTJhMTAxZS0wZTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HC7Q6Lx9OppOUonOA9y4iGpu6ZpTXCY6A-A2bshNG88=)
Peter \-- we’ll be frank with you.
Never in our wildest dreams did we think Raja would become a Congressman.
But we know that this extraordinary job comes with many challenges.
Between fighting against those who threaten our democracy to ensuring that people aren’t left behind by unfair systems, our son is doing so much for each and every one of us.
[_**So now, we’re doing what parents do: We’re stepping in and helping our son. We know it would mean the world to Raja to see 507 grassroots supporters step up in this moment. What do you say, Peter: Can you help Raja and chip in $14 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66762732/417510807/-1810142053?source=20230720_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTJhMTAxZS0wZTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HC7Q6Lx9OppOUonOA9y4iGpu6ZpTXCY6A-A2bshNG88=)
****[Chip in $14 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66762734/417510808/-1810142053?source=20230720_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTJhMTAxZS0wZTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HC7Q6Lx9OppOUonOA9y4iGpu6ZpTXCY6A-A2bshNG88=)****

The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0vbjvhp034p52gpj4a9rbksvuk0lkpbkmic4oig_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z40lj0e9dsv0k6br8bao06tp840f6bf4re4gk9no_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ot0aqjfl0j4a4tqj75a9dcp0985sm3ndkb6580_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlt7kc18u1iog9cs92492c9d6snrpuvmt6334ni0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zao3ighm725aibhb1lf14od1pbfndmtee73k7ct0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkpt4bibs4e30h7dt2fj12k1avum14s8kjkclfl0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrahf4gn8msgeibnqucrpu6n90unl6bidqoagts0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chj69pb7c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh0vpvsjuph8uvhimnaamn9b7uc8mrag4rsj9rjg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97fstfp08igjjejtns77bmoeqfu2h72luis296o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3jm9ob0c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is why I’m running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62979990:6RHb7GIVN:m:1:3299561967:8121DBB20BA40ACDC7C08234F18636A4:r)
---

Patriot,
You know that I am running for President of the United States to lead our Great American Comeback.**I 'm here to tell you why**.

In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. _**We chose facts over fear**_. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom.

Over the years, I've watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. **Decline is a choice**. **Success is attainable**. **And freedom is worth fighting for**.

That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults.
---
| | [Stand with me today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62979990:6RHb7GIVN:m:1:3299561967:8121DBB20BA40ACDC7C08234F18636A4:r)
---
It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed.
We will get it done. No excuses.

I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, **I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out**.
---
| | | | | [DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62979990:6RHb7GIVN:m:1:3299561967:8121DBB20BA40ACDC7C08234F18636A4:r)

We will get it done. I promise you that, and I have the track record to back it up.

Yours in Freedom,

Ron DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62979990:6RHb7GIVN:m:1:3299561967:8121DBB20BA40ACDC7C08234F18636A4:r)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited.
