clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, You know that I am running for President of the United States to lead our Great American Comeback.I 'm here to tell you why. In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. We chose facts over fear. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom. Over the years, I've watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults. | | It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed. We will get it done. No excuses. I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We will get it done. I promise you that, and I have the track record to back it up. Yours in Freedom, | Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection, holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. We PROVED the American People stand with the America First Movement. But just HOURS after our report was officially filed with the Federal Election Commission, my lawyers received a letter informing me that I am a TARGET of the January 6th Grand Jury Investigation. They gave me a very short time period of 4 DAYS to report to the Grand Jury, which almost always means an ARREST and INDICTMENT. Friend, this is the Left’s 2024 playbook... They see evidence of our campaign’s STRENGTH and Crooked Joe’s weakness, and they jump to INDICT yours truly! That isn't the America our Founding Fathers envisioned, Friend, it’s a Third World tin-pot dictatorship. But just like we proved our grassroots strength on our latest FEC report,NOW is our chance to show the Left that our America First Movement will NEVER bend the knee to tyranny. And remember, with a movement like ours — 75 MILLION Americans strong — all it takes is just $1 alongside your fellow patriots to prove just how strong we truly are. | | Thank you, Donald J. To put things in perspective – 1 in 3 women and 1 in 4 men have experienced some form of physical violence by a partner.

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zriq1ls829snsfd7abejs5oo53ca1rdi147ai440_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ge0pb4c1h2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpblu8g7c04gh1019tvsk6i6beu01ec3mb0orp0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ge0pb4c1h2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkpopc9fkclpr8mfq97jcpf1jo168udsb7bkpp40_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ge0pb4c1h2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8rlq3vpqd65lbk3ihvgblaf2p34do0ffs2i8b0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ge0pb4c1h2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhqcet6ffjcu9o64p81aaacc5hbhsc8u708p31eo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ge0pb4c1h2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zht3j0jo3f9iudr9u6a49o1bvff9m774lef0heng_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ge0pb4c1h2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Trump Train News

name: Burnett for Colorado
subject: It’s time to fire Lauren Boebert.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
Peter, it's hard to believe it, but Lauren Boebert has somehow reached a new low. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w8zT8YoakpOTqvvRJdDcrUetef6gBmypQp1DK2J8tyRg1Yg5SgjZ2_BckVZj4e4euMPLZjGu6fIx4wR4lYbf5nNtdENOGrzERZfibTNxsIZZcRWYh3zPpr7i0BwV6d7H5n7foGozqjsXlYoOY2ocgf4zTqvBUyiplRNi4lO9avmyUFQ30lOHpCIepcWca1pfYQqQlx8K42pG0e5E0B1SJ2QaOMrzAKeGioiRgb0f0Hj8yRqsUcF0u_xrc5aav1K6hzOripomQwVk1ZuvQJqRYzXNhbnM8uIsf-1Xo-_wkCk9yQ95OfiSZvcObTpXlIh7_vCixramhZ3wsXOUcXPmTur7FS08sjRXN6Eb6dLsvnKITWUB-4k2HqRTknCh7zLXkFHuZgwnScTxYWeba7X1ZOB_4edWDTb8r2_8a8AilFYg/3y1/6xXC_inxQtyZ8J48fdQTgg/h0/7S7dsI1TpUonWpWi3lVRKcrWlAKxJGm8yoAFSSBQOS8)
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w8zT8YoakpOTqvvRJdDcrUetef6gBmypQp1DK2J8tyRpE4ryhbBPWglX7Ci2KxEc9riHH_922hHoXWyMrZoxjokaiUqRFhg_dREY1kwpcQGSvKxh4c1m3Fbp0m-_u6V1alMVNxqcB_cQTK8S6eVjPAIpI5lh4k2y74GiOY27cAEXZnqlAPpGYz99oSWThVzV_KkHfCrR2DtyEIWIvj9kQQam93Htlubp9mwHKIsX5xS3K5AdcTOZO_a2EQhvzc8gYTBTRrp4haMwhBTcW8BJ7wbOHZGiqwpwcTridFI_mN16yWnn8cArQzgnHIPAIWMCPWX1cyG_Wjrht4xzOBWwoCuwtwJcHzOFa93cgo-JZIvbAukRI-nPSLDfHiHmiAKWZpx-F8eLn3gu60AIGe7sROPCqiSSK3tpBwgOMBz2lcj4AWiDHyiCdTYn2kJcMQay0/3y1/6xXC_inxQtyZ8J48fdQTgg/h1/Xhps1q1a1fF1jRuIsEp6FgWhAwoRvCc3DBOXRkNq-Cs)
_Hateful. Petty. Void of all decency._

Hard to believe it, but Lauren Boebert has somehow reached a new low. This week, she was gifted by a Uvalde victims’ parents group a pin honoring 10-year-old Maite Rodriguez, who lost her life in the shooting. Instead of behaving with any decency, she trashed the pin in front of the group.

**Peter, it’s time to fire Lauren Boebert.**

**We’re currently living through one of the worst heat waves in recent history....And it comes just weeks after Greg Abbott signed a law ending water breaks for workers.**

Greg Abbott has lined his pockets with donations from corporate donors who want to eliminate basic workers rights like water breaks. He will NEVER fight for the well-being of Texans who work every day in the sweltering heat.

Peter, we’ve already seen the deadly consequences of Greg Abbott’s assault on workers. In the last couple weeks a number of workers have lost their lives while on-the-job in the Texas heat. And it’s only going to get worse.

Greg Abbott is bought and paid for by the corporate interests that fill his campaign coffers. Ending these water breaks was a major priority for right wing interests—so it was a priority to Greg Abbott.

But we have different priorities. **We’re fighting for the basic rights of workers to get a break from the Texas heat. **ICYMI: Chris Christie Argues For America To Get Tougher On China**
Since entering the race, Governor Chris Christie has warned that America must take the threat of China much more seriously.
Neither Donald Trump or Joe Biden have been tough enough on China.
Earlier this week, Governor Christie slammed Trump for his glowing comments about China’s President Xi Jinping. In response to Trump calling Xi “brilliant,” Governor Christie [had this to say](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=8a3d2d0c7c&e=d0a9afa930):
_**CHRISTIE:** “Trump says he is tough on China but seems like he is head over heels. Xi isn’t smart, brilliant or perfect. He is a dictator who controls through terror. This isn’t some Hollywood villain, this is our greatest adversary. Let’s get someone whok nows the difference.”_
It’s not the first time Christie took Trump to task for cozying up to the Chinese communist:
**“I’ll Never Trust A Communist** ”
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=e47700ce57&e=d0a9afa930)
Joe Biden has completely failed when it comes to China, Governor Christie laid out the administrations many failures:
**“Biden Administration: Filled With Mishaps Towards China”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=d6896b1010&e=d0a9afa930)
Yesterday, in an interview with Bloomberg, argued for a totally new approach to China:
**“China: Totally New Approach”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=f6aee198d2&e=d0a9afa930)

name: Team DPVA
subject: Take Back the Legislature!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
As we get closer and closer to Election Day, it’s becoming clear just how tight these races are going to be. A single Delegate seat could determine whether the Virginia Legislature is held by a Democratic majority or a Republican majority.

|
---
Derek, As we get closer and closer to Election Day, it’s becoming clear just how tight these races are going to be. A single Delegate seat could determine whether the Virginia Legislature is held by a Democratic majority or a Republican majority. A single seat could be the difference between legislation that strips away reproductive freedom or not. A single seat could be all the difference. Which is why we are focusing on funding our Take Back the Legislature (or TBTL) program. It focuses on using digital targeting to mobilize Virginia voters in the most vulnerable districts in our Commonwealth. This is what intentional and strategic political coordination looks like. As Chairwoman Swecker mentioned earlier, we are scrambling to fully fund this incredible new program by the end of July. Every dollar is one step closer to taking back the Virginia Legislature. body:
will you join me?

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWAFTEQvXlYOwsyYXMoJFxcFZxCEHVNOh2GZQixJCslBWTRDnyUvmZOHCIvm9bGZ_cLw0U9W5nWI5AP-Bk2JH4Yl1xnOfwClVUetfO0LIpehdIldYzNq93JLSiaftDeCEqxIT4pXaHBJxG_xBfBx25uG1DoP52q31NPsiqaQQ6-T-)
---
Peter,

_****I just introduced legislation in the US Senate to BAN gender reassignment surgeries for children.** **_

This should be common sense. These gruesome, irreversible operations should not be performed on children, and it's sick to suggest otherwise.

| [**IF YOU AGREE, CLICK HERE.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWAU2_5tKExUc2yT71GpOlFUoqAdDZINPw5ruRTyK-zxpoM0KoQzqm2HJj3TvWMlU6kyKnNQbEvWQNjD95HVHIe3aApVaxRCZfmB7LhV1Pd6lJRcchY9lFaII1l44ULVY2xkVedcPP4QP39oqwfsA3gWA8Zo7XH3nVsb78qTrtclD)
---

_**Sex reassignment surgeries involve removing body parts, permanently sterilizing children, and making them dependent on further medical care for the rest of their lives.**_

Anyone who performs these surgeries will be HELD ACCOUNTABLE for harming children and pushing this madness.

If you agree with me and want to protect children's innocence, **I need to know now.**

[**STOP THE RADICAL LEFT FROM PREYING ON OUR CHILDREN**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWAU2_5tKExUc2yT71GpOlFVc-gko02vJtnrKfGJjnmR5a-0WQTaGskj9xq0f63Mdt8r9tEh7YwRx1rNV8OIKc28Hk7gMXTlxa9zH6iiDrNTl2PGWb3xEe_LsVazcFAS42ulC2MmX50oQCF9rGNASuHSSTgYJLkOYRi32nFHfMIpF)
---

For far too long, we've seen the Radical Left push their propaganda on our children. They've taken advantage of our youth and forced them to commit irreversible damage to their bodies. I'm saying enough is enough.

Please, support & protect our children. **[Click here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWAU2_5tKExUc2yT71GpOlFUanJ2wZ5LBn548otryTKZr11xuyWimldZyNBGvP-UVWJ5dJ_IuTAzDCqunUa7s0ddXY7pxSishqCMveer6oCFxGwd1TvxzW8xfNWkfnGxzjAl2PebpzBD0tBiDW2Bkd5NsYNTRBWVhPSUTScffUB16)**

[**PROTECT OUR CHILDREN**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWAU2_5tKExUc2yT71GpOlFVsEArPDXdVjk52-2TrblhoqAPI27-k0HAgCppae5staKiCRa38xjg702wzvnbAPzeewa2LgoZnIRjpdHg0lTiEixx8MjuedDtgkWowZaJGctO-q0_afd4LjCWUNgoKstLB6gv5uJT1QxHnOVIFPztk)
---

Please,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWD8Em1KDHiQnh2GRcyNbaFXZ3oCJmAQ1jd2TJDkd3EsEnwCO4idcehLqkLLlywDyxFEvQh8foQo6h-NF75GxO2IIBnNZt3aLG3eN1VQZDQGzizmjsYUz-88ZZbcqOJgEDV0QYjgD0Iwdl2JD6lv5rOmSx3KLsRE6l8FLMAZBVWnx) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWLnNRGo68yZioQvRSCLquNkddjck4XDjuesc4xwVx_1peYfbDIkH1ds9M9BxWMBEkPezCREZfOg3rU6VXA4pMVbJ_HqKRx3OCYymFQbRkxToG_zHPshXsHJLZRJIKIZo8Guj4c4IkterKnH2FtVl1oUTPK2bqWIT4GEQLbVLHPfF) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c00109ba31c743b98bdc69fe35bf25a3&_e=VLGQ5WOU8ZdQpJvS1uZvNQ3LNFWFeZubxKhRyDU3dsmeorddn5CzL_glJRdGH2C-Y5su9KBUwJUf5m26bvR4w-wWeZgJEG6gEGd64MJJ9gAH2aX5dx3dW6Xx673NCMXw_hRPDzi6T2m7uQYFHjmbWAFTEQvXlYOwsyYXMoJFxcGVcs_fwR17AlMzl88DVZKqI92vIBw7u_qXvXrdd_LrkQOT_06kXjGsZOotZricBu1MCMrJBPpBeY3IACOXyqDtgoSmhU4-CayGKpCaD7_BSr5zFFlI0vwqEJ4ZbrdjZ_bEtrZIg8UZuq5AqyyOUNAI)

name: URGENT (via Team Salazar)
subject: What are your kids doing right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, Here’s the bottom line - parents matter. We never thought that Democrats would come out and admit that parents should be excluded from their child’s learning – But apparently they’d rather have nameless Washington bureaucrats decide what’s being taught to them. Here’s the situation: as long as Maria Elvira Salazar is Congresswoman of FL-27, this will NEVER happen in America. Democrats control the Michigan House by a razor-thin margin – losing just two seats could put the chamber back in the hands of the extreme GOP, risking all the progress we’ve made. We’re calling on our grassroots supporters to stand with us right now and help us protect our progress and our majorities in states like Michigan and beyond. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | These recall efforts were spearheaded by those dead-set on undermining Democrats’ progress in the state – Democrats have passed bills to expand gun safety legislation, defend abortion access, and protect our communities. But opponents of progress aren’t backing down. These baseless recall petitions are an attempt to upend Democrats’ agenda ahead of a critical election year. We can’t let that happen. This is critical. We’re counting on you to act today. Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . To unsubscribe and stop receiving emails about our efforts, please | | Sent via . name: Andrei Cherny
subject: Schweikert voted to restrict access to reproductive health care for active-duty troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
I need your help to fight back

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66765690/417521626/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZhMjE3ZmYtMTIyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9csYZfwH03jwO_EdGMbDcy8g1nG71k-3um83WEmdd1w=) Hi team –

The men and women who put their lives on the line to defend our freedom shouldn’t have to worry about losing their own freedoms.

name: Abortion Alert @ HER Time
subject: GOP AGs want to track women who get legal abortions out-of-state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66766092/417523301/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230720_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgzYzg0NTAtMTQyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nZzLKgfNaQr98deCUy5JmaRUxnpvv9jT9y9HgcXYOqI=)

Peter, Mississippi AG Lynn Fitch is coming after your private health care information. She, along with 18 other Republican Attorneys General, are working hard to make sure law enforcement can track women who travel out-of-state to receive abortion care if they live in a state where it’s illegal. That way, they can still be prosecuted when they return home. **For making a completely legal and private health care decision. ** It’s reprehensible, but it’s no surprise coming from Lynn Fitch. This is the woman that argued the _Dobbs_ case before the Supreme Court, and is proud to have played a role in overturning _Roe v. Wade_. **The good news?** Lynn Fitch is up for reelection THIS November, in less than four months. name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96bdf323d50f47deab99ccc889e3b707&_e=zJdui-OYUCtnM-UbrZgW7QOjWPDlXjG0QoC5Pj2r2RuN1VrK-3v5dkaJERthgP9eiUIpyevHCw7_-VrqEd-62r1Yoa7wCAK0nbAVa_PsFnxoHem64V1sGzludSsXp-v_LStC-5_WKHoerIOBxY8CKR5TQ4aCIxcG_09XQLd2oPztoKejJFTXo0cOYTxRXRRjzz8nfJ6qcgQt2gUcSVGu6mj0djtKqYe6VbWkLJKMZN1X6Yl9TmTXIEczTP5B_9kWJQgLkHoo_xyhoV53tXtdnVqFsMWBP5sXXKvrBFAnKe51gfxTUYb_2XkPZX3VThI6)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96bdf323d50f47deab99ccc889e3b707&_e=zJdui-OYUCtnM-UbrZgW7QOjWPDlXjG0QoC5Pj2r2RuN1VrK-3v5dkaJERthgP9eiUIpyevHCw7_-VrqEd-62r1Yoa7wCAK0nbAVa_PsFnxoHem64V1sGzludSsXp-v_LStC-5_WKHoerIOBxY8CKR5TQ4aCIxcG_09XQLd2oPx4DErm5fXZ8flP6OgFQngxOaGQ86PAHEWSJRW8tSDrdzak5SUmyAyvMgUtIQwE37wrpmKaZz8hCCgJm1GWoypPRrdabmaVjpQ49Hjbpqzm4x-ytDAYz2fJ4oSLj8ncSQYE2iV7BW02Cl-7NaWZosSD)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96bdf323d50f47deab99ccc889e3b707&_e=zJdui-OYUCtnM-UbrZgW7QOjWPDlXjG0QoC5Pj2r2RuN1VrK-3v5dkaJERthgP9eiUIpyevHCw7_-VrqEd-62r1Yoa7wCAK0nbAVa_PsFnxoHem64V1sGzludSsXp-v_LStC-5_WKHoerIOBxY8CKR5TQ4aCIxcG_09XQLd2oPxYTwdNZGC7nv5q_sQ21J8lEOvuVaChXGdb49G5i7Qe2Hp9iK8u_1wi4rLGBTC1nnWIMr9GGo-RywDlBC-hlDdw6Q7v93O3jy7bBvzW1GLNgj1AmcPt15iA77rYWTkBWqGRe7D7IJdO30L-fTlK3dcE)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96bdf323d50f47deab99ccc889e3b707&_e=zJdui-OYUCtnM-UbrZgW7QOjWPDlXjG0QoC5Pj2r2RuN1VrK-3v5dkaJERthgP9eiUIpyevHCw7_-VrqEd-62r1Yoa7wCAK0nbAVa_PsFnxoHem64V1sGzludSsXp-v_LStC-5_WKHoerIOBxY8CKR5TQ4aCIxcG_09XQLd2oPwi0OPo7V3dvSP9J5uBNnecuANB2vZEvOvfWM9-EvAbBbDtdObOZBqIrUFyJTO6ygljJ62gt3vLwqcPXh7sxKEBVpoHhxo0DS9TUuCunD2AayxnsnXliWjuAoRY30Y6IW6mcJc-QPY2istt8fq9A4Y2)
---
**I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter.**

Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. **[https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/im-running-for-senate](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96bdf323d50f47deab99ccc889e3b707&_e=zJdui-OYUCtnM-UbrZgW7QOjWPDlXjG0QoC5Pj2r2RuN1VrK-3v5dkaJERthgP9eiUIpyevHCw7_-VrqEd-62r1Yoa7wCAK0nbAVa_PsFnxoHem64V1sGzludSsXp-v_LStC-5_WKHoerIOBxY8CKR5TQ4aCIxcG_09XQLd2oPxQ4RbMNG2emKiWxY8T8Q54_Xbau5PD1i0GACTYcZ3ZNzh_CxgaNvVlyiI3zfMBSG071J8OVQ8_fiFqlgqNSW0SHQpQHpTf-WZE8lRkblixrGVMyqEmCQO6ohd-G_blvocILTXOukU7-0XimYpTVeCh)**
---
I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us.

Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96bdf323d50f47deab99ccc889e3b707&_e=zJdui-OYUCtnM-UbrZgW7QOjWPDlXjG0QoC5Pj2r2RuN1VrK-3v5dkaJERthgP9eiUIpyevHCw7_-VrqEd-62r1Yoa7wCAK0nbAVa_PsFnxoHem64V1sGzludSsXp-v_LStC-5_WKHoerIOBxY8CKR5TQ4aCIxcG_09XQLd2oPyyhTmvMGAhLv9HcesrKTiPgsCdhejPH8LJsQakOdDuLmXlFpLAPVfJMh0rj-8xAIwjOTMnly23nOqxzU_zcfp2XMKWXpYTaE9elJJJb6MqaNOnvAYjwFZ44djAxZ5z_Lp0zCR5OXZmKNMVrWsl-Dr1)
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Billions of climate $ → real communities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
How to get IRA funds to all the right places
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13539%2E53494%2EaerUjs)
---
|
---
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4685?t=3&akid=13539%2E53494%2EaerUjs)
---
| |
---
| **Thanks to the IRA, communities can get much-needed funds for clean energy, jobs, and resilience. Now our task is to make sure that happens in a way that is equitable and cuts as much climate pollution as possible.** LENA MOFFITTEvergreen Executive Director
---
| | Friend, _Promise, possibility, potential._ That's what the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) means to us. The largest investment in climate and clean energy in US history has all the potential for:
* Unprecedented reductions in climate pollution
* Money for communities to improve infrastructure and resilience
* Good-paying jobs for millions of Americans
* Cleaner air, cleaner water, and a safer climate

**But all of this promise and possibility is dependent on the complex business of**** _implementing_****the 100+ climate programs in the bill**** _. _** **That's why Evergreen has been hard at work helping community leaders and decision-makers understand how to ensure the IRA is the climate-fighting, job-creating, equity-increasing law it was designed to be.** **[Check out all of the resources and recommendations we've created to help you and fellow Americans make the most out of this opportunity.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4685?t=4&akid=13539%2E53494%2EaerUjs)**_
_ The IRA is far from the end of our call for climate action—but it is the start of real progress toward the healthy, climate-safe future we all deserve. Effective and equitable implementation of the programs inside the IRA could make all the difference, and Evergreen is here to help make sure it happens. Warmly, Team Evergreen
---

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: It’s personal to me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66766813/417526004/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2RjMDIwNC0xNjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fWTF9tU-YblIg1YwGKT8zr4AVS6UhO_fLU5x5SAv9k=&emci=12045362-6426-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=67dc0204-1627-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19954364) Team, it's no secret that our nation's opioid epidemic is devastating countless families across Colorado and the country. And this crisis is personal to me too. When I was 6 years old, my mom hurt her back – and was subsequently prescribed a dangerous amount of opioids. Like for so many other Americans, a common medical situation led my mom to a decades-long battle with addiction. That's why I just introduced a bipartisan bill, the _Communities of Recovery Act_ , which will significantly increase funding for local community organizations that offer recovery support services. **These services are so critical for helping people with substance use disorder rebuild their lives.** [**If we want to solve this nationwide epidemic, it's going to take _everyone_ , Democrat _and_ Republican – because this issue touches us all, regardless of our personal politics. clean_body: Team, it's no secret that our nation's opioid epidemic is devastating countless families across Colorado and the country. And this crisis is personal to me too. When I was 6 years old, my mom hurt her back – and was subsequently prescribed a dangerous amount of opioids. Like for so many other Americans, a common medical situation led my mom to a decades-long battle with addiction. That's why I just introduced a bipartisan bill, the Communities of Recovery Act , which will significantly increase funding for local community organizations that offer recovery support services. name: Jon Tester
subject: Peter, hoo boy!
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd335624-2de7-4c1d-8ffe-1fc358d7aba9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, My team says we need to raise $100,000 by our critical fundraising deadline. So, [before I ask you to chip in a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8e9ce55-a930-4669-81ea-ea0a9e45e822/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), here are three reasons why:
1. Sabato’s Crystal Ball ranks Montana a TOSS-UP. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana.

2. I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators. Political experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us.

3. Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018. So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.

Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Please: [Split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign right now to help us reach our critical $100,000 goal. We’re running out of time. Every dollar will help us block Mitch McConnell from taking over the Senate >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b43e9e5-9889-4e79-8ee4-cdc3ac8245b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T173784f9-7827-4a51-873c-2f50bddb9821/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Jon [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3dc117b5-7af1-4cf6-a730-1bed168c7e74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

**Sherrod always puts people over politics.** He believes in fighting for the people who make our country work, not the wealthy and well-connected. He's been a crucial ally of mine in the fight to expand and protect workers' rights as well as efforts to protect overtime pay and access to health care.
**The bottom line is: we need to keep Sherrod Brown in the Senate. He's exactly the kind of progressive champion that families in Ohio – and across the country – deserve.**
[**Will you chip in right now and help fund the fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66768170/417530822/857194678?refcode=2023-07-20-brown-split&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e2af28bd-1727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmFmMjhiZC0xNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RsxY61Yxqo9kJqocANShz1sYBPdOoJdmHMBn-H4ulU0=)

_Ron_

name: Tara McGowan, Courier Newsroom
subject: Exposing Moms for Liberty
body:
I started Courier Newsroom for a very important reason: because the majority of Americans were just not getting access to good, relevant information
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1264%2E120351%2EbJxHFC)
Hi Peter, it’s Tara — Founder and Publisher of Courier Newsroom.
I started Courier Newsroom for a very important reason: because the majority of Americans were just not getting access to good, relevant information. So I set out to provide high-quality reporting to everyone, for free.
I talk about this all the time — how the mainstream media keeps failing the American people:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230720?refcode=em20230720&amount=5&refcode2=1264_120351_bJxHFC&akid=1264%2E120351%2EbJxHFC)
[**If you support our mission, will you make a gift to fund our reporting today? If you’d like to read an example of how our newsrooms are benefiting the American people, read on:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230720?refcode=em20230720&amount=5&refcode2=1264_120351_bJxHFC&akid=1264%2E120351%2EbJxHFC)
You’ve probably seen our coverage of the right-wing extremist group Moms for Liberty.
When it comes to Moms for Liberty, mainstream and traditional media outlets commit journalistic malpractice. They talk about Moms for Liberty the way that group wants to be covered — like they’re just a group of concerned parents.
**But the reality is that they are a well-funded, well-organized group with an extremist agenda** — and Courier Newsroom has reported that fact again and again.
Courier Newsroom can expose groups like Moms for Liberty because, unlike other news networks, we don't just focus on consumers. **We don’t hide our reporting behind paywalls or subscriptions**. We provide our reporting to everyone, for free.
While the mainstream media leaves behind millions of Americans who rely on getting their information for free, **we pick up the slack.**
As long as we have supporters like you funding our work, we’ll never have to gatekeep our reporting for just the wealthy, well-educated, privileged few.
[**So will you make a gift to Courier Newsroom and help us continue providing high-quality reporting to the public for free?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230720?refcode=em20230720&amount=5&refcode2=1264_120351_bJxHFC&akid=1264%2E120351%2EbJxHFC)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230720?refcode=em20230720&amount=5&refcode2=1264_120351_bJxHFC&akid=1264%2E120351%2EbJxHFC)**
Thank you for supporting local journalism,
Tara McGowan
Founder & Publisher
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1264_120351_bJxHFC&akid=1264%2E120351%2EbJxHFC)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)

clean_body: I started Courier Newsroom for a very important reason: because the majority of Americans were just not getting access to good, relevant information Hi Peter, it’s Tara — Founder and Publisher of Courier Newsroom. I started Courier Newsroom for a very important reason: because the majority of Americans were just not getting access to good, relevant information. So I set out to provide high-quality reporting to everyone, for free. I talk about this all the time — how the mainstream media keeps failing the American people: You’ve probably seen our coverage of the right-wing extremist group Moms for Liberty. When it comes to Moms for Liberty, mainstream and traditional media outlets commit journalistic malpractice. They talk about Moms for Liberty the way that group wants to be covered — like they’re just a group of concerned parents. But the reality is that they are a well-funded, well-organized group with an extremist agenda — and Courier Newsroom has reported that fact again and again. Courier Newsroom can expose groups like Moms for Liberty because, unlike other news networks, we don't just focus on consumers. We don’t hide our reporting behind paywalls or subscriptions. We provide our reporting to everyone, for free. While the mainstream media leaves behind millions of Americans who rely on getting their information for free, we pick up the slack. As long as we have supporters like you funding our work, we’ll never have to gatekeep our reporting for just the wealthy, well-educated, privileged few. Thank you for supporting local journalism, Tara McGowan Founder & Publisher Courier Newsroom Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [LIVE AT 4:30PM ET] Common Ground Podcast
body:
Peter, Bill is out on the trail fighting hard on the to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond, so we will be airing a
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/2f057cd834080981ea5d31a13b04af11/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vm2Ae4ExERzUXUOiZ91JCOw_iUTPzvjRWuCtq-d-653AEIJZcUF-DBnR6MuWCBxlwogZKCWhLPX1-2XjmuY0Ep5C3SdavAG76GZ2A6O2y7sYB6hQY57P0gibPolMZZYkjFten4z7N02ewJd36cwjj-FGMlKOyMuwGPdIvTokKYVXTUpeGvRKrxbDuvq6qWF1Mii0Vetme7FB0aAVcKZfFZn2D_1oxPF85i2g==)
---
| Peter, Bill is out on the trail fighting hard to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond, so we will be airing an encore episode of the Common Ground Podcast at 4:30PM ET this afternoon.
Key topics of the stream will be **fighting cancel culture and personal empowerment.** As Americans, we cherish the First Amendment, which guarantees us the freedom of speech, religion, press, assembly, and petition. These rights form the bedrock of our democracy and are essential to the healthy exchange of ideas and opinions. **However, cancel culture threatens to erode these values, as it often prioritizes mob rule and emotional reactions over rational discourse and constructive dialogue.
**
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO WATCH AN ENCORE SHOWING OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST (STARTS AT 4:30PM ET)](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/1eda0b6084cb42957c5e6acf0160c3ee/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVzNYK9iYiI5iHqHKZDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jjUAoc0lxCRzu9GDMBQs0FkIJlBQ0kvLi9WUbz3EdCyohb5FuOgV8_BpegPnssK1nAQ0KDXLY-0ESZ9EpjbPEkCrXpuM_z9pliyfc-XEK0_RTjLWgsDfuFjjpDudFpTCr6Kgrw1-JVMttu2jqupEXUyLLVVF1Z7sSPRpBrhTK8rM-weGtmZ4WOGLY)
---
|
---
| The episode being streamed today features two incredible special guests: Papa John and Rob Gill. **John Hampton "Papa John" Schnatte** r is an American entrepreneur who founded the Papa John's pizza restaurant chain in 1984. Schnatter started the business in the back of his father's tavern after selling his car and using the proceeds to purchase used restaurant equipment. He will be coming on to share his experience with cancel culture, which includes being removed from the company he founded. **Rob Gill** is the Founder and CEO of EPIC Financial Strategies. He and his team have performed more than 23,000 cash flow analyses and over 10,000 financial plans. Their mission is to provide financial education to a world that desperately needs more of it. Rob will be coming on to talk about the importance of personal and financial empowerment. Make sure you [**click here to join us now (we'll be live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/6503057bec8a051f37cfdbf54f02645b/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVzLQpvIiKieYg6x6ZDLem6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jDUAouaS4AA_u9GDMBQs05kIJlBTUknj--rL1ynEdC0ohb5GuWwXe8DU8A9PZYZutBdQrNMhh7wdJnEWnNM4SQyquTcd_nqXLZk-48-MUxvGnGCtBYWfcDXikW5wWFcKsoqMuDX8lUo1n23ldVbW8mBJZLPKyPdul6NAIuFIoi8_6BPu3ZnwCGWRi3A==) Common Sense Team
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/11358038/067fc8a246922cfa) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Friend,
In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can pitch in to support Seth Moulton and my campaign for U.S. Senate [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff] ahead of our fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?
Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.
As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.
McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.
It’s clear that McCarthy and his right-wing allies are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit our fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.
Pitch in now -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Investing now and building the campaign infrastructure to break through the Republicans’ noise and reach voters across California is going to be the key to success in this race. Thanks for anything you can contribute to help.
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

Cori won’t be silenced when it comes to human rights abuses. | |

clean_body: Cori won’t be silenced when it comes to human rights abuses. | | Peter, Yesterday, Congresswoman Cori Bush stood up for human rights for all people by boycotting the Israeli President’s speech to Congress. Just last week, Israel’s military bombed a Palestinian refugee camp and blocked ambulances from reaching the wounded. Our country shouldn’t grant the honor of a televised Congressional address to members of a far-right government committing war crimes against the Palestinian people. Cori was also among the few members of Congress who voted against a resolution this week reaffirming support for the Israeli government. And she has demanded that Congress stop using U.S. tax dollars to fund the Israeli government’s apartheid. For her advocacy, she’s been attacked from all sides this week, by Democrats, Republicans, reporters, and anti-Palestinian groups. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We need more members of Congress who are willing to speak up against racism and oppression in the U.S. and around the world. This morning, the Cook Political Report – one of the most respected names in politics – upgraded our chances of defeating Lauren Boebert.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66769599/417534224/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTk5OTVlMC0xODI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELvQ6T0vqifIPEHsfQ4X5xXAwrsvJ_scFLPK8Z-2CrE=&emci=f820f565-1727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=219995e0-1827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=19445147)

I have huge news to share, team.
This morning, the Cook Political Report – one of the most respected names in politics – __upgraded__ our chances of defeating Lauren Boebert.
**Our race against Lauren Boebert has officially moved from “Lean Republican” to true “Toss-Up!”**
[**If you’re all-in to help me send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024, then please, chip in $5 or more to my campaign right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66769601/417534226/1610638071?refcode=em20230720am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=219995e0-1827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTk5OTVlMC0xODI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELvQ6T0vqifIPEHsfQ4X5xXAwrsvJ_scFLPK8Z-2CrE=)
Here’s what Dave Wasserman of the Cook Political Report had to say about why our chances of winning have increased:
> _Not only has Boebert avoided taking any steps to moderate her image since coming within 546 votes of losing to former Aspen Councilman Adam Frisch in 2022, Frisch outraised her by a massive $2.6 million to $810,000 in the second quarter thanks to an avalanche of small-dollar donations. Frisch ended June with $2.4 million on hand to Boebert's $1.4 million, and Frisch can leverage that to bash Boebert for leading the hard-right charge to block the defense reauthorization bill over wedge social issue concerns.
>
> A lopsided cash picture won't guarantee a Frisch win, though. Both parties agree this rematch will be decided by the roughly 80,000 voters who didn't show up in 2022 but will in 2024, who skew independent. Those non-voting independents may be more open to Donald Trump than those who showed up in the midterms. More crucially, Frisch won't get a free pass from national GOP groups this time: the NRCC and CLF are likely to invest heavily..._
He’s right. This is going to be a tough race. I’m running in a district that leans Republican by 8 or 9 percentage points.
But last year, we came just 546 votes shy of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country, and the latest poll shows another tie: 45% to 45%.
A huge part of why we lost in 2022 was just that we got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars – and Boebert’s allies are preparing to spend _even more_ this time to tell ridiculous lies about me on every television across the district.
I’ve already clocked over 30,000 miles in my red pickup truck, meeting with thousands of voters across the district. **But if we’re going to counter the Super PAC lies and win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I have nowhere else to turn. Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert and finally stop the angertainment circus in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66769603/417534227/1610638071?refcode=em20230720am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=219995e0-1827-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTk5OTVlMC0xODI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELvQ6T0vqifIPEHsfQ4X5xXAwrsvJ_scFLPK8Z-2CrE=)

name: Colin Allred
subject: re: Ted Cruz and Book Bans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19003?t=1001&akid=3417%2E346206%2EspFg9Z ][IMG]

I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was
pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting
there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the
money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different
career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same
opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are
fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their
far-right agenda.

That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the
Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But
I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against
Ted Cruz. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19003?t=1002&akid=3417%2E346206%2EspFg9Z ]Will you please split a donation of $25 today between our
campaign and Charles Booker to help send me to the Senate? →

Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz
is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just
five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and
tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change.

But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and
expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats
like you to be by my side every step of the way. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19003?t=1003&akid=3417%2E346206%2EspFg9Z ]So please, before my
midnight fundraising deadline, will you split a donation of $25 or more
between our campaign and Charles Booker to help me defeat Ted Cruz and
flip Texas blue? →

Every dollar makes a difference – thank you so much for giving what you
can.

Colin

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230720-3417-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3417_346206_spFg9Z&akid=3417%2E346206%2EspFg9Z

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3417%2E346206%2EspFg9Z

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: [ ][IMG] I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz. [ ]Will you please split a donation of $25 today between our campaign and Charles Booker to help send me to the Senate? → Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change. But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to be by my side every step of the way. [ ]So please, before my midnight fundraising deadline, will you split a donation of $25 or more between our campaign and Charles Booker to help me defeat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? → Every dollar makes a difference – thank you so much for giving what you can. Colin Contribute to Charles Booker:

body:
Want to make a difference in your local community? We're here to help.
| | | |
---
| Fellow Georgian,
In case you haven't heard, Greater Georgia has launched our first-ever Candidate Recruitment Program ahead of the 2023 municipal elections!
The program will focus on identifying and recruiting qualified conservatives to run for local office in cities across the state, as well as equipping candidates with the information to run winning campaigns. Offices on the ballot this year include mayor, city council, and others specific to your city.
Please note that the qualifying period to run for office is fast approaching. If you are not sure what districts you are eligible for - or whether there are elections in your city this year - you can find out by calling your local City Hall.

* Qualifying Period: August 21st - August 25th
* Election Day: November 7th

If you have ever thought about running for local office or would like to learn more about our new program, click the button below to sign up.
Greater Georgia

subject: John Formella and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | PLEASE NOTE THAT DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS LAUNCHED A NEWSLETTER THAT IS AVAILABLE FOR FREE. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AT [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGc7bPwHCTqJjpT3dKGKrhz4ENXapbHLZ5qUlcC-C9gvQLbs2w09Tw98i48mvJEQwRrB7WlkBMXpiA6p4SM-GZhxLAqDUehNS2ALmErxs7WZj8xSgVvF1AFOXRPyn8IQ79pXETjnPoYspz1hYaIbqehrjx1q21Rx&c=5hhw7E89-lmzlsGkpLkx9hfL_W9Z7xrkYIi95tX-H-homsVL_y-Sow==&ch=lnE6oSxsRhXA6LnopC2cv48WOHiqltJvNjip12W3JJ-NYi2iKcUubw==). SUBSCRIBERS WILL HAVE ACCESS TO EVERY INTERVIEW DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS CONDUCTED OVER THE PAST 3 YEARS, EVERY ARTICLE HE'S WRITTEN OVER THE PAST 12 YEARS, AND A BUNCH OF OTHER INTERESTING CONTENT. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AND HELP US SPREAD THE WORD BY TELLING OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT.
---
---
# John Formella, Attorney General,
# State of New Hampshire
---
---
In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with John Formella, Attorney General for the State of New Hampshire. John shares lessons learned along his path from a sports and music foused kid in Jacksonville to becoming one of the country's youngest attorney generals. He concludes with simple advice: embrace uncertainty, stay nimble, and remain open to opportunities.
Tune in via the links below!

---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGc7bPwHCTqJjpT3dKGKrhz4ENXapbHLZ5qUlcC-C9gvQLbs2w09T6RW3xdEiXabjGuJVqXYVqOlIU_B4KSHSHf7xxn8BRi0qFA5KWQTSKSHlWiIQFJ1BnGVVSU3j3kuxEYfPXmH5AaCrcZlk8aBaA==&c=5hhw7E89-lmzlsGkpLkx9hfL_W9Z7xrkYIi95tX-H-homsVL_y-Sow==&ch=lnE6oSxsRhXA6LnopC2cv48WOHiqltJvNjip12W3JJ-NYi2iKcUubw==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGc7bPwHCTqJjpT3dKGKrhz4ENXapbHLZ5qUlcC-C9gvQLbs2w09T6RW3xdEiXabjGuJVqXYVqOlIU_B4KSHSHf7xxn8BRi0qFA5KWQTSKSHlWiIQFJ1BnGVVSU3j3kuxEYfPXmH5AaCrcZlk8aBaA==&c=5hhw7E89-lmzlsGkpLkx9hfL_W9Z7xrkYIi95tX-H-homsVL_y-Sow==&ch=lnE6oSxsRhXA6LnopC2cv48WOHiqltJvNjip12W3JJ-NYi2iKcUubw==).
Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. To subscribe (for free), please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vGc7bPwHCTqJjpT3dKGKrhz4ENXapbHLZ5qUlcC-C9gvQLbs2w09T5_F7kf5eidXaX-4-lH12zN0sPOtn7UlHfSrKCvpl1ucRG0KkmHhClR5j-QplLi2zdKK7alraJ_mKY8kiWQD756zAYiBcVLIz0ewpjFeQCF0&c=5hhw7E89-lmzlsGkpLkx9hfL_W9Z7xrkYIi95tX-H-homsVL_y-Sow==&ch=lnE6oSxsRhXA6LnopC2cv48WOHiqltJvNjip12W3JJ-NYi2iKcUubw==)

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Infuriating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Flipping five House seats in the coming election puts Democrats back in control.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66772448/417538591/395234972?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230719-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZmFkNjYxLTFiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=m57w41XJyfiiHfJUPLfNvbqo_vS04-PmUeS3L0dOe_c=)
---
Peter, this is infuriating.

We watched Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies try to censure and sue a sitting Democrat for daring to hold Donald Trump accountable.

If that's not enough, extremists like Lauren Boebert are now pushing Congress to _impeach_ President Joe Biden.

Let’s be clear: these folks aren't interested in governing. What they are interested in is weakening our President. What they are interested in is attacking women's rights, banning books, and making it harder for working families to get by in this country.

**That’s why I'm fighting so hard to take back our majority, and an important step you can take to join me is making sure Will Rollins has the funds he needs to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st District.**

Flipping _five House seats_ in the coming election puts Democrats back in control. Will is running in a "must-win" district that almost went blue in 2022.

[_**Before Will's next fundraising deadline, split a donation of $10, or whatever you can afford, between Fight for Progress and Will’s campaign to stop Republicans from destroying everything we've worked so hard to build.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66772449/417538592/395234972?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230719-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZmFkNjYxLTFiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=m57w41XJyfiiHfJUPLfNvbqo_vS04-PmUeS3L0dOe_c=)

I’m proud of what Democrats have accomplished:

– The creation of more jobs in two years than any other president in history
– Created 13 million jobs in President Biden's first term.
– Enacted the Child Tax Credit which cut child poverty in half.
– Made life-saving vaccines available to every American.
– And much more...

We've made incredible progress, but Republicans in the House will stop at nothing to put a halt to our work. I refuse to stand for it and you shouldn't either.

[_**That's why I need you to split a contribution of $10 between Fight for Progress and Will's campaign before his next deadline hits. We can’t afford to fall short -- not with so much at stake.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66772452/417538593/395234972?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230719-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwZmFkNjYxLTFiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=m57w41XJyfiiHfJUPLfNvbqo_vS04-PmUeS3L0dOe_c=)

name: Conrad Black
subject: Our nation desperately needs The New York Sun
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWSErxXDN_

You may already know that I spent most of my career in publishing
and helped build the third largest newspaper company in the
western world.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWSErxXDN_

FROM THE
DESK OF CONRAD BLACK

You may
already know that I spent most of my career in publishing and
helped build the third largest newspaper company in the western
world.

We
published over 400 titles, including the London Daily Telegraph,
Chicago Sun Times, Jerusalem Post, Spectator, and most of the
leading newspapers in Canada and Australia.

I am
proud to have also been one of the founders of the modern New
York Sun, and believe that now, more than ever, it is a paper
that is uniquely suited for this moment of crisis in journalism.

Too many
journalists are not only failing to live up to public
expectations but are actively abusing public trust. Instead of
policing the powerful on behalf of the public, they police the
public on behalf of the powers they favor.

The New
York Sun has never lost sight of who it serves. It's a patriotic
newspaper that places principle over politics and people over
party. That is why I am happy to be a weekly contributor to it.
It maintains the highest professional standards without being
pedantic or boring. It's a community where I am proud to belong.

The Sun
is a lone voice among a sea of major publications owned by
multi-billion-dollar corporations that generally try to stifle
dissent.

The only
one way the Sun can win is if we all join in its effort.
Collectively we cannot be overwhelmed by any media conglomerate
or oppressive, woke, media groupthink. The Sun has long advocated
on our behalf. Now, if we join the Sun's movement to restore
American journalism, we will be unstoppable.

Membership starts at just 1¢ a day. I encourage you to sign up
now. Every single person counts.

Join the
Sun now →

Please
join us in the fight to restore America's journalism.

This is a
newspaper that our country desperately needs.

Conrad
Black
Columnist
for The New York Sun

Join the
Sun now →
