name: CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)
subject: I’m not done fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0249b9d82cd54e24ab506373a5150208&_e=OSWXlkItX5yTdwagA8Xea1gaBOHrGhHVN3nqduVHueXnee4YMx_VXznLktHLn9nZCAKP4vhe2XZOKmBb0eKci9u9qXz6cYd2bmTwTvBGLZkw7b5ilFrZ6Ubmm_bOFWeplsPaHEnSC2Ir1z61_m_hb7QGHFWXR8QUyxjJWGaJsdwxTCW4rElP5tj1WPQyPByfRnZEiLlb0gwjWfJleRaa6p0AuJXHndhFZ_KOug3ALZEM43loh5nPh6oIWbaCtQoKQItPFrNRG1MYPG7mjj1s9jhUSW7nj3GfS4lk1GZGR6D1hPz7UzLTYW3LmwjOObIx)
---
**Knock, Knock, Knock. **
---
This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country.

My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America.

My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that.

We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities.

I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0249b9d82cd54e24ab506373a5150208&_e=OSWXlkItX5yTdwagA8Xea1gaBOHrGhHVN3nqduVHueXnee4YMx_VXznLktHLn9nZCAKP4vhe2XZOKmBb0eKci9u9qXz6cYd2bmTwTvBGLZkw7b5ilFrZ6Ubmm_bOFWeplsPaHEnSC2Ir1z61_m_hb7QGHFWXR8QUyxjJWGaJsdzMWD4NF_qpDNl59vEiXUSFGeLZTu6XljmAItNh-a5HGh94_Q7kUefNCq-gSo-cpFbtdUbKhZ-OKN_R1uG9LRNuPhKCKxW8j2bEr2W61z1O076o0wNn03tlPydQ5ImfGCWmmE68-f1l__kJ9gcf-6HE)
---
But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different...

It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon.

Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones.

In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability.

We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny.

I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0249b9d82cd54e24ab506373a5150208&_e=OSWXlkItX5yTdwagA8Xea1gaBOHrGhHVN3nqduVHueXnee4YMx_VXznLktHLn9nZCAKP4vhe2XZOKmBb0eKci9u9qXz6cYd2bmTwTvBGLZkw7b5ilFrZ6Ubmm_bOFWeplsPaHEnSC2Ir1z61_m_hb7QGHFWXR8QUyxjJWGaJsdzwAdTTs-u8_58CHXzAvGgTMya4LaioeDxoOFjHslcS7k3xWltCxiUgCoSsYUwjByjE_NiCptUgBOLlC1n5EI_cxrXJWfCHIvbG7ybVxVC1e4YvNqWEF7VKX6Xl7UUj5UYBH6CbPjry1B4bZmGpaN7B)
---
I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families.

We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them.

Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish.
---

clean_body: This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country. | | | Knock, Knock, Knock. This is the sound that echoes in my memories, reminding me of the fear and oppression that comes with living in a communist country. My name is Hung Cao, and I am here to share my family's story with you. It is a story of fear, turned into hope and gratitude for the country that saved my life - America. My parents heard dreadful knocking at their doors. It was the sound that took away their fathers, never to be seen again. It was the sound of living in constant fear, of losing one's freedom. They vowed their children would never witness that. We escaped Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists. America opened its arms to us, granting us a new life filled with opportunities. I seized those opportunities, attending the renowned Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and graduating from the United States Naval Academy. I dedicated myself to service, spending 25 years in Navy Special Operations, fighting for our country in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia. But today, our country stands at a crossroads. We have taken a dark turn, where a knock at the door represents something entirely different... It's the sound of Joe Biden's Justice Department sending armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist, tearing families apart before their very eyes. It's the sound of the IRS raiding gun shops, seizing the records of law-abiding gun owners - violating our privacy and trust. And shockingly, it's the sound of a former President being arrested, eroding the principles our nation was built upon. Crime is running rampant, violating the safety of our homes and businesses, and destroying our communities. Criminals roam free while law-abiding citizens suffer. Our borders are flooded with illegal immigrants, and the dangerous influx of drugs like fentanyl threatens the lives of our loved ones. In a democratic republic, the rules should apply to all, regardless of power or position. But the Biden family seems to operate above the law, reminding us of a dictatorship where rulers are exempt from accountability. We cannot let our country slip away. The time for silence and forced compliance is over. We must stand up for what is right, for the truth that we are made to deny. I have traveled the world and witnessed the consequences of failed nations. I promise you, if America falls, there is nowhere else to go. That's why I am stepping forward to fight for our shared values. I believe in the American Dream, where equal opportunities are earned, not handed out. It's our duty to reclaim our dreams, protect our lives, and to safeguard the well-being of our families. We need true fighters, not politicians and certainly not keyboard warriors. We need fearless individuals who understand the value of our freedoms and will fight tooth and nail to preserve them. Together, we can make a difference. We can refuse to be intimidated, standing tall in the face of adversity. We can ensure that America remains the land of opportunity, where our children can thrive and our dreams can flourish. I am Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I am running for the United States Senate. I am committed to being your voice, your champion, and your unwavering fighter. Join me in this fight for our country's future. Together, we can reclaim what we hold dear and ensure that America remains a beacon of hope and liberty for generations to come. I'm Hung Cao and I'm not done fighting for us. Thank you for your support, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA) | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. subject: Peter: Support our latest digital ads campaign.

body:
Peter,

We’ve launched our latest digital ads campaign. And it’s all about preserving voting rights.

As you might know, a raft of legislation – including some laws already passed and signed by Governor Kemp – is allowing GOP-led counties to remove officials from local Election Boards and replace them with their own cronies.

Counties like Ware have already had Election Board members dismissed, simply because they are Democrats. And there are more counties to come.

It’s no coincidence that these ousted Election Board members are also often members of under-represented communities, such as women and people of color. We’re determined to point out this blatant discrimination – and possibly unconstitutional fraud – to voters.
And you can help us do it.

Your $25 donation can help us show our ads to at least 10,000 more people, to show Georgia voters how their rights are being systematically taken away from them. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=071923_AdCampaign-link1]

Give $25 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=071923_AdCampaign-button2]

Let's keep the momentum going.

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. name: Tim Sheehy
subject: My opponent thinks Trump is a dictator
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Do you agree? Open to submit your response now | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=9fb46653a895474b95a3bd07896d2149&_t=bfUO_aRHassLZygSRuJPftD0RWFxhVoBe4Lo6ppzEiePclZh7IOHo-TdOXr8zBRwCZHwm6y-anl7axxO-A5yD3KNZcuEcA1O3asWdrfMQGU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=9fb46653a895474b95a3bd07896d2149&_t=bfUO_aRHassLZygSRuJPftD0RWFxhVoBe4Lo6ppzEiePclZh7IOHo-TdOXr8zBRwCZHwm6y-anl7axxO-A5yD3KNZcuEcA1O3asWdrfMQGU%3D)
---

Peter,

This is former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you. ⬇️⬇️

On June 10th, my opponent, Sen. Jon Tester likened President Trump to a dictator. This is what a U.S. Senator seeking reelection from a state that President Trump won by 16 points in 2020 - told a group of liberal activists, based in Boston.

**The news of the encounter is just further proof of how far-left Jon Tester has become.**

Jon Tester, a U.S. Senator from Montana, is seeking money from a progressive liberal Boston-based political group whose mission, according to the website is to “ _**find ways that citizens in Blue states can have an impact on national politics.**_ ”

**To recap this:** My opponent, who is running for his 4th term in the U.S. Senate from a state President Trump won in 2020 by 16 points,**referred to Donald Trump as a dictator to a group of liberal donors based in Boston.**

Seems to me like a great way to win over the people of Montana.

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f974abdd1e82461ca4e150a07664251d&_e=Q3cZF_qNKJUdPrfUJay2CZPSOVj1fb-WKxsE73Jl45rZQ8nEeUqqTwOu3zEQk1bdgM_tpDoUF6bo52T5SkJYOP0ytfRjCTcE0EptcAnG2JPt-b71fj7pmeB6H3U4mEpqbipauxorCs9NIJkN5w5ZGFiN_clcNNYO_ysVQS7r3Rod_k6H6xl9r_dYLjMONHBA1G0VjtCdztbQ-ZNXPEJGxVJCZAdqwsUsiFSdBK71rHZZm2a3GGFK2C3sA47jw0mMWCJhmJAimXCED4ftwPEGSQ-m9YTLM4Iz0og6fqOtQLHlVxy7OMy7uybeRRb8cGyq0_QBoJ2XtXTXj2ai6uuCHNhrJOp8JRBS2hs9mq_-yus%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f974abdd1e82461ca4e150a07664251d&_e=Q3cZF_qNKJUdPrfUJay2CZPSOVj1fb-WKxsE73Jl45rZQ8nEeUqqTwOu3zEQk1bdgM_tpDoUF6bo52T5SkJYOP0ytfRjCTcE0EptcAnG2JPt-b71fj7pmeB6H3U4mEpqbipauxorCs9NIJkN5w5ZGFiN_clcNNYO_ysVQS7r3Rod_k6H6xl9r_dYLjMONHBAAOlp9rcSkiMrjAdJYffw6OFF9Z2-UzY0PiuPEN-mHQx_qfPI4nZ9mEWLEMYmoizC5Xd6Yp0_AsjxvHQMn34Xs4bZ52TRGjOs23syvAWAEj8oVOvOIwWmTCCzQcDKS9qYu-8vMlqDEFDcc6j-DdZnABLLevYsqz_Wih_jPfl6mAU%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f974abdd1e82461ca4e150a07664251d&_e=Q3cZF_qNKJUdPrfUJay2CZPSOVj1fb-WKxsE73Jl45rZQ8nEeUqqTwOu3zEQk1bdgM_tpDoUF6bo52T5SkJYOP0ytfRjCTcE0EptcAnG2JPt-b71fj7pmeB6H3U4mEpqbipauxorCs9NIJkN5w5ZGFiN_clcNNYO_ysVQS7r3Rod_k6H6xl9r_dYLjMONHBAxuOJvo7bfXyEGcukEXU0sB503Fca--2DkXrnqIYaMH7MYmIwSsQRpWDjdRq_Iiywf1kL5DOe8dMOCqm_Dj-66P4L04XQvg0TGy4aA_AW894R8bvIvWI3ENOI-cwm_5dvpnNkVrSTYKQpy3NwVEs7_N4oR6oeNddAQ1bzr4yhtPM%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f974abdd1e82461ca4e150a07664251d&_e=Q3cZF_qNKJUdPrfUJay2CZPSOVj1fb-WKxsE73Jl45rZQ8nEeUqqTwOu3zEQk1bdgM_tpDoUF6bo52T5SkJYOP0ytfRjCTcE0EptcAnG2JPt-b71fj7pmeB6H3U4mEpqbipauxorCs9NIJkN5w5ZGFiN_clcNNYO_ysVQS7r3Rod_k6H6xl9r_dYLjMONHBAyMakDwC8YUJKAEqvDe8183MxICTI776ZCWupKQdPiJwk54q0Zs31WTSSpdYOkk-YIM8P5KHXQ4YbMaE4tM_X4TE7TOgGN8M7WXGDrU8Bv2KNpf_VO4O1HvFag9eGr8tUalXMBqvyG8Hhf0Xj84FAz4wt9wn4ngFTnTg5eNUvpi8%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f974abdd1e82461ca4e150a07664251d&_e=Q3cZF_qNKJUdPrfUJay2CZPSOVj1fb-WKxsE73Jl45rZQ8nEeUqqTwOu3zEQk1bdgM_tpDoUF6bo52T5SkJYOP0ytfRjCTcE0EptcAnG2JPt-b71fj7pmeB6H3U4mEpqbipauxorCs9NIJkN5w5ZGFiN_clcNNYO_ysVQS7r3Rod_k6H6xl9r_dYLjMONHBAlAp_DqN0Nn-q9WI2jPyNtgFh02_KFGH0gYT6eqb1ieg_R4ixdTGgOjE-NyTKiB1QFfyEZouVrvSmLMeR_RHKXoEi77YXkHuudD_Pt95u0t6emjdrbfHz_aRbbyxwUcGJ8rPcnCHbeOAmkFMq6m0fYjQkrVSrFW_E3spNo1Bvoco%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f974abdd1e82461ca4e150a07664251d&_e=Q3cZF_qNKJUdPrfUJay2CZPSOVj1fb-WKxsE73Jl45rZQ8nEeUqqTwOu3zEQk1bdgM_tpDoUF6bo52T5SkJYOP0ytfRjCTcE0EptcAnG2JPt-b71fj7pmeB6H3U4mEpqbipauxorCs9NIJkN5w5ZGFiN_clcNNYO_ysVQS7r3Rod_k6H6xl9r_dYLjMONHBAJQc9mR3_6fXsAsfL0Ewe51o1qqO9ZaKREIo0yb9QdX-wu-6bQsQSgKG-9L-h0XyFIXVFXIOmRf-vEjRC1f6w651D0V1UHD0PPAiURjR5j0Og98w7vZZcBBBGg3dnOptMYTLD3xqhL63Hy-F_bXxFq2n3aOK_fVfFtPZciCIuFwk%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances... Dear Friend, I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances... ...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him. That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo. Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend. He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation. And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. But first, let me explain what happened... On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a violent criminal named Quadren Wilson. Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom. Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice. Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out. With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up. Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward. Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle. Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat. Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark. Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster. And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison. Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD). We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) offering to help Mark. This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help. They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge! But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it. This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question: Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family. Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family. Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family. Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF. With deepest gratitude, Becky Wagner P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do. This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others. Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: As a mom, I get it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, We want the best for our kids, and we want to make sure that Michigan is a place where they can thrive. I have two daughters who will graduate from the University of Michigan and make decisions about where to build their lives — and I want the answer to be Michigan. As a mom, I get it. That’s why I’ve been taking decisive actions to fight for our kids' futures and ensure we’re giving them every opportunity to succeed. Whether they’re practicing their ABCs or finishing up their dissertation for their doctorate, I want to support students from pre-K through post-secondary. My budget makes record investments in education that supports every student and lowers the cost of higher education: **We’re giving our youngest learners the tools to excel.** I’ve made the largest investment in K-12 education in history because our children deserve good schools and a world-class education. We’re lowering costs for families and making education more affordable with free pre-K for 5,600 more Michigan kids, free breakfast and lunch for every K-12 student in public school, and a free field trip for all Michigan 4th graders. **We’re making record funding for students and will boost teacher retention.** If you want to be a teacher in Michigan, here’s what we’re offering: a tuition-free path to certification, expanded programs to train staff for classroom roles, teacher mentorship programs, and recruitment, training, and retention for educators in rural areas. **We’re providing a post-graduation path so people can get good-paying, high-skill, and in-demand jobs.** We’re investing in vocational education, lowering the age for Michigan Reconnect from 25 to 21, and expanding eligibility for 350,000 more individuals. We’re also funding the Michigan Achievement Scholarship,_reducing college costs for 80% of students, and enabling 65% to attend tuition-free. _ **[We're fighting to deliver these things and so much more for students and families across the state. And today, I’m asking you to support our work by donating $10 to continue to make Michigan a better place for our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66774508/417544198/2140481003?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230720_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JiMjIyZTQtMWUyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=owEJoxv5EIEDj--vuLQ-dyS19Q5dRC0so0QjvBJbGio=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66774509/417544199/2140481003?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230720_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JiMjIyZTQtMWUyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=owEJoxv5EIEDj--vuLQ-dyS19Q5dRC0so0QjvBJbGio=)**

clean_body: | Folks, We want the best for our kids, and we want to make sure that Michigan is a place where they can thrive. I have two daughters who will graduate from the University of Michigan and make decisions about where to build their lives — and I want the answer to be Michigan. As a mom, I get it. That’s why I’ve been taking decisive actions to fight for our kids' futures and ensure we’re giving them every opportunity to succeed. Whether they’re practicing their ABCs or finishing up their dissertation for their doctorate, I want to support students from pre-K through post-secondary. My budget makes record investments in education that supports every student and lowers the cost of higher education: We’re giving our youngest learners the tools to excel. I’ve made the largest investment in K-12 education in history because our children deserve good schools and a world-class education. We’re lowering costs for families and making education more affordable with free pre-K for 5,600 more Michigan kids, free breakfast and lunch for every K-12 student in public school, and a free field trip for all Michigan 4th graders. We’re making record funding for students and will boost teacher retention. If you want to be a teacher in Michigan, here’s what we’re offering: a tuition-free path to certification, expanded programs to train staff for classroom roles, teacher mentorship programs, and recruitment, training, and retention for educators in rural areas. We’re providing a post-graduation path so people can get good-paying, high-skill, and in-demand jobs. We’re investing in vocational education, lowering the age for Michigan Reconnect from 25 to 21, and expanding eligibility for 350,000 more individuals. We’re also funding the Michigan Achievement Scholarship,reducing college costs for 80% of students, and enabling 65% to attend tuition-free. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** = | = = | = = With your support, we’re making transformative efforts to make education more affordable and accessible, and empowering people to pursue their career goals. Thank you for all that you do to help me move Michigan forward. Gretchen Whitmer Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband is facing 10 years in prison for defending himself
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68b25e20736f40ebb3a3f635fa4fb0e5&_e=m9ngmArj_EoEOAEHwwCDEY4W5a9z1Q3edN_yjs93DIcQFq-VIRBVcRELx-UPmqR6a0TnXJgeawuhMKOOXeB2UMUqDY61AdKvAyS9sS_0fF3JBk7ZQSHQxX3QYhvdb7Y392oVQ_it6gzsitPKs4dxkkrGyH9_xyat5C4ZoWpRtby7SkozZxhWNhlhIXZt9SwVNL6Yb3at-BdlMnD29b7OLgrDaiPA6H9E1qfAJ4xw62XLiymHt7ciF9JEliqMmiBFPsMq_0WoomZiWVOFLlKbpcafIATtIvyMfLHM6ZXgzX8KA16WM0Jo5V_TYi5YVkNl4R86OALXTzLDAsr2gNPkqg%3D%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68b25e20736f40ebb3a3f635fa4fb0e5&_e=m9ngmArj_EoEOAEHwwCDEY4W5a9z1Q3edN_yjs93DIcQFq-VIRBVcRELx-UPmqR6a0TnXJgeawuhMKOOXeB2UMUqDY61AdKvAyS9sS_0fF3JBk7ZQSHQxX3QYhvdb7Y392oVQ_it6gzsitPKs4dxkkrGyH9_xyat5C4ZoWpRtby7SkozZxhWNhlhIXZt9SwVXA9t1YzQg4GsGUJPxHHMsQVkRhCAVAdIuRhnYXZaOQLaLrUiGO1GjWGrAfBIxKQlOrs_wpYmeVQwP5H7cm65rrMgjeHsQlifolgJcKcKkIZ9cae99B3K0a5UnMl3SAjAMmwTpDjrtxqV0jZQoZ4gow%3D%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68b25e20736f40ebb3a3f635fa4fb0e5&_e=m9ngmArj_EoEOAEHwwCDEY4W5a9z1Q3edN_yjs93DIcQFq-VIRBVcRELx-UPmqR6a0TnXJgeawuhMKOOXeB2UMUqDY61AdKvAyS9sS_0fF3JBk7ZQSHQxX3QYhvdb7Y392oVQ_it6gzsitPKs4dxkkrGyH9_xyat5C4ZoWpRtby7SkozZxhWNhlhIXZt9SwVw05CHnYuxbNg05kU5XReW4PMm-R-TjP1orsej-t0KHFnYkWAoTTZz_0JeSadwBI-15O2v44kdwJ9LCI8A-lvG1YquyxTGSxvgxTXXH1vbg0vg5gs6-Z0uUF5QV4qPOMZ_JRsD8x-yepyUrO3bjWVaw%3D%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68b25e20736f40ebb3a3f635fa4fb0e5&_e=m9ngmArj_EoEOAEHwwCDEY4W5a9z1Q3edN_yjs93DIcQFq-VIRBVcRELx-UPmqR6a0TnXJgeawuhMKOOXeB2UMUqDY61AdKvAyS9sS_0fF3JBk7ZQSHQxX3QYhvdb7Y392oVQ_it6gzsitPKs4dxkkrGyH9_xyat5C4ZoWpRtby7SkozZxhWNhlhIXZt9SwVL6IZMqFVmATHJQqMdKJxu5Xsab6E3wJinonbE_flQEclSZsX_POJvCEPccQ2gmtoq_KQRv_oyciBnBs8m969O6_AYpYAnxkf9ufzXRNdLk6CJW6oQZfeOiLrJWlWhYzZnAF1_6pXJl5ALC1VSA1TyQ%3D%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68b25e20736f40ebb3a3f635fa4fb0e5&_e=m9ngmArj_EoEOAEHwwCDEY4W5a9z1Q3edN_yjs93DIcQFq-VIRBVcRELx-UPmqR6a0TnXJgeawuhMKOOXeB2UMUqDY61AdKvAyS9sS_0fF3JBk7ZQSHQxX3QYhvdb7Y392oVQ_it6gzsitPKs4dxkkrGyH9_xyat5C4ZoWpRtby7SkozZxhWNhlhIXZt9SwVMSrX1fkv_P1tyGcJCjyb6cTMzZLNjHPv0DDXi_6MVyd0HDzHuPN0BTnX0ZMwuUcS1Y-zx8--Zx7lZU6lfcZMljxePxKoCoxQt0d6L0vD1WivDoJ9956n7X06K8mE5FPd7nEpW8nC-m3ZgajkyeBu8A%3D%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68b25e20736f40ebb3a3f635fa4fb0e5&_e=m9ngmArj_EoEOAEHwwCDEY4W5a9z1Q3edN_yjs93DIcQFq-VIRBVcRELx-UPmqR6a0TnXJgeawuhMKOOXeB2UMUqDY61AdKvAyS9sS_0fF3JBk7ZQSHQxX3QYhvdb7Y392oVQ_it6gzsitPKs4dxkkrGyH9_xyat5C4ZoWpRtby7SkozZxhWNhlhIXZt9SwVB8Vc_TIO1UQddPg6-3qQlT-tpLcSy7j9p_6MINEKGDB6g2GCR72PyQRMCZx0gehYrQrfXpA0Is0YiUx89Trq7oPbASIe8X1GQYvBlEAYViVylCUX0lpHwSIuuoKGt7SFsng_-xKgm7GKEWpDVC-IlA%3D%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Conservatives Give

| | The GOP believes they've already won Nevada [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66774971/417545830/-100368209?sourceid=1051502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTM0NjczOC0xZjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h6FHxsB8ubk-NLT9xutP-uIj-JLHfAY4D4NpOwAAG3c=&emci=0e7e9157-1e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=45346738-1f27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Republicans are doing everything they can to flip the Senate next year, and Sen. **Jacky Rosen's** seat in Nevada is at the _top_ of their list of targets.

Last year, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto's Nevada victory was the closest Senate race (_decided by just 7,928 votes!_) and the reason we were able to protect our razor-thin Democratic majority. **Nevada was the key to the Senate last year, and it could be the key again in 2024.** **[Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice Senate incumbents like Jacky defend critical blue seats in notorious swing states.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66774985/417545854/-100368209?sourceid=1051502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTM0NjczOC0xZjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h6FHxsB8ubk-NLT9xutP-uIj-JLHfAY4D4NpOwAAG3c=&emci=0e7e9157-1e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=45346738-1f27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)**

Sen. Rosen made waves in 2018 as the _only_ Democratic challenger to unseat a Republican Senate incumbent, and the GOP has been eyeing her seat ever since. Her most prominent challenger was handpicked by Sen. Mitch McConnell, and is as anti-choice as they come. Here's the bad news: **recent polling has Jacky trailing in this race by less than 2%.**

**The GOP believes they have already won Nevada, Peter — but Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto's victory last November is a clear sign that with the fierce support of a pro-choice community like this, we can prove them wrong.** ****We're rolling up our sleeves and helping Democratic pro-choice women like Sen. Rosen prepare for what will likely be some of the closest races of the 2024 cycle. Are you with us? Donate now:**

clean_body: | | | The GOP believes they've already won Nevada Peter, Republicans are doing everything they can to flip the Senate next year, and Sen. Jacky Rosen's seat in Nevada is at the top of their list of targets. Last year, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto's Nevada victory was the closest Senate race (decided by just 7,928 votes!) and the reason we were able to protect our razor-thin Democratic majority. Nevada was the key to the Senate last year, and it could be the key again in 2024. Sen. Rosen made waves in 2018 as the only Democratic challenger to unseat a Republican Senate incumbent, and the GOP has been eyeing her seat ever since. Her most prominent challenger was handpicked by Sen. Mitch McConnell, and is as anti-choice as they come. Here's the bad news: recent polling has Jacky trailing in this race by less than 2%. The GOP believes they have already won Nevada, Peter — but Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto's victory last November is a clear sign that with the fierce support of a pro-choice community like this, we can prove them wrong. **We're rolling up our sleeves and helping Democratic pro-choice women like Sen. Rosen prepare for what will likely be some of the closest races of the 2024 cycle. Are you with us? Donate now: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Friends, When Daniel asked me to continue serving the people of Kentucky as the next lieutenant governor, there was no hesitation.
---
[](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/6473c47565708655/c2041658ce12a52dc3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
[**HELP ELECT DANIEL CAMERON & ROBBY MILLS**](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/6473c47565708655/a2ba6823f99baff8c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
As a member of the General Assembly, I’ve seen Andy Beshear push his radical agenda into our schools, businesses, and homes. He has failed to support our values and it's time for a change. Let’s review the Andy Beshear record:
* There are fewer people working today than when he took office.
* He vetoed my bill to stop boys from competing in girls’ sports.
* Because of his shutdowns, students are suffering from extreme learning loss.
* He released thousands of violent offenders from jail.

_**[Enough is enough.>>](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/6473c47565708655/08a8ed1d2fbd225bc3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ This governor represents the values of California and New York, and **NOT** of Kentucky. With a Cameron/Mills administration, we will **FIRE****ANDY BESHEAR** once and for all, and restore common sense and conservative values in Frankfort. But friends, we can’t do this alone. It takes money to win elections, and Andy Beshear has a lot of it. _**[Will you please chip in $5, $10, $15 or even $25 to help our campaign?](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/6473c47565708655/bba5f962a4dbf7fac3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_

Peter,
__Let’s take a look at a few of the things Jamie McLeod-Skinner is proud of:__

* In 2018, she was proud to call herself a “progressive” when she ran against Republican Congressman Walden.

* In 2022, she was proud to call herself a “progressive” when she ran against moderate Congressman Schrader.

* She’s proud to be endorsed by radical leftist Elizabeth Warren.

* She’s proudly endorsed by the Congressional Progressive Caucus which was founded by Bernie Sanders.

* She proudly declared that she “supports Governor Brown, AOC, and Nancy Pelosi.”

_**Just watch what she had to say when asked if she was a progressive.

clean_body: | | | | This is what she had to say...| Peter, Let’s take a look at a few of the things Jamie McLeod-Skinner is proud of: In 2018, she was proud to call herself a “progressive” when she ran against Republican Congressman Walden. In 2022, she was proud to call herself a “progressive” when she ran against moderate Congressman Schrader. She’s proud to be endorsed by radical leftist Elizabeth Warren. She’s proudly endorsed by the Congressional Progressive Caucus which was founded by Bernie Sanders. She proudly declared that she “supports Governor Brown, AOC, and Nancy Pelosi.” Just watch what she had to say when asked if she was a progressive. | Does this woman sound like a moderate to you? Thank you, Team Lori | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

Terri Sewell is the proud product of Alabama's rural Black Belt and has spent her life fighting for Alabama communities. From her time as one of the only black public finance lawyers in Alabama, when she delivered financing for new campus facilities at Alabama State University, Tuskegee University, and Stillman College, to her work as Congresswoman for Alabama's 7th District, Terri Sewell has delivered results every step of the way. body:
Do you agree? Let me know where you stand if you have a moment. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=9b3262dc372242fa9dde16be1f3ef28b&_t=o_GBMWxA2J3YRxJr9nFGl02fi18bBwitt2Z_JASo-h11zkGuy1gqMqEwNrIvJs1GhfWQN-LOiki_gfvDSChXy4yoRCQu6hPYurxhtv_3we0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=9b3262dc372242fa9dde16be1f3ef28b&_t=o_GBMWxA2J3YRxJr9nFGl02fi18bBwitt2Z_JASo-h11zkGuy1gqMqEwNrIvJs1GhfWQN-LOiki_gfvDSChXy4yoRCQu6hPYurxhtv_3we0%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

This is former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you. ⬇️⬇️

On June 10th, my opponent, Sen. Jon Tester likened President Trump to a dictator. This is what a U.S. Senator seeking reelection from a state that President Trump won by 16 points in 2020 - told a group of liberal activists, based in Boston.

**The news of the encounter is just further proof of how far-left Jon Tester has become.**

Jon Tester, a U.S. Senator from Montana, is seeking money from a progressive liberal Boston-based political group whose mission, according to the website is to “ _**find ways that citizens in Blue states can have an impact on national politics.**_ ”

**To recap this:** My opponent, who is running for his 4th term in the U.S. Senate from a state President Trump won in 2020 by 16 points,**referred to Donald Trump as a dictator to a group of liberal donors based in Boston.**

Seems to me like a great way to win over the people of Montana.

I’m curious to know if you agree with progressive Senator Jon Tester: **[Do you think President Trump is a dictator, too?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9b3262dc372242fa9dde16be1f3ef28b&_e=hORpTzviYgtF2UMrrZyHasoCmza1jWBJsPPiulyAY7H8_llo9Sbu38LoNCqA91FrXbJrvi0VZvssiig-thrGalmsKK2qbo7x-WLp16F3oQExEZ_MZh6WfizeSibRceQu8oXRlJmzk-hSO4TZtMow1fTJyuYSP2fkMUZR2S5EBZM2v3Fi8XQqBan_I0xpyYLIHgcsA5Z1rGc5NilZaAmV0cDNBt5XHMWgjj5p7oIxN0j_nejIGuWIMGtAVJr7LjGsKg69bOqDenkJ-jGgYWPR8db9q4oxO_M-7XQ9cVYOPOWY5l2XAoX6ejmdxYwhZQElM0q60BxWk_NjgxJN_t3nYe4fK-Q7UcSoJMs8NVxjlHpqiIr_c0b2dCUHW_T3NdBrRug81iGP1azetxpn0iyx2g%3D%3D)**

[**DO YOU THINK PRESIDENT TRUMP WAS A DICTATOR?
RECORD YOUR RESPONSE
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9b3262dc372242fa9dde16be1f3ef28b&_e=hORpTzviYgtF2UMrrZyHasoCmza1jWBJsPPiulyAY7H8_llo9Sbu38LoNCqA91FrXbJrvi0VZvssiig-thrGalmsKK2qbo7x-WLp16F3oQExEZ_MZh6WfizeSibRceQu8oXRlJmzk-hSO4TZtMow1fTJyuYSP2fkMUZR2S5EBZM2v3Fi8XQqBan_I0xpyYLIHgcsA5Z1rGc5NilZaAmV0cDNBt5XHMWgjj5p7oIxN0j_nejIGuWIMGtAVJr7LjGsCm3NCjrgAESz2H3zi8ghBhcHlNfnYomhn6IzKyKydLnB7D1JbsKQMX8Y-0mWrMz--NgQMCRMtCowuRMIdkEvLyJdwSAQLp4E6cqGuHLZrd6iO_kj1dZzsK-h90deGVbjYVxap3nvJWUXjU7x0aMq8w%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,there is no telling how widely this news story will be covered by the mainstream press in Montana, if at all. That’s why **I am counting on folks just like you to make sure this story gets attention it deserves.**

**[I’m emailing you today in hopes that you’ll offer me your own opinion on the matter](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9b3262dc372242fa9dde16be1f3ef28b&_e=hORpTzviYgtF2UMrrZyHasoCmza1jWBJsPPiulyAY7H8_llo9Sbu38LoNCqA91FrXbJrvi0VZvssiig-thrGalmsKK2qbo7x-WLp16F3oQExEZ_MZh6WfizeSibRceQu8oXRlJmzk-hSO4TZtMow1fTJyuYSP2fkMUZR2S5EBZM2v3Fi8XQqBan_I0xpyYLIHgcsA5Z1rGc5NilZaAmV0cDNBt5XHMWgjj5p7oIxN0j_nejIGuWIMGtAVJr7LjGsgb4NTSnfn1jda-oL2_cOrnTh_tAQqcx6FQrwdnhr5A99tgKPiDrhKRmJicnithAJEnQsyHV9x-qxdjRMwY9-uyyniNUeVb-Wpzak9rsTDjb6VWeGsDk5amAZ2uI3bI4StZJgnuwFk6T-cGp96EO2rw%3D%3D)** , join my team, and perhaps even contribute a few dollars that we can use to inform voters that the lone Democrat- **federal and statewide elected official -** in Montana is pandering to liberal out of state donors and likening President Trump to a dictator.

Thank you for your input,

clean_body: Do you agree? Let me know where you stand if you have a moment. | | Fellow Conservative, This is former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you. ⬇️⬇️ On June 10th, my opponent, Sen. Jon Tester likened President Trump to a dictator. This is what a U.S. Senator seeking reelection from a state that President Trump won by 16 points in 2020 - told a group of liberal activists, based in Boston. The news of the encounter is just further proof of how far-left Jon Tester has become. Jon Tester, a U.S. Senator from Montana, is seeking money from a progressive liberal Boston-based political group whose mission, according to the website is to “ find ways that citizens in Blue states can have an impact on national politics. ” To recap this: My opponent, who is running for his 4th term in the U.S. Senate from a state President Trump won in 2020 by 16 points,referred to Donald Trump as a dictator to a group of liberal donors based in Boston. Seems to me like a great way to win over the people of Montana. I’m curious to know if you agree with progressive Senator Jon Tester: Fellow Conservative,there is no telling how widely this news story will be covered by the mainstream press in Montana, if at all. That’s why I am counting on folks just like you to make sure this story gets attention it deserves. , join my team, and perhaps even contribute a few dollars that we can use to inform voters that the lone Democrat- federal and statewide elected official - in Montana is pandering to liberal out of state donors and likening President Trump to a dictator. Thank you for your input, | Hooyah, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. * I was the first Pennsylvania state legislator to post my expenses online – everything from office supplies to my district office lease (I also co-sponsored the state's open records law).
* After fighting to eliminate automatic pay raises for legislators to save taxpayers money, I was one of the first to give back the annual cost of living adjustments all lawmakers receive.
* I was the first statewide elected official in Pennsylvania to support legalizing recreational marijuana use.

"Firsts" are how we move forward and make progress. Your grassroots support could make the difference between winning and losing this race.

name: Greta Kemp Martin
subject: This fight starts with conversations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
I’m hoping you’ll be a part of the conversations I’m having by letting me know what matters most to you today

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66776733/417552016/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_S_230720IS_B_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEwN2EyNzktMjMyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHlgRDBUdgY2QTldvclQqngson7g_mQm2ihF78qJw20=) Peter,

There are a few things that stand out to me as I’m talking with voters across Mississippi. Our communities are worried about affordable healthcare access, especially when our leaders refuse to expand Medicaid. Folks are uncertain about their ability to access reproductive health care from birth control to abortion under an Attorney General who led the charge to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. Families are tired of seeing their hard-earned tax dollars thrown away as a result of unchecked corruption and waste by our state government.

I decided to run for Mississippi Attorney General because I was born and raised here, and I know we deserve better from our elected officials. I’m committed to fighting for individuals so each of us can truly thrive in every corner of our state, and that starts with conversations.

I’m hoping that you’ll be a part of those conversations by telling me what you care about most today. [Will you take just a moment to take this quick survey to let me know what issues are most important to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66776735/417552018/-1738390048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEwN2EyNzktMjMyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHlgRDBUdgY2QTldvclQqngson7g_mQm2ihF78qJw20=&emci=d26b18f0-2127-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=f107a279-2327-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13214820)
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66776737/417552020/-1738390048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEwN2EyNzktMjMyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHlgRDBUdgY2QTldvclQqngson7g_mQm2ihF78qJw20=&emci=d26b18f0-2127-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=f107a279-2327-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=13214820) Thanks so much for your continued support – I can’t win this fight for Mississippi without you!

_**
---
Friend, I know I’ve already told you that these endless witch hunts and indictments are _really_ about intimidation, election interference, and _fear_.

---
But there’s another side to that fear.

---
Crooked Joe and his Deep State thugs aren’t _just_ trying to scare Americans out of voting for our campaign... _
_
---
_**...Believe it or not, the Left is also downright AFRAID OF _YOU_.**_

---
Because our beautiful movement isn’t really about _me_ — it’s about giving YOU a voice in your own country.

---
And the Left knows full well that our true STRENGTH comes from the more than 74 MILLION red-blooded patriots who make up our movement and who REFUSE to bend the knee to tyranny.

---
You see, Friend, the Democrats may have a corrupt and weaponized Justice Department at their disposal, they may have the special interest billionaires and fake news media on their side, they may even have the cowardly and disloyal RINOs rushing to their aid...

---
_**...But the power _WE_ hold is a power the likes of which they will NEVER know: the collective MIGHT of a PEOPLE-POWERED GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT.**_

---
Now, in what is no doubt the FINAL BATTLE for the heart and soul of our country, will YOU help me show our many enemies just how powerful we truly are with a SURGE of grassroots support to peacefully DEFEND our movement?

But there’s another side to that fear. Crooked Joe and his Deep State thugs aren’t just trying to scare Americans out of voting for our campaign... ...Believe it or not, the Left is also downright AFRAID OF YOU. Because our beautiful movement isn’t really about me — it’s about giving YOU a voice in your own country. And the Left knows full well that our true STRENGTH comes from the more than 74 MILLION red-blooded patriots who make up our movement and who REFUSE to bend the knee to tyranny. You see, Friend, the Democrats may have a corrupt and weaponized Justice Department at their disposal, they may have the special interest billionaires and fake news media on their side, they may even have the cowardly and disloyal RINOs rushing to their aid... ...But the power WE hold is a power the likes of which they will NEVER know: the collective MIGHT of a PEOPLE-POWERED GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT. Now, in what is no doubt the FINAL BATTLE for the heart and soul of our country, will YOU help me show our many enemies just how powerful we truly are with a SURGE of grassroots support to peacefully DEFEND our movement? | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. clean_body: They’re selling tickets for $10,000 | = | Hi Peter - MAJOR NEWS: Kevin McCarthy is coming to our district tonight for a fancy fundraiser in support of Josh’s new GOP opponent! We got a hold of the invite and they’re charging people up to $10,000 to attend. 🤯 = = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- We’ve been warning for months that Josh is going to be Kevin McCarthy’s top target this year. If you didn’t believe it after the attack ads, now you know how serious this really is. The Speaker of the House is coming to our district because he knows this seat is going to decide control of Congress next year. He’s terrified because Democrats can win enough seats in California alone to take the Speaker’s gavel - but only if we keep this seat blue. = We can’t do this without you! \- Team Harder *

subject: ALERT: Disclosures Reveal Shift in Uihlein Political Donations
body:
Disclosures reveal Elizabeth Uihlein donated only $12,000 to IL GOP, while the Uihlein-Funded PAC continues to pay its chair $25,000 per month.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c3f7430c424b/alert-disclosures-reveal-shift-in-uihlein-political-donations?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Elizabeth Uihlein Donates Just $12,000 to IL GOP, While the Uihlein-Funded PAC Continues to Pay its Chairman a $25,000 Monthly Consulting Fee, New Disclosures Reveal (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/elizabeth-uihlein-donates-just-12000-to-il-gop-while-the-uihlein-funded-pac-continues-to-pay-its-chairman-a-25000-monthly-consulting-fee-new-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/elizabeth-uihlein-donates-just-12000-to-il-gop-while-the-uihlein-funded-pac-continues-to-pay-its-chairman-a-25000-monthly-consulting-fee-new-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Elizabeth Uihlein (Source: Paul Morigi/Getty Images)

Recent financial disclosures filed with the Illinois State Board of Elections revealed that Elizabeth Uihlein (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedContributions.aspx?FiledDocID=iklC9EhR%2bagIBtmvQEu4lA%3d%3d&ContributionType=zE4UTaWYkl1RdymXPLZxQwzsAP9P4ghkZA2i6IaESd1kUdPzCJLwaPqANp%2f5Rc0Imd73yqYn8DQ%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – wife of conservative mega donor billionaire Richard Uihlein made a $12,000 contribution to the embattled Illinois Republican Party in April – a far cry from the $52 million her husband spent last year in support of Darren Bailey’s campaign for governor.

Records revealed that Richard Uihlein
donated (https://abc7chicago.com/jb-pritzker-darren-bailey-illinois-governor-richard-uihlein/12317194/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) $42 million to People Who Play By The Rules PAC – a pro-Bailey PAC, and another $10 million to Bailey’s campaign during the 2022 Illinois election cycle.

And just weeks before the election, the Illinois political consulting class, including the pro-Bailey PAC, were out promoting a
single poll (https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2022/10/21/poll-republican-darren-bailey-virtual-tie-illinois-democrat-gov-j-b-pritzker/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that showed Bailey within “striking” distance and only two points behind Pritzker during the final stretch of the campaign.

But on election night, the governor’s race was called at the exact moment the polls closed, with the Associated Press declaring Gov. Pritzker the winner at
7:00 pm CDT (https://thehill.com/homenews/campaign/3716206-democrat-pritzker-wins-reelection-as-illinois-governor/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Bailey would lose to Gov. Pritzker by 12 points.

The results left Republicans stunned – including many supporters who were still en route to Bailey’s election night party in Springfield.

And sources confirmed with
Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/source-uihlein-camp-mortified-after-spending-50m-for-il-gov-race-to-be-called-minutes-after-polls-closed.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) shortly after the election that members within Uihlein’s circle were left “mortified” by the election results after spending $52 million – including Elizabeth.

In February, Elizabeth Uihlein joined IL GOP leaders and
endorsed (https://www.politico.com/news/2023/02/06/megadonor-gop-richard-elizabeth-uihlein-00081267?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the embattled chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC) Ronna Romney-McDaniel for re-election over the conservative grassroots candidate Harmeet Dhillon – who received an endorsement from her husband (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/richard-uihlein-backs-harmeet-dhillon-for-rnc-chair-says-gop-needs-new-leader-to-fight-radical-left.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Richard.

Ronna-McDaniel, the niece of Republican Sen. Mitt Romney, for years went by Ronna Romney, until 2017 when President Trump asked her to drop her famous last name after her uncle Mitt grew critical of Trump during his presidency.

Romney-McDaniel was under intense pressure last year after a string of high profile midterm election losses, and the failure of the RNC to wage a substantive battle against widespread voter fraud in key battleground states across the country.

In the last week, the Illinois State Board of Elections website also revealed in the latest filings that the founder, president and treasurer of the pro-Bailey PAC – Naples, Florida-based Chicago radio show host Dan Proft (Starfish Consulting LLC) continues to pay himself a $25,000 a month
consulting fee (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=IPsw%2f43Xwm2kkD4fa5hDcw%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) using the PAC’s leftover funds from Uihlein’s donations.

In April,
Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) reported that disclosures revealed that the PAC paid three political consultants $142,000, while spending just $3,700 to support three conservative school board candidates during the April elections.

In addition to the $75,000 consulting fee that the PAC paid its founder, president and treasurer, disclosures also reveal that the PACs
communications director (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=IPsw%2f43Xwm2kkD4fa5hDcw%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (TMKS, LLC) was also paid a $25,000 consulting fee in two monthly installments.

In the last six months, the PAC has paid out $242,000 in consulting fees – $150,000 to the PAC’s chairman alone, for the benefit of three conservative school board candidates who were supported by a single $3,700 endorsement letter.

Giving the benefit of the doubt that this was an honest day’s work, and the billable consulting hours totaled in support of the $3,700 letter was eight hours, that’s $30,000 per hour in billable hours charged by the PAC.

The next election in Illinois is not scheduled until March 19, 2024.
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b8479f8f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_07_20_05_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b8479f8f2d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Jane Kwon
subject: FWD: Enter OLCV’s 2023 Photo Contest!
body:
| | | Dear Peter, Over the past week, we’ve received some incredible photos for our **2023 Environmental Photo Contest**! Check out a few of the entries below: Jennifer L Rehmel captured a man teaching his two sons the traditional method of fishing while watching the incredible sunset at Giles French Park. “I was reminded that the First Nations called this place home long before my European ancestors set foot in this country. The Columbia Gorge is full of reminders of the culture of the First Nations. The fishing platforms that sat on the banks of the river reminded me how their lives are tied to the annual return of the salmon,” Jennifer wrote. And this photo submitted by Mike Rhine, who recently became an uncle to his niece Aurora pictured here, was taken at Cannon Beach. Mike wrote, “None of my siblings have had kids, so I've never been an uncle until now! Being able to be involved in her life as she experiences the wonders of life and Oregon means the absolute world to me.” I hope these photos will inspire you to submit your own! You can send in photos of yourself with loved ones and pets enjoying the outdoors, of nature and wildlife, climate change, or climate impacts. You have until **August 31st to email your photo(s) to[respond@olcv.org](mailto:respond@olcv.org)**. In the forwarded email below, you’ll find more details about the photo contest. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out! Thank you, Jane Kwon
Communications Coordinator, OLCV
Dear Peter, Summer’s here, which means it’s time for our Photo Contest! We’re beginning to prepare our Scorecard, and a major part of our Scorecard is the beautiful photos of our state that you share with us. We’ve had categories and themes in previous contests, but this year, we have an open theme. Because **we want to know how you like to enjoy the Oregon we’re all working together to protect.** Whether you’re traveling to the coast with loved ones, hiking with your pets, or observing clouds, birds and other local happenings from your front porch–send us your photos! Every year, we love seeing photos of people outdoors enjoying nature and wildlife (with or without furry friends), though in recent years, we’ve also seen some incredible pictures of nature nearby, climate impacts, and the resiliency of our communities. **So this year, please send us the photos that most resonate with you!**

**You have until August 31st to submit your photos of Oregon's outdoors. Send us an email at respond@olcv.org with ‘Photo Contest’ in the subject line and your photos attached.** You may send up to three. Be sure to include your name, the location where the photo was taken, and a short description of why it’s meaningful to you. Select photos will be featured in our 2023 Environmental Scorecard, and one grand-prize winner will be on the cover! All winners will receive a surprise gift. We’ll also post the photos on our Facebook page after our Scorecard is released in the fall, so find and tag yours. I can't wait to see them! Best,
Jane Kwon
Communications Coordinator, OLCV |

name: Your America
subject: Jason Aldean’s controversial song goes No. 1
body:
The right calls for CMT boycott
| | | | |
---|---|---|---|---
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29587%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=41PcFKN2m0bSx9KKxKbhhw&sysid=1)

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: have you heard the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Now, the stakes are even higher.
| | |
---
Friend, have you heard the news? **Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand just introduced a resolution to finally codify the Equal Rights Amendment into the U.S. Constitution!**
The ERA would establish that civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender — including our reproductive freedoms. Activists have been fighting for 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and with abortion access under attack, we can't wait any longer.
There's no one better than Kirsten to lead this fight — she's bold, relentless and never backs away from a challenge. But by introducing this huge piece of legislation, Kirsten has put a target on her back. **With Republicans eyeing her seat for defeat, Kirsten was already heading into a tough reelection fight._Now, the stakes are even higher._**
**Kirsten can't go up against Mitch McConnell, the GOP and their far-right megadonors without strong grassroots support. **_[**Please, will you add your name to stand with Kirsten in her fight for gender equality by endorsing her campaign right now? She's counting on 10,000 of her top supporters to step up — **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66778999/417560322/-1253400623?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4297-su-nd&refcode=jtk4297-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ0MDRmNC0yNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QH8yrW8P8FVHtd01p_bi9jrVck5r7yl8SGJyWrkozRc=&emci=d605d08f-9f25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=96d404f4-2727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)[**including you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66779000/417560323/-1253400623?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4297-su-nd&refcode=jtk4297-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ0MDRmNC0yNzI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QH8yrW8P8FVHtd01p_bi9jrVck5r7yl8SGJyWrkozRc=&emci=d605d08f-9f25-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=96d404f4-2727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)_
