---
The Left is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities, brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX DOLLARS. Turning Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help. [**That's why I'm offering you this special thank-you gift when you make a donation of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjdle8m3tdgtvm7qbqh8vkhtttlfnh8fffkqqjt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie0ob6cjh2bs) We want to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned Americans as we can! I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people with their toxic “woke” ideology. [**But we're not giving up. We're fighting back by exposing them in _The College Scam_ , and I want to send you a copy as a special thank-you for your support.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb2mru784o858lp098gu4jqvggd11sgf0vrj92l0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie0ob6cjh2bs)

---
When you read _The College Scam_ , you'll learn: \- My 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge of whether or not it’s a good investment for students OR taxpayers \- The real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness \- How the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists. Instead, it combines frontline experience from my eleven years criss-crossing America to speak with students, extensive research into the dirty secrets of higher education, and a prosecutor's intensity to present my case against the College Cartel. This book has a phenomenal **_4.7 out of five stars on Amazon_** , with glowing reviews like:
> _“Charlie Kirk does a great job of exposing the craziness on contemporary college campuses. Even for those reasonably well informed about this, he adds more valuable information.” -- Susan_

> _"Charlie absolutely nails the problems of the system... Thanks!! Keep doing what you are doing!!” -- Michal_
And there are hundreds more just like these from grassroots Americans who are ready to fight back against this rigged, bloated, and broken college system. Are you one of them? Are you ready to arm yourself with the knowledge and the strategy that will help us dismantle the College Cartel? [**Then please -- let me send you a copy of The College Scam right now. All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of any amount, even just a few dollars, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1btmm7feucjooj144tvd6csrkhq5h08fn0bj0qo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie0ob6cjh2bs)

# The pollsters are RIGGING this Election!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter, You and I know that the mainstream media has been bias against conservatives for a long time.But now that same media, through bias polls, are putting their thumb on the scale in an even graver way. And I’m trying to hold them accountable. [**For me to continue to hold them accountable, I need your help. subject: Guess what's back? 🗺️

body:
Earning the vote in every one of these counties is how we’ll win.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=331%2E552475%2EltyEUF)
Hi Peter,
I’m running for re-election, so you know what that means — **_the map is back!_**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230720-1?refcode=em20230720-1&refcode2=331_552475_ltyEUF&akid=331%2E552475%2EltyEUF)
When Republicans look at this map, they see an opportunity to take back the Senate. **The NRSC is already launching attack ads against me, and recruiting candidates to take back this seat in 2024.**
**[We have to do all that we can to defend this seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. Peter, can you donate to our campaign to keep PA blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230720-1?refcode=em20230720-1&refcode2=331_552475_ltyEUF&akid=331%2E552475%2EltyEUF)**
Families, union workers, and middle-class Americans across our state see something else in this map: massive investments in next-generation infrastructure and family-sustaining jobs.
That’s what we can achieve if we earn the votes of Pennsylvanians in every county from Erie to Bucks.
**[Let’s show the GOP that Pennsylvania is ready for the major fight ahead. Can you chip in any amount now to keep me in the Senate and protect our majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230720-1?refcode=em20230720-1&refcode2=331_552475_ltyEUF&akid=331%2E552475%2EltyEUF)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230720-1?refcode=em20230720-1&refcode2=331_552475_ltyEUF&akid=331%2E552475%2EltyEUF)**
You can be sure you’ll see more of this map soon — and we’re putting the work in NOW to ensure it stays blue on Election Day.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

| | | July is almost over, and right now, it’s looking like we’re going to fall short of our critical fundraising goal. The amount we’re able to raise this month, and every month this year, is directly tied to how much we can fund our programs to protect the freedom to vote. We’re laser-focused on mitigating the impacts of Brian Kemp’s anti-democratic attacks in Georgia so that every eligible voter can make their voice heard in the 2024 election — and we rely on your support to do this important work. If everyone reading this email chips in $25.48 (our average contribution this month) right away, we’ll get on track towards meeting our July goal within minutes. But we estimate that 83% of people who receive this email won’t read it, and even fewer will be able to respond with a donation. We’re laser-focused on mitigating the impacts of Brian Kemp’s anti-democratic attacks in Georgia so that every eligible voter can make their voice heard in the 2024 election — and we rely on your support to do this important work. If everyone reading this email chips in $25.48 (our average contribution this month) right away, we’ll get on track towards meeting our July goal within minutes. name: Tina Smith
subject: One step forward, two steps back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our ability to protect abortion access is contingent on expanding the Supreme Court, abolishing the filibuster, and defending our fragile Democratic Senate majority. |
#
Folks — For every step forward we make when it comes to reproductive health care, the right wing pulls us another two steps back. **The Good:** Last week, the FDA approved the first over-the-counter birth control pill. The availability of this medication at pharmacies would go a long way toward making reproductive health care more accessible to everyone. **The Bad:** The House of Representatives passed its annual defense bill with a provision banning the Department of Defense from paying for travel for abortion-related services for members of the military. Fortunately, this amendment stands no chance in the Senate (thank goodness for our Democratic majority!). **The Ugly:** The Republican Governor of Iowa signed into law what amounts to an outright ban on abortion. It’s just plain dangerous, and I’m doing everything I can to make sure abortion access is safeguarded at the federal level. **[Can you chip in to support our work to ensure that reproductive rights are restored to every American and abortion becomes safe, legal, and accessible for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66779746/417562984/-1701231322?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20230720_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjEyODFlNC0yYTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JF-KM69-Ep_Ma-xUJ9jQGHHyriT-csUh3m-n11Um2vI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66779747/417562991/-1701231322?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20230720_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjEyODFlNC0yYTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JF-KM69-Ep_Ma-xUJ9jQGHHyriT-csUh3m-n11Um2vI=)

As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I’ve seen first-hand how important it is for women to make their own health care decisions. I’ll always fight for our autonomy, and I’m doing everything in my power in Congress to ensure reproductive rights are restored as a freedom afforded to all.
**But our ability to protect abortion access is contingent on expanding the Supreme Court, abolishing the filibuster, and defending our fragile Democratic Senate majority.**
I’m committed to doing all of these things — because when it comes to protecting reproductive rights, I will never ever back down.
**[Can you pitch in today to support our work to restore and expand abortion access?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66779754/417563006/-1701231322?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20230720_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjEyODFlNC0yYTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JF-KM69-Ep_Ma-xUJ9jQGHHyriT-csUh3m-n11Um2vI=)**

clean_body: Our ability to protect abortion access is contingent on expanding the Supreme Court, abolishing the filibuster, and defending our fragile Democratic Senate majority. | Folks — For every step forward we make when it comes to reproductive health care, the right wing pulls us another two steps back. The Good: Last week, the FDA approved the first over-the-counter birth control pill. The availability of this medication at pharmacies would go a long way toward making reproductive health care more accessible to everyone. The Bad: The House of Representatives passed its annual defense bill with a provision banning the Department of Defense from paying for travel for abortion-related services for members of the military. Fortunately, this amendment stands no chance in the Senate (thank goodness for our Democratic majority!). The Ugly: The Republican Governor of Iowa signed into law what amounts to an outright ban on abortion. It’s just plain dangerous, and I’m doing everything I can to make sure abortion access is safeguarded at the federal level. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = As the only Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood, I’ve seen first-hand how important it is for women to make their own health care decisions. I’ll always fight for our autonomy, and I’m doing everything in my power in Congress to ensure reproductive rights are restored as a freedom afforded to all. But our ability to protect abortion access is contingent on expanding the Supreme Court, abolishing the filibuster, and defending our fragile Democratic Senate majority. I’m committed to doing all of these things — because when it comes to protecting reproductive rights, I will never ever back down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for joining me in this important fight. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

**Let’s get one thing straight: Abortion is healthcare.**

Here on Team Salinas, we not only believe that reproductive care should be legal, but it needs to be safe, accessible, and affordable for all people. Full stop.

But team, we know we don’t need to tell you that Washington Republicans are working harder than ever to roll back the clock and strip Americans of their reproductive freedoms.

**Extremist Republicans have proven that they’ll do whatever it takes to continue on their dangerous, anti-abortion crusade – no matter the cost to the American people.** And now, it’s up to us to fight back.
| **We can’t let these assaults on our bodily autonomy go unanswered. But with a tough fight ahead, we need to know if you’re with us.

Are you with us in the fight to stand up to anti-choice extremism and prepared to codify Roe once and for all?**

name: Team Heidi
subject: just two weeks away, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
Peter,
We’re exactly two weeks away from Election Day.
As Heidi’s team, we wanted to share some ways you can help her campaign for Nashville mayor and get more folks to the polls:
1️⃣ Reach out to your friends and family with election reminders and make a plan to vote with them. On its own, this can greatly increase our chances of securing the votes we need!
2️⃣ Join our campaign as a volunteer! [https://www.mobilize.us/campbell20/event/564232/?referring_vol=6075372&share_context=dashboard-event-details&sharer_role=SharerRole.ORGANIZER] Whether you’re door knocking, making phone calls or sending text messages, you’re exponentially increasing the chances of electing Heidi.
3️⃣ Continue making grassroots contributions to campaigns like ours. Your support helps us pay our staff, keep up our voter contact efforts and purchase key materials for volunteers. Here’s our link to donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
There are several ways you can make an impact in the outcome of this election, Peter. With just two weeks left until Election Day, we're going to need all of our neighbors to play a role in achieving our goals.
We can’t afford to have anyone on the sidelines when we’re working to finally put Music City first.
Peter, we need your help to carry out our extensive voter contact strategy. Over the next two weeks, every dollar in the door will have a direct impact on our ability to connect with voters. Will you help us Get Out The Vote with a contribution of any amount today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
GET OUT THE VOTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
With gratitude,
Team Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230720_em_fr_b1_TH_acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
www.voteheidicampbell.com [http://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]

Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
This book has a phenomenal 4.7 out of five stars on Amazon, with glowing reviews like:

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7rgbsav3fctn4ronom7cvmch1padtkhds7gvv60_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie4p34cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of **_The College Scam_** \-- have you? [**If not, I want to send you your very own copy when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to TPUSA today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9cgd4torvfel9smm6nmaes54oa7phc5bg022boo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie4p34cph2bs) Yes -- ANY AMOUNT! Even a gift of $5 will help us cover the cost of shipping. [**Just click here to get your copy!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zomhesfi269n5rhu53u6gpm1jsdghktfi2dbksmg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie4p34cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrrmjg3s742tsog0s6991fh098q0fu1htv82oodo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie4p34cph2bs)
---
The Left is waging an all-out war on America's colleges and universities, brainwashing an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom -- and subsidizing their destructive work with YOUR TAX DOLLARS. Turning Point USA is fighting back -- but we need your help. [**That's why I'm offering you this special thank-you gift when you make a donation of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkd6kok24tsaj02r2fv0f04f7u6h44cci47kmtf8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie4p34cph2bs) We want to get this important book into the hands of as many concerned Americans as we can! I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the biggest and most impactful pro-America student organization with 600,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've seen firsthand how the College Cartel is brainwashing young people with their toxic “woke” ideology. [**But we're not giving up. We're fighting back by exposing them in _The College Scam_ , and I want to send you a copy as a special thank-you for your support.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4kmkb9aj4rugr7vp5qm505o1d0g5379fogb1vgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie4p34cph2bs)
---
[Get Your Copy](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmj12p0r68l0si7ransas4ohlm9q2454j2fvjdm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ie4p34cph2bs)
---
When you read _The College Scam_ , you'll learn: \- My 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge of whether or not it’s a good investment for students OR taxpayers \- The real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness \- How the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And remember -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I’ll let the facts speak for themselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friend,
I am reaching out to you today to ask you to split a contribution between Power to the Polls Wisconsin, a voter turnout project committed to getting infrequent voters to the polls, and The Long Run.
[**If that’s all you need to hear, please use this link to make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford to Power to the Polls and The Long Run today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em230720-1-t1&t=1&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em230720-1-t1&t=2&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG)
Otherwise, give me a chance to explain:
Power to the Polls is a community-driven organizing operation in Wisconsin that has and will continue to deliver results.
But don’t just take it from me, the facts speak for themselves. Here's just some of what Power to the Polls accomplished in the historic April 2023 election:
* 175 organizers knocked on over 88,000 doors communicating directly with voters
* Sent hundreds of thousands of direct mail pieces, texts, and phone calls
* Invested in digital, streaming, and Black radio advertising to reach voters where they are
* **Improved voter turnout by 64% in Milwaukee** — which is 44,040 additional votes than the 2019 election

These organizing efforts are what led to Democratic success in April and the election of Janet Protasiewicz in the WI Supreme Court race that flipped the court’s conservative majority to liberal for the first time in 15 years.
By building up a large base of Black, brown, and working-class voters, Power to the Polls has proven that a community-driven, power-building organizing operation fills key gaps and provides opportunities for communities to reclaim their power in the electoral process — because when these voters stay home, we lose.
**Power to the Polls has delivered meaningful results and change, and they will be vital in the re-election of President Biden and Senator Baldwin next year.**
In 2024, we can’t leave anything up to chance in a state as critical as WI. My race came down to less than 30,000 votes. President Biden defeated Trump in 2020 by less than 30,000 votes. Hillary Clinton lost in 2016 by less than 30,000 votes. Supporting Power to the Polls can be the difference between winning and losing the White House, so I am asking:
[**Can you please split a $5 contribution between Power to the Polls and the Long Run today? Every donation will help empower and turn out voters of color in Wisconsin, and help us keep Wisconsin blue.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em230720-1-t1&t=3&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG)
You have stood by my side and supported me in many different ways. I hope you can step up once more to support this meaningful movement.
With gratitude,
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em230720-1-t1&t=4&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=4664_196590_JRlQVG&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=4664%2E196590%2EJRlQVG)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: No contribution necessary, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230720_em_pet_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230720_em_pet_b1_KP_react]
Friend, I realized that while I've been telling you a lot about who I am, I haven't spent a lot of time telling you about what I stand for.
To give you a peek – just this week, I was proud to join our organized labor family for a "practice picket".
https://m10pjwpm.paperform.co [https://m10pjwpm.paperform.co]
No matter the issue, my priority will always be Indiana's working families. Before I tell you more, I'm a strong believer in keeping an open line of communication between people in office and people in our communities. I want to hear it from you – what issues matter most? [https://m10pjwpm.paperform.co]
COMPLETE OUR SURVEY >> [https://m10pjwpm.paperform.co]
When it comes to taking care of Hoosiers, and making Indiana a home we can all be proud of, I'm focused on a few things –
1️⃣ Developing an economy that works by working to unrig a system that only benefits wealthy and big businesses.
2️⃣ Expanding healthcare by making insurance programs more accessible, cracking down on predatory premium spikes, and securing the right for every American to make their own medical decisions.
3️⃣ Ensuring every student, regardless of zip code, has access to a quality education by fighting for key investments so school districts from Lawrenceburg to Gary have the resources they need to succeed.
Talking about my priorities is all fine and well, but if we're actually going to bring significant, positive changes to our community, it starts with hearing about their concerns first-hand.
Which is why my team is working hard to reach people across the state. We really want to know, Friend – what issues should be top priorities? [https://m10pjwpm.paperform.co]
SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS [https://m10pjwpm.paperform.co]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230720_em_pet_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230720_em_pet_b1_KP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Take a look at this:

If you ask us, those are rookie numbers.
There are more than a million people on this list. Thousands and thousands of you have confirmed to us that you’re Veterans over the years.
So here’s a challenge:
Tuberville found 5000 Veterans. Let’s beat that.

**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=818886b125a44171b83fb39b54e435a4&_e=Gy2Wojc18UpzKjml96Ept4hNRVakmxJWQQ4gXDssKjPVGaOnOOK3v74ux9DzQPoY3b9EgQlOwl_Mwjr7yQ3ZNc63hd8Nv7slaaVJ7gP9eks9yorRStppgA4b8eC9_q2785j2pF6FBLitIf_R98zZ6DxaT_Pd0mcFGkiwyqsDrJ7WnfITmMSiY4k9iJ1k026loYkMzN-VCWzLnaSaeiexb5nVwFalAEFVsI6m7cRzOOGsQoLh4SgsdpYycg8aiYDfm7Z8U7H2lEXmT8U8c0zlvYPQb7Ls8dxNil2Zrmumd_5Q5YbR6mL1-osLE-JSEYIgKizn4lWrZ0ie5pxISdvWRkf9JG0HIR0ZxpNiz3dVPkDW0rE3QMRVnw3nMouWYyfDncBI2lFFpJf2j54A0CveuQ%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=818886b125a44171b83fb39b54e435a4&_e=Gy2Wojc18UpzKjml96Ept4hNRVakmxJWQQ4gXDssKjPVGaOnOOK3v74ux9DzQPoY3b9EgQlOwl_Mwjr7yQ3ZNc63hd8Nv7slaaVJ7gP9eks9yorRStppgA4b8eC9_q2785j2pF6FBLitIf_R98zZ6DxaT_Pd0mcFGkiwyqsDrJ7WnfITmMSiY4k9iJ1k026loYkMzN-VCWzLnaSaeiexb5nVwFalAEFVsI6m7cRzOOGsQoLh4SgsdpYycg8aiYDfdhoEzbHP_kqV9okxreVTq3QosXOovUEDsMFGo10hkYsGrxtMUhaYbPuNCXtTx7TsVIxDW9AuREoodAbtCjLy1sCym8rMDNY6GKWVPp5sDBBFEtEYORFGKsGyE-PclMxnMYkuTYV0nkqHUZrhdpOLUQ%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=818886b125a44171b83fb39b54e435a4&_e=Gy2Wojc18UpzKjml96Ept4hNRVakmxJWQQ4gXDssKjPVGaOnOOK3v74ux9DzQPoY3b9EgQlOwl_Mwjr7yQ3ZNc63hd8Nv7slaaVJ7gP9eks9yorRStppgA4b8eC9_q2785j2pF6FBLitIf_R98zZ6DxaT_Pd0mcFGkiwyqsDrJ7WnfITmMSiY4k9iJ1k026loYkMzN-VCWzLnaSaeiexb5nVwFalAEFVsI6m7cRzOOGsQoLh4SgsdpYycg8aiYDfAecl910t7njOpxYqlDzZQABYXoZWgFEsF6BhKFCQSZ5EKTcroT2_LWfrBA9ceofbA249FAu37FkYei2QSSYl2AEjRJ8CukqxOP-eW8TwTWSvK-vuO_xUpUzKehwB6wOWp9lY7eAY_YEFudBQtfGrFg%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Republicans are scared of our grassroots power | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dMYxARLop_cb13kzZqzj2GWmCEN3apeObI5TVt41Sg2bhqtgx19SdIZxQMW6SrxD26m6HkBfz9OZhmT-j38eF7QSSXO7ZE3xJgdt6vKAQBQmtJ8xdh_dvH6Kpjg6w105BQldh-FjKwYfymi0vgpyUbw/3y1/HkOEaSUAS4KHuXifrsPnHQ/h0/XdNRsBe7lU3swy9K9x4mBXzqRcek4Y2TE3d7Eo8-jhk)

Republicans are POURING money into our district because they know that Monica De La Cruz — an alt-right extremist who vowed during her campaign to “finish what Trump started” — is in the fight of her life here. **[Republicans are scared of our grassroots power and we need to keep up the momentum over the next few months. Will you chip in right now with a contribution, Peter? →](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_AbfWV0S7LYnE-3oao6K9ORTuMCh-4Uf1kCmvP3R3KX-7jF3vfJ7YqFxPLQEQGzoS4pULjB4iXi3Bfwmz2Ic2rXGkdck_L9ebALMiAQ-PgKwGhyCEFgQI4s8QmFzkXmzoTaFLLpfx1pllCzl2j-IBRULZYh5gnw_cPdr8UuaMyGgAvQTAVLCKR2DC7OMHL2MAn6iz5mgxt6HRNqdX-t-Kj6xdgUPOrCbto5BkQbyxiB6p1mKEvMGAFXvMRIwVjWiR7_rb2j8uUQgMogtfRah-UH54lAlbsUY9WkoZtER13IhE15fT2aUme8pZidHsTsm6/3y1/HkOEaSUAS4KHuXifrsPnHQ/h1/dR1MTFUFp17-WVdSH3fUu5SS1bJHN7JOlDyQR5xaGxI)** Monica’s team raised $833k in the last quarter. She’s claiming that this is evidence of community support for her campaign — but we know the truth. **The truth is that Monica’s campaign is funded by GOP SuperPACs and dark money. She has no problems accepting money from corporations and special interest groups — and she has no problems putting their interests ahead of those of our community.** That’s not who Michelle is. Michelle is running a campaign funded by grassroots donations because she knows that a people-powered campaign means she answers to the people of TX-15 alone — no corporations, no special interests. **[That means we’re counting on you, Peter. We’re not just up against Monica De La Cruz — we’re up against the entire GOP establishment and all the dark money they can throw at her campaign. Will you make a contribution now to make sure we can keep up our fight over the summer?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_AbfWV0S7LYnE-3oao6K9OSuBBWUIHpoC6lxr5NDzYt79DrPJXnAtPD-jP-k0prVC431VPoIfE-o2Na4zroLiu9ftjbz7v799MuYWGQQRVoZ_Y4NRwGCvg5kH1JX6M4V_FxsKiDY9xVIzDmmdssDVbvW42--qGtKoXrvgqFVPd6ZhmKDvorw4mtnIpi99flGh_rWru9TZzUTi3fKuFZoqzXUMPhe8inuJdc7tzyRHkg5s5vD5AdlIXhV3P7PH216oBxiBCSKw5HZL68wsUj-kXuuS7IkC14SmCnU5-WfvWflMCSI-X0w8bXvkrjm-tkZB/3y1/HkOEaSUAS4KHuXifrsPnHQ/h2/VPGGJTKcRMy8m3Bym-gPqjyy586YIuWHuvz809oDRok)** ¡Vamos Por Quince!

name: Katie Porter
subject: Young lady, Wells Fargo does not make mistakes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Big Banks were cheating homeowners and demanding more than they owed.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26819%2E3422442%2ESk6XJE)
_Young lady, Wells Fargo does not make mistakes._
Those were the words I heard in late 2007 after presenting my research showing 70% of lenders were trying to collect more money than homeowners believed they owed.
Back up for a second: In 2007 I was a law professor researching whether banks were taking advantage of homeowners by claiming Americans owed more than they really did. **In a sample of 1,700 cases, I found banks were asking people to pay $6 million more than they expected.** Banks repeatedly didn’t have the documentation to back up their claims, and nobody in the system was willing or able to stop them. For so many families that meant losing their home entirely.
It was a Wells Fargo lawyer who stood up after I presented my findings at a conference and lectured me on how the vast teams at Wells Fargo could afford to follow the law, and plenty of other Big Bank lawyers chimed in. **The conventional wisdom was that banks were always right, and nobody needed to question it.**
**If banks don’t make mistakes, the next logical conclusion was that this was in fact a deliberate strategy to break the rules and cheat borrowers.**
Because of this research, a few months later I was asked to testify before the Senate Subcommittee on Administrative Oversight and the Courts. Senator Chuck Schumer came prepared with a poster board, and pointed out how Wall Street boasted their strategy of foreclosure and late fees helped them become even more profitable. I left that hearing thinking punishment was coming for those lawbreaking banks, but for the most part they continued to collect every penny without following every rule.
As a professor, I could study and point out problems. But I wanted to do more to actually change our system. **I’m running for the U.S. Senate to fight for the people who have been taken advantage of by big corporations and are struggling to get ahead.**
That’s the work I’ve always done, and with your support I can head _back_ to the Senate—this time with the power to hold Wall Street to account. [**I'd be so appreciative of anything you can chip in to our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230720-1?refcode=EMAJ20_1_WFG_20230720_V1_F&refcode2=26819_3422442_Sk6XJE&akid=26819%2E3422442%2ESk6XJE)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230720-1?refcode=EMAJ20_1_WFG_20230720_V1_F&refcode2=26819_3422442_Sk6XJE&akid=26819%2E3422442%2ESk6XJE)**
Katie Porter
P.S. Because of experiences like this, I don’t take a dime from Big Bank, Big Oil, or Big Pharma CEOs. Our campaign is truly people powered. [**Join us here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230720-1?refcode=EMAJ20_1_WFG_20230720_V1_F&refcode2=26819_3422442_Sk6XJE&akid=26819%2E3422442%2ESk6XJE)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ20_1_WFG_20230720_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26819_3422442_Sk6XJE&akid=26819%2E3422442%2ESk6XJE)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Betrayal in the highest ranks of the military
body:
This disgraceful politicization of the men and women in uniform would have never occurred when I served in the Trump Administration | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10382743?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

The men and women who serve in our nation’s Armed Forces deserve gratitude, but they are _increasingly betraye_ d by a politicized leadership at the Pentagon shamelessly pursuing Joe Biden’s destructive leftist agenda.

This is the kind of disgraceful politicization of the men and women in uniform that would have never occurred _when I served in the Trump Administration_. That’s why our team has been working to:

→ Expose the **politicization and infiltration** of the military by the hardcore progressive left pursuing a DEI agenda.

→ Stand by **Senator Tommy Tuberville** who is taking a stand for life and fighting against the politicization of the U.S. military.

→ Put together a **[detailed plan](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=436ed3ff37&e=17913c7d6d) for when leadership changes** in Washington.

**STAND UP:[Help us fight back against toxic “diversity, equity, and inclusion” in the military](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5f95ab3ff7&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e3feb31063&e=17913c7d6d)
---
[ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e5b28e4191&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Fighting progressive elements of the Pentagon means standing by allies in Congress like **Senator Tommy Tuberville of Alabama who are fighting back**.

In the wake of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, the Biden Administration changed a longstanding policy and began granting official leave and taxpayer-funded support for servicewomen to travel to states where they can obtain abortions.

Senator Tuberville responded by placing a “hold” on all senior military promotions that require Senate approval. Almost immediately the Defense establishment and the hardcore progressive Left erupted in fury.

We must stand by Tuberville and make sure the voice of his constituents in Alabama who support him 100% are heard loud and clear.

**That’s why I wrote this[op-ed defending Tuberville](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a39d02e059&e=17913c7d6d), and my staff has been busy shoring up support for the Senator in Congress**.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=eccd7813a2&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| The truth is, the pervasiveness of DEI and Critical Race Theory throughout the ranks of our military has created one of the worst recruiting crises in history.

We have the greatest military in the world, but hardcore progressive activists are undermining it from the top down with their woke agenda.

Our men and women in uniform deserve better than diversity quotas, CRT indoctrination, and taxpayer-funded abortions.

**GIVE:[We need your support to keep fighting](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=dabb5e97e9&e=17913c7d6d).**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=34c421f88b&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| We’re standing by Senator Tuberville, we’re exposing their destructive goals for the military, and [we have a plan](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b1f3d4cc3e&e=17913c7d6d) for when leadership changes in Washington.

As always I'm truly honored by [your support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c3acf0e8dd&e=17913c7d6d). It makes the work we do possible.

Keep fighting,

Russ Vought
President, Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---

name: Amy Brown
subject: How I Met My Husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I met my husband in the burn unit of the military hospital I worked in 14 years ago. I hadn't planned to find love in the hospital -- but God had other ideas. One day, Sam Brown was admitted in critical condition. Friend, Sam nearly lost his life in service to his country. And today, Sam is doubling down on his commitment to serve America by running for U.S. Senate. [_**Can I count on you to rush in a donation to help send a proven fighter and survivor to Washington?**_](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bfcbc85426624c4e9ca2410f10d29571&_e=xElaHWtqyXzkcXQshm1G9hYd1Db6Eb-MFfl_TS6KWPqboMECk75_puGRQet7goGs11SfL31_79E4-4EqnXv4Bvsb27a7_PQXT5eU_SEo2qel2M5kIQgZL3awqpwrVUNJ2ygSItJ0IN462FZvZjcbw59nP8BjCG6L3IpSqFKewwzam5D3h7mpUy7ctrKJbJA3_uBL4iTx-Z0AkBLbAMLG9XO1_MHUReCHA3rajQWpGziT1rb2zYEXeNAF97Bs2PR5EalfhzXxq3U4GZqIp65xWJDUgBo988FlbO07q1I-n7c-u-xR_Up-cH9FYKWOGxcfUo3PJZbqmvKhttG766rWPusOh8h8h7tPt-FKbuBlQcE-tW5TBdj9wO7DjaDJNrhC0zXCxwPxcxqvhNAmuvz_oEIMwP2v9oGgPMWvAObtCPQnfkkOlutb9yVg36QIYhP0)

---
I got to know Sam during his three year long recovery process by serving as his dietitian. During that time it became clear: Sam was truly special. He's a true servant leader with an awe inspiring dedication to his country, his conservative values, and to the American people. We met in 2008, and over the last 14 years, Sam has proven himself to be an amazing father and husband, and a man of deep faith. **_Now, Friend, I know I 'm biased. But I truly believe that Sam is the leader that Washington D.C. so desperately needs._** [_**Would you consider sending in a donation of any amount to help my husband Sam Brown go the distance and make it to the U.S. Senate?**_](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bfcbc85426624c4e9ca2410f10d29571&_e=xElaHWtqyXzkcXQshm1G9hYd1Db6Eb-MFfl_TS6KWPqboMECk75_puGRQet7goGs11SfL31_79E4-4EqnXv4Bvsb27a7_PQXT5eU_SEo2qel2M5kIQgZL3awqpwrVUNJ2ygSItJ0IN462FZvZjcbw59nP8BjCG6L3IpSqFKewwzam5D3h7mpUy7ctrKJbJA3_uBL4iTx-Z0AkBLbAMLG9XO1_MHUReCHA3rajQWpGziT1rb2zYEXeNAF97Bs2PR5EalfhzXxq3U4GZqIp65xWJDUgBo988FlbO07q1I-n7fsXT40qYJ8JNQ2PxSnp8InZGq4aGneU99fq3UWXa5QsNBIH4taMGbw-PyP3b7qe48kJSqxL7JdVFNj6pcNp-4J2rzlqFAX1YVBssMJNFW2c2k7otHYemAkSx3SrcGEuYu-IcNvy6abXyvTO1u2dV5l) Thank you in advance for any support you can send, Amy Brown

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: The Biden Administration’s two-tiered system of justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
It’s time we hold them accountable and restore equal justice.
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f31f75bcae414390a830c5effcf2cbe7&_e=j5Ue2ezvtBD_zgO4LnRe8HPEenQhcaBS96Tb6sN_3SaVH3XIUg1yzO5NwWD4yO2t8OS88brWB8qwzqCu2cQ6uJQhqlXxVxMLXcAFy2kul2X0acSmZFwD6XA2mMP7V0RmVUgCCpDXhp90sx1xZ566qnjzuytUHKdIXZFnK0nHe5DBtsMR4OHaMIDgmRxcE6ApmGhyx2bWspcGfZwBMwIriq_defMrD24BXrBEbuitQFMce1EbUSgDA_Up-L1dvJ6edukdMpzOBkRg59dZ_fsaUgpuMCa-aJ9Tvzb_kCH7hS-tFpvHffDwG5WUWKxOfpsWfIqhh231_qYLPV_f5ywayvtRIsdNaEOF_Ql6F4k0G6kF4s-5TsgLcWanpAYvTLRagIJ84GQIbuXbTfBmFT6hJcyyylm_bF0qfnIRMvoNVCgG-_wYVlRTRgbg0YByTK95TagJQnWh2hTj1mhXA4LT5g%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
This week an IRS whistleblower spoke to the House Oversight Committee regarding political misconduct throughout the Hunter Biden investigation.
---
He testified that the DOJ stopped IRS investigators from executing a search warrant at Biden’s home due to “optics.”
---
_**Wasn’t the Biden Administration saying no one is above the law?**_
---
_Yet multiple IRS investigators have now testified to Congress that their superiors and DOJ officials worked to suppress a probe into Hunter Biden’s finances – _that’s on top of the Hunter Biden laptop FBI suppression of 2020_._
---
So, while President Trump faces yet another indictment amidst a political witch hunt orchestrated by this administration, the Biden family has gotten off scot-free.
---
**It’s past time we hold them accountable and eliminate this two-tiered system of justice that protects the Biden family’s criminal dealings while relentlessly attacking political opponents.**
---

clean_body: It’s time we hold them accountable and restore equal justice. | Friend, This week an IRS whistleblower spoke to the House Oversight Committee regarding political misconduct throughout the Hunter Biden investigation. He testified that the DOJ stopped IRS investigators from executing a search warrant at Biden’s home due to “optics.” Wasn’t the Biden Administration saying no one is above the law? Yet multiple IRS investigators have now testified to Congress that their superiors and DOJ officials worked to suppress a probe into Hunter Biden’s finances – that’s on top of the Hunter Biden laptop FBI suppression of 2020. So, while President Trump faces yet another indictment amidst a political witch hunt orchestrated by this administration, the Biden family has gotten off scot-free. It’s past time we hold them accountable and eliminate this two-tiered system of justice that protects the Biden family’s criminal dealings while relentlessly attacking political opponents. It’s become clear that the Biden family is getting special treatment from his DOJ all because of their last name. That is not equal justice. It is a political weaponization of the government and the justice system and it must have consequences. And while the evidence mounts against the Biden family and the wrongdoings of the DOJ, Democrats continue to defend this administration's actions and call these hearings “a waste of time.” That’s because they are TERRIFIED of the truth being exposed. They know that Americans learning the truth and seeing the hypocrisy and double standards of this administration will seal their fate. But Americans deserve the truth, and they deserve better. That’s why we won’t stop until this administration and the Biden family are held accountable for their crimes and we restore faith and trust in the justice system. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Shawn Wilson
subject: We’re getting a little worried, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
This could make or break our chances these next few months.

I’ve got to be honest with you: Our campaign is getting a little worried, Peter. As we approach the middle of summer, we’re preparing for a dry period in online fundraising that could force our campaign to make strategic cuts. It’s called the “summer slump” — **and it could make or break our chances heading into the final months of the race.** **_[Please, chip in $5 (or anything you can) to help our campaign come out of the summer slump with the resources it takes to win!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66781476/417569391/218720461?amount=5&refcode=ea.48ab0ea5-2f27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.48ab0ea5-2f27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhhYjBlYTUtMmYyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w-oxWMEfy-F6tFKjdJ97EBCFMHKow0dOWJqTLx-ihFk=)_** Look, I understand. Kids are out of school, folks are on vacation, and the last thing on many peoples’ minds is politics. But unlike other major campaigns, our election is NOT in November 2024; _we have less than 4 months_ until folks cast their ballots for the next Governor of Louisiana. Since we want to win this race, we need to come out of the “summer slump” with the resources it’ll take to go toe-to-toe with the GOP. clean_body: This could make or break our chances these next few months. I’ve got to be honest with you: Our campaign is getting a little worried, Peter. As we approach the middle of summer, we’re preparing for a dry period in online fundraising that could force our campaign to make strategic cuts. It’s called the “summer slump” — and it could make or break our chances heading into the final months of the race. = Look, I understand. Kids are out of school, folks are on vacation, and the last thing on many peoples’ minds is politics. But unlike other major campaigns, our election is NOT in November 2024; we have less than 4 months until folks cast their ballots for the next Governor of Louisiana. Since we want to win this race, we need to come out of the “summer slump” with the resources it’ll take to go toe-to-toe with the GOP. Because for everything from yard signs to ad placements and voter outreach, every dollar we receive right now is critical to our success this November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Shawn Wilson = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. subject: MAGA Republicans are trying to force their anti-choice agenda into the National Defense Authorization Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
House Republicans should not be attacking service members’ right to make private family planning decisions or reproductive health care. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66781490/417569405/2103674952?ms=em23_230720_ndaa_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230720_ndaa_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230720_ndaa_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230720_ndaa_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=tQ+3ZXyntTHdguBtpKulJlqioM0vNBzVEVgY8Jl77TN4s+UC951iA2wArDK4aqEhO3g+K4SpBYMN3nSptkrVjco3eo0B+3X5QUINnMhVrLA6tcVdDBVQOI5Nr3dKGE21eoKgD95MMtEBfmIjLyKODeWqKSAoGHDhMInw61g1Ck4=&refcode2=4dab0ea5-2f27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGFiMGVhNS0yZjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e32UaM6wS7PC5rF7VejaV6cfoPZeqcoDdwHpuXT_A2I=&emci=a0f26312-8326-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4dab0ea5-2f27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338) **House passes defense bill after adopting controversial amendments targeting abortion policy and other issues**

Peter,

For years, the National Defense Authorization Act has been a bipartisan effort to support and fund our national security. Kim has supported bipartisan versions of the NDAA four times in the past.

**But this year, House Republicans are recklessly using the NDAA to further their extreme agenda.**

Last week, Kevin McCarthy and MAGA House Republicans voted to pass the NDAA with extreme amendments restricting Pentagon policies on abortion access. That’s unacceptable.

House Republicans should not be attacking service members’ right to make private family planning decisions or their right to reproductive health care.

These amendments to the NDAA are unnecessary and threaten to undermine our armed forces' readiness – and that’s why Kim voted NO.

name: Crucial to our fight
subject: We were a bit concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, After each FEC quarter, we review our fundraising numbers from the previous quarter to ensure we have enough in our budget to keep Nikki fighting in Washington to deliver meaningful results for working families across our district. In our latest review, we were a bit concerned when we saw that our number of monthly donors has decreased, meaning that we don’t have as much support from recurring monthly donations as we need to run a winning reelection campaign. Monthly recurring contributions give us the necessary resources to continue making the progress families in our district count on, and they prepare us for the road ahead as opponents jump into the race, looking to take Nikki’s seat. **[So friend, will you help keep Nikki in this fight by becoming a recurring donor today? subject: Good people like you cannot sit on the sidelines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

Fellow American,

The best holiday of the year (**4th of July**) falling on a Tuesday seems to have set us back a bit in terms of fundraising for the month.

During the first week of the month, my campaign brought in just $13,346. **While I’m so grateful for the folks who stepped up to help us raise that money, unfortunately it’s not going to do the trick** - especially when one of my Democrat opponent’s is bringing in, on average, **$34,000 per day.**

I hate to be blunt, but I think that is what it’s going to take to get my point across today. I’m running against two Democrats at the moment and each of them has had a lot of success raising money for this race. During the 90 day period from April 1st to June 30th, **My Democrat opponents raised $3.1 million and $1.7 million for their campaigns, respectively.**

As the only Republican in this race, it’s paramount that we’re able to keep pace with the funds these Democrats are raising for the political operations.

With just 11 days left in the month, **[I’m once again reaching out to see if you’re able to send a gift to my campaign of $5, $25, or even $50.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8da9f56a886d4063bae472ea0434d8e7&_e=dlxYlivooIZV-6yTpvHUX8Q_mAEuIfxEB8UdYgDyZyMKHZ7wRbxt-ktlBlGkVIxPEEP0ho4x0Xuq1_0-Ws3GdW-TGxa6KxdygviAbsgWT5SXLBwzTCkkBHdlQ-ezqepeVGmyAqJueU_5caQDqVhxxGcQar2gidCUhOdE-pkY2y6tKk2uSt1uCVSUROsf8iOj46r1KJ88xzXH_pRxZj95fTIjv1KMWt6SgB52hjff8l6zd9B74GkTpaOWN31qNLMTk7H7yqr-Pm8-DunwcHnHNI0raJ_5eHCIJcQb_YCEvwPh0IAAMKLLBVUBp4x0ARFYHTG4fnR5fYG7dxKQ9e2_xvu_yyeFSyCIRCGqQ1tjhq0Qy8c7Os78dvgMOHUb-90-pkGlmaBdrZp1_opTnA8COw%3D%3D)**

[**HELP US MATCH DEMOCRAT ENTHUSIASM
CHIP IN TODAY -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8da9f56a886d4063bae472ea0434d8e7&_e=dlxYlivooIZV-6yTpvHUX8Q_mAEuIfxEB8UdYgDyZyMKHZ7wRbxt-ktlBlGkVIxPEEP0ho4x0Xuq1_0-Ws3GdW-TGxa6KxdygviAbsgWT5SXLBwzTCkkBHdlQ-ezqepeVGmyAqJueU_5caQDqVhxxGcQar2gidCUhOdE-pkY2y6tKk2uSt1uCVSUROsf8iOj46r1KJ88xzXH_pRxZj95fTIjv1KMWt6SgB52hjff8l6zd9B74GkTpaOWN31qNLMTsaDk5r4SJm6HI4GVxxZMOVTMA37F-J8vq9J9pmia6m2cWDRdWNO1SuDWk98X7R54r58lPMuN7DDbO70-kf659e6Dz0x8UD4KYGq52MS3S_9ZET3HHm6YchJj23e_Xpzw-I6TAYQe1BUV08mi0dKaPw%3D%3D)

**As much as the mainstream media would have you believe otherwise, Arizona is still a conservative state. The only way that we lose the opportunity to flip this Senate seat Republican is if good people like you sit on the sidelines.**

Polling across the country shows that voters are fed up with Democrat governance, meaning conservatives like me will have the support of the people on our side when the time comes – we just need to make sure we can be in touch with them before Democrats have a chance to muddy the waters.

**[I need this email solicitation to bring in no less than $6,000 by the end of the day today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8da9f56a886d4063bae472ea0434d8e7&_e=dlxYlivooIZV-6yTpvHUX8Q_mAEuIfxEB8UdYgDyZyMKHZ7wRbxt-ktlBlGkVIxPEEP0ho4x0Xuq1_0-Ws3GdW-TGxa6KxdygviAbsgWT5SXLBwzTCkkBHdlQ-ezqepeVGmyAqJueU_5caQDqVhxxGcQar2gidCUhOdE-pkY2y6tKk2uSt1uCVSUROsf8iOj46r1KJ88xzXH_pRxZj95fTIjv1KMWt6SgB52hjff8l6zd9B74GkTpaOWN31qNLMTP0OVLfQ-Ze76dWkyMIgCGwL18nWwmqufZ7YnY6bKLDGbpvMSXHKUsmwyi6AdpwMPn-Sgxas-1bEGIYPAutGc2Fq1DptUJPkcD9ZHdGx3-6H7kUsxIxsFgmjKxSxFhqojv2-ClRsre9E2BGLz3SC0wQ%3D%3D)**. clean_body: The only way that we lose the opportunity to flip this Senate seat Republican is if good people like you sit on the sidelines. | | Fellow American, The best holiday of the year (4th of July) falling on a Tuesday seems to have set us back a bit in terms of fundraising for the month. During the first week of the month, my campaign brought in just $13,346. While I’m so grateful for the folks who stepped up to help us raise that money, unfortunately it’s not going to do the trick - especially when one of my Democrat opponent’s is bringing in, on average, $34,000 per day. I hate to be blunt, but I think that is what it’s going to take to get my point across today. I’m running against two Democrats at the moment and each of them has had a lot of success raising money for this race. During the 90 day period from April 1st to June 30th, My Democrat opponents raised $3.1 million and $1.7 million for their campaigns, respectively. As the only Republican in this race, it’s paramount that we’re able to keep pace with the funds these Democrats are raising for the political operations. With just 11 days left in the month, As much as the mainstream media would have you believe otherwise, Arizona is still a conservative state. The only way that we lose the opportunity to flip this Senate seat Republican is if good people like you sit on the sidelines. Polling across the country shows that voters are fed up with Democrat governance, meaning conservatives like me will have the support of the people on our side when the time comes – we just need to make sure we can be in touch with them before Democrats have a chance to muddy the waters. . So, if you’re able to do your part in helping us hit that goal, please use the link below to make a gift to my U.S. Senate campaign right now. Will you take two minutes to share your TOP priorities with Wesley? He needs your input if we're going to build a campaign strong enough to defeat Senator Josh Hawley → \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Wesley Bell Date: Tue, July 18, 2023 Subject: I wanna know what brings us together Hey there — it's Wesley. I've been traveling throughout the state speaking with hard-working Missouri families from all walks of life. It's clear, folks, Missourians want to send Senator Josh Hawley packing. He'll say whatever folks want to hear and then go to D.C. and do the exact opposite. I plan to be a different kind of leader. That's why it's important I hear the issues at the TOP of people's minds. I wish I could sit down with each and every one of you, but that's just not realistic. Instead, my team put together an online survey. | Team, Josh Hawley doesn't listen, he won't change, and he won't govern. He's proven this time and again every time he posts another outright lie on Twitter and votes against our best interests in the Senate. I'm ready to listen, make tough decisions, and follow through. But I need to hear from you first. Thank you, Wesley Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI

The GOP is working to criminalize this life-saving healthcare and put abortion seekers and providers behind bars. Everyone deserves the right to bodily autonomy and the right to make the best healthcare decisions for themselves and their families. subject: Dave Reichert moved the needle on Governor’s race to favor Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
I was absolutely thrilled when my friend Dave Reichert entered the race for the open Washington State Governors seat. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=765b7f8577&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/50a3963f7db8/i-now-have-two-inexperienced-but-equally-matched-hyper-partisan-opponents-who-want-to-turn-the-county-council-into-the-failed-seattle-city-council-938?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=7f0020d797&e=77eef70c61)
---
| |
My Friends and Supporters**,**

I was absolutely thrilled when my friend Dave Reichert entered the race for the open Washington State Governor's seat. And, national political pundits publicly announced what I already privately knew - **Dave Reichert can and will win in 2024!**
-ROLLCALL.COM-
"Reichert puts race for Washington Governor on
battleground...As a Republican running statewide in Washington,
Reichert is the underdog in the race. **_But his electoral record_**
**_must be taken into account! That 's why Inside Elections changed_**
**_the rating of the race from Solid Democrat to Battleground_**."
[Join me in supporting Dave's race](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=7ebdf7c24e&e=77eef70c61).

**The campaign has their first fundraising deadline on Monday, July 31 st**. [Can you make a contribution to boost his fundraising numbers?](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=a7dd15ba42&e=77eef70c61)

Let me remind you, Dave has spent his lifetime serving Washington state! First, with a career as a sheriff, literally fighting crime and keeping our neighborhoods safe. He was the lead detective on the task force that led to the arrest of serial killer Gary Ridgeway in 2001, before he was elected as the King County Sheriff. Dave was a distinguished member of Congress for fourteen years and served on the powerful Ways and Means committee.

And now he's stepping up to serve again!

Unfortunately, in our state, crime is on the rise and police protection is down. Washington state is ranked dead last in the nation for community protection. Dave will be able to make a difference on day one. He's not a politician. He's a protector.

Please, I urge you to make a donation to Dave's campaign. Individuals and businesses can donate up to $4,800 (a married couple can give $9,600). Time is of the essence. [Click and make a donation by Monday, July 31st. The time is now!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=88e270c82d&e=77eef70c61)

Early money in this race is essential. Thank you!

****
Councilmember Reagan Dunn
[**www.reagandunn.com**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=c7d883dd9e&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | [Follow on Twitter](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=3a537b75c5&e=77eef70c61) | [ on Facebook](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=9a649c4748&e=77eef70c61) |
---

P.O. Box 40417
Bellevue, WA 98015

We have a lot of thoughts about the state of our union, and Gov. DeSantis has a lot of plans he will be putting into action to reverse the effects of Biden's presidency on Day 1. **Governor DeSantis isn't running for President to manage the decline; he's running to reverse it.** We want to know what you think, Friend. **_We have a survey we're sending out to a select group of patriots to ensure we've gathered the input we need to shape our strategy, and we're making this a donation-required response to show the radical Left that our team is willing to put our money where our mouth is to restore the freedom of this nation._**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdrb312g3vcud8va9s4nb7op3ehb3rnod8i8bk10_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9m6ekosueo4pji3r5dpv9a4tk704a8dqcbcdofg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze103qpjtsqdd10coi1hqrkgtard5pn96gtco6o8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z021258jhq2hi64j3bs2ekh2dvoed2cod0334ibo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2u504d0f360v0t87gokq1mnti6npkvlpeef6hdo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdl6d8uki865tnjgp8dfoqal1r0v7m7flsh7dqto_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7sfg3tekf7rrpmhajbnenbv5odqa0abk9hvgmi8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z32imh8gubo0jsgpp0etpkragfshiub5edgo7l10_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvnlc13m8vhe0sq0l76ddmqm2t8ojo1binojhov8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn28nnbn44b5lih27n6i193g46hrntda2v00htvg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7tpvvs3imnsipqcrncg2s9293b93rnnpkohqq18_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zke5f8br39vtkcbv4bk600m2n193t1s8u3g735pg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z81sjsm8p70ieeqkeap8idl66rig4fohmmmv28hg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zab7vk8v7vg7resekusc55f3ttlnbevu5jdjbvd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcb78clm42o7ofvl94934sc2skag3piail1n2l4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfsiar6kt7m9no3og7ih5l1h6mdoo7iilhqgu8lo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfdfhufka98q9gktplf6pucqcmqcrpkimavel3bg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9vnf2uacsk7964kv228c8r4tv9bj5clnpj5g29o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s3ieao74chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.
