Donald J. Trump July 20th, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ –** In a new Agenda47 policy video, President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to save America’s auto industry from Joe Biden’s radical Green New Deal policies.
“Joe Biden is waging war on the U.S. auto-industry with a series of crippling mandates designed to force Americans into expensive electric cars, even as thousands of electric cars are piling up on car lots all unsold,” President Trump said. “This ridiculous Green New Deal crusade is causing car prices to skyrocket while setting the stage for the destruction of American auto production.”
[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kDGPozAQhX-N6YzsAWNTUFwuShPpdN1uOzAmOLExwiZR_v3Kq9VOOd_Me08Pw-bd_B6YPjGAxVFiAKz5wwCu7enzX3f9uJ75_xfu_Nyp9lUo_GUA-b3Z39MfldoGdL5s9bmiQcEsRWUH2ZneGBBGVctgkJAUkuiQeqVIdEYrbGRr9IRaYuUGENAIDUL2rZSm7keQUkx6FmV6xVpBNj3iTHFFT_e8H2GrpxgqPyw5b-k704XBZT_C6G1BDC7PRnajPDje7ErYap7w6dYbx2B3N2HieOTI3UpHyvubz3sM_B4tHx3ZNfF7HPnDeV9etujd5Gyqlxx8tQ-0vQpJnWatuJUOiudXAAAA___13Gty)
[Watch President Trump’s Plan to Save America’s Auto Industry](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kDGPozAQhX-N6YzsAWNTUFwuShPpdN1uOzAmOLExwiZR_v3Kq9VOOd_Me08Pw-bd_B6YPjGAxVFiAKz5wwCu7enzX3f9uJ75_xfu_Nyp9lUo_GUA-b3Z39MfldoGdL5s9bmiQcEsRWUH2ZneGBBGVctgkJAUkuiQeqVIdEYrbGRr9IRaYuUGENAIDUL2rZSm7keQUkx6FmV6xVpBNj3iTHFFT_e8H2GrpxgqPyw5b-k704XBZT_C6G1BDC7PRnajPDje7ErYap7w6dYbx2B3N2HieOTI3UpHyvubz3sM_B4tHx3ZNfF7HPnDeV9etujd5Gyqlxx8tQ-0vQpJnWatuJUOiudXAAAA___13Gty)
“If Biden’s assault is not stopped, American auto-production will be totally DEAD. That’s why I am going to terminate these Green New Deal atrocities on Day One. In my first term, I fought for autoworkers like never before, canceling TPP, which was a disaster, ending the NAFTA nightmare, the NAFTA trade deal was the worst deal ever negotiated on trade, and renegotiating Obama’s horrendous Korea trade deal. Made it a great deal from a horrible deal.”
“I saved the American auto industry once, and now, I will save it again.”
**PRESIDENT TRUMP’S PLAN TO****SAVE THE AUTO INDUSTRY AND PROTECT AMERICAN WORKERS**
PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL REVERSE EVERY AUTO-JOB KILLING POLICY OF THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION
\- On Day One, President Trump will roll back every Biden policy that is brutalizing American autoworkers.
\- President Trump will end Biden’s assault on the internal combustion engine and cancel his harmful April 2023 emission regulations for light, medium, and heavy-duty vehicles, that are projected to kill [117,000 auto manufacturing jobs](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kE-P3CAMxT8NuU0EHhKSQw67nc2ho1bVHtrekMOfDS0JCIii-fYV1Wp8sez3k_X8cIve2cdExCsBWJ3OBIBcXwjAnb_-_t7ff91vlx8npsut7_hZVfhCAMojmif6eaU1Gzpft-LW6KkDy2hjJtYP4zAAHbpmndjIxKgELmgsY7gsarkyNgI3FHmPvHETULhSAZSNnLGhHRdgjCphaa2xI5xqk_8Gq8OOXv8p6dhiq8LW-GktJeb_nmYCM-ZsSm5xM8kptC7lEoN36lHpp05gPqIPWF-frfOm9neTDSa1yncTQyryIt9-ym-4ayxGnuHwWr55t7m9zowJSql8OUqozGFRlSO5_UN-DUtuo7ZNmnQ8nfcu94Jw-lGDqi7-BQAA__8xknnW).
\- President Trump will also end Biden’s insane CAFE fuel economy standards that will cost the auto industry an estimated $200 billion and raise the average cost of vehicles by more than $1,000 according to [the Biden administration’s own estimates](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kEGPpCAQhX8N3jBQouDBw_Z2vHSy2dvMFaXsZgbBUBjT8-sndiZTx_e-VL48u27BL8-B6QsDeHhHDIA1fxjATV3e_3W3t9uV_z9s5teuVcfZwl8GUJ4b_qI_X2pcrQ9nqq-VG1pYpKhwkJ3pjQFh2uoxCNuotrO2wUnMMPVGdZMzs9YOtEOzVH4AAY3QIGSvpDR1P4GUYtaLOK9vmRIO6TMtLkUb3EfJ-7rVc1qrMDxK2ejlNDIYj-OoM-4FM509g3HayUckYjDavSTiJdtIW8rFFp_iSXiHkVu3-uip5FfMFx9t8F9IPOLBqWQf7xgLX3YMHOcU0_rkeQ9IHAQAF4oLyWCs8uC2w4fgqdNMifu5z6nyHQAA__8n1XW1), at a time when the average price of a new car is [$49,500](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j0FvszAMhn-NuYEc1yHJIYevX8Wl0rTbdk0glKxQImCL-u-nTNN88_tYj_y6Jc1xfFpQZyCa4rADEZz-AdGVz-8v7fXteqlfs9vqSys5F0r_geh4pvB3-mtpwuLiXFJ1qQYraRRYBStabbQm1LKarJZeyxDIofHyNDKT0SMrZg5eYeuraAnphIpQGBZCN8aTENirEcsYCYxD2O_rOKwPNw8fx_a5pKZfl2q203Gk_eenDqjLOTd37wsD6nq31Y-Qd6DOfYXN3UJZ6xKnLfahPta012wkIlBXbXZIOc5z3FsFjLdSrZi-AwAA__9keVoA).

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump July 20th, 2023 Bedminster, NJ – In a new Agenda47 policy video, President Donald J. Trump announced his plan to save America’s auto industry from Joe Biden’s radical Green New Deal policies. “Joe Biden is waging war on the U.S. auto-industry with a series of crippling mandates designed to force Americans into expensive electric cars, even as thousands of electric cars are piling up on car lots all unsold,” President Trump said. “This ridiculous Green New Deal crusade is causing car prices to skyrocket while setting the stage for the destruction of American auto production.” “If Biden’s assault is not stopped, American auto-production will be totally DEAD. That’s why I am going to terminate these Green New Deal atrocities on Day One. In my first term, I fought for autoworkers like never before, canceling TPP, which was a disaster, ending the NAFTA nightmare, the NAFTA trade deal was the worst deal ever negotiated on trade, and renegotiating Obama’s horrendous Korea trade deal. Made it a great deal from a horrible deal.” “I saved the American auto industry once, and now, I will save it again.” PRESIDENT TRUMP’S PLAN TOSAVE THE AUTO INDUSTRY AND PROTECT AMERICAN WORKERS PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL REVERSE EVERY AUTO-JOB KILLING POLICY OF THE BIDEN ADMINISTRATION \- On Day One, President Trump will roll back every Biden policy that is brutalizing American autoworkers. \- President Trump will end Biden’s assault on the internal combustion engine and cancel his harmful April 2023 emission regulations for light, medium, and heavy-duty vehicles, that are projected to kill . \- President Trump will also end Biden’s insane CAFE fuel economy standards that will cost the auto industry an estimated $200 billion and raise the average cost of vehicles by more than $1,000 according to , at a time when the average price of a new car is . \- President Trump will secure the USMCA’s protections for American auto workers from globalist assault. \- In January of this year, international bureaucrats on the USMCA Panel—at the direction of Canada and Mexico and unopposed by Joe Biden—changed the terms of USMCA to amount of regional auto parts content in North American cars by up to 33%, directly benefiting China and other foreign producers. \- President Trump will communicate to Canada and Mexico that FULL compliance with the terms of the USMCA is not optional. \- President Trump will work to stop the flow of American tax dollars that are subsidizing Chinese electric vehicle battery companies through Joe Biden’s so-called Inflation Reduction Act. \- President Trump will end Joe Biden’s war on American energy that is raising the price of gas. \- President Trump will once again achieve American energy independence, and energy dominance, and rapidly reduce the price of energy through more domestic production. \- President Trump will end Biden’s delays in federal drilling permits and leases that are needed to unleash American oil and natural gas production. Joe Biden has the cost of oil and gas leases by 50% and reduced the available acreage for drilling by 80%. \- President Trump will once again exit the horrendously unfair Paris Climate Accords and oppose all of the radical left’s efforts for a Green New Deal that are designed to shut down the development of America’s energy resources that any country’s in the world, including Russia and Saudi Arabia. \- President Trump will create a special team of warrior lawyers to identify every unnecessary federal regulation hampering the American auto industry and immediately eliminate them. \- President Trump will restore the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) that Joe Biden to its lowest level in 40 years. PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL ENACT A NATIONAL TARIFF POLICY TO PROTECT AMERICAN WORKERS AND STOP THE EXPORT OF AMERICAN WEALTH AND JOBS \- Rather than raising taxes on American producers like Joe Biden is , President Trump will impose tariffs on FOREIGN producers through a system of on most imported goods. \- President Trump’s universal baseline tariffs will create millions of new jobs, increase real household income, boost GDP, increase domestic manufacturing output, and generate hundreds of billions of dollars in new government revenue. \- As tariffs on foreign countries go up, taxes on American workers, families, and businesses can come down. \- Raising tariffs on foreign producers while lowering taxes for domestic producers will help generate jobs and wealth in the United States. \- These tariffs will restore a level playing field for American businesses worldwide and slash the trade deficit. \- To further defend the American auto industry from foreign onslaught, President Trump will pass the . \- Under this Act, if any foreign country imposes a tariff on American-made goods, such as cars or car parts, that is higher than the tariff imposed by the U.S. for the same goods, President Trump will have the authority to impose a reciprocal tariff of the same amount on that foreign country’s goods. \- To ensure fairness, the Trump Reciprocal Trade Act will empower President Trump to negotiate the reduction of tariffs on foreign automotive goods if foreign countries agree to reduce their tariffs on the same American products. \- The Trump Reciprocal Trade Act advances the views of 91 percent of conservatives and even 75 percent of Democrats, who "" placing reciprocal tariffs on foreign imports to protect American workers. \- A national tariff policy will put AMERICA FIRST and continue President Trump’s successful first term trade policies that "" America’s trade deficit, - "" wages, and created 500,000 new manufacturing jobs. \- Unfair and unbalanced trade policies have hurt American businesses, including in the auto industry. The result has been a "" in demand for U.S. domestic production, leading to a "" jobs and "". \- Since the moment he took office, have caused the annual trade deficit to skyrocket to "", its highest point ever \- Real wages have sharply declined over "" under Biden’s weak trade policies that flood the American market with cheap foreign goods produced by cheap foreign labor. \- The $4 trillion in foreign imports in 2022 under Biden was the highest EVER. JOE BIDEN’S GLOBAL WARMING FANATICISM IS CONDEMNING AMERICA’S AUTO INDUSTRY AND CAUSING HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF AMERICAN WORKERS TO LOSE THEIR JOBS \- For 36 years in the Senate, Joe Biden sat idly by and did nothing as the U.S. auto industry was devasted by a flood of cheap foreign imports from and , destroying entire towns and cities in the American Heartland. Auto workers asked for protection and Washington ignored them. \- The United States ISM Purchasing Managers Index (PMI), which measures increases in American manufacturing production, reached its since the pandemic with blue-collar manufacturing workers losing their jobs. \- Job creation under Joe Biden is of President Trump’s job creation levels pre-pandemic. \- Automobile manufacturing accounts for over $1 trillion (or nearly 6%) of total US GDP and approximately 11.4% of U.S. manufacturing output. \- The largest contributors to Biden’s trade deficit are cars and car parts from Europe, Japan, Mexico, Canada, and Korea. \- In 2022, the U.S. automotive industry reported its in more than a decade. \- As a result of Biden’s inflationary economy, new car prices increased 11.1% to used car prices shot up to 31.4% at the end of 2021. \- The U.S. has gone from once being the largest manufacturer of automobiles, to producing only half as many as China does. \- Biden’s environmental mandates will devastate the American auto industry. \- In April 2023, Joe Biden’s radical left EPA new emissions regulations that are so strict it is physically impossible for gas-powered cars to meet them. As a result, the regulations would require electric vehicles (EV) sales to increase from 6% to 67% of all U.S. auto sales by 2032. \- Biden’s new emissions regulations are projected to AT LEAST 117,000 auto manufacturing jobs throughout the U.S. \- America’s heartland, which produces more than two-fifths of U.S.-built vehicles and three-fifths of U.S.-built transmissions will be hit the hardest, with Michigan projected to lose an estimated 25,000 jobs, Indiana losing 16,000 jobs, and Ohio losing 14,000 jobs. \- Automotive manufacturing would seriously suffer in the South as well, with Tennessee losing 7,000 jobs, South Carolina losing 5,600 jobs, and Alabama losing 5,200 jobs. \- Job losses as a result of Biden’s insane EV mandates have already begun with GM the termination of 14,000 jobs and five assembly plants, Ford the firing of 3,000 jobs in its shift to EVs, and Stellantis (owner of Chrysler) the firing of 3,500 employees as it moves to EVs. \- Because EVs cost an average of - as much as gas-powered vehicles, take longer to fully charge, and have shorter ranges, of Americans prefer their next car purchase to be a gas-powered vehicle, of all car dealerships would never sell an EV, and of current EV owners plan to switch back to a gas-powered car. \- Because China possesses near on the minerals needed to make EV batteries, Biden’s insane emissions mandates will make the American auto industry dependent on China. \- In 2022, Joe Biden stripped mining licenses from the U.S. mineral industry in the Midwest, preventing the domestic production of minerals used to make EVs, forcing the U.S. to for MORE THAN HALF of its EV battery supply needs. \- EV’s rely on America’s aging electrical grid that has experienced blackouts in the summer. Accommodating for mandated increases in EVs will cost the U.S. in modifications to the electrical grid. \- Joe Biden’s betrayal of auto manufacturing threatens not only the 1 million auto manufacturing workers nationwide, but the whose jobs rely on cars and car parts, including dealerships, mechanics, and car part suppliers. PRESIDENT TRUMP SAVED THE AUTO INDUSTRY ONCE BEFORE \- On his first day in office, President Trump stopped the job-killing Trans-Pacific Partnership backed by Joe Biden and Ron DeSantis that would have decimated U.S. automakers. \- President Trump ended the disastrous trade deal known as NAFTA and replaced it with the USMCA. \- The Biden-endorsed NAFTA cost approximately 305,000 American auto workers their jobs—nearly a third of the entire American auto manufacturing industry. \- The USMCA is projected to $34 billion in new automotive manufacturing investments in the U.S., $23 billion in new annual purchases of U.S.-made automotive parts, and 76,000 U.S. automotive jobs with strict requirements that ensure more cars are made in AMERICAN factories by AMERICAN workers. \- President Trump Obama and Biden’s globalist Korea Trade Deal which would have cost the U.S. by flooding our market with foreign pickup trucks. Instead, President Trump secured the 25% “Chicken Tax” tariff on light trucks and DOUBLED the amount of U.S. automotive exports to Korea. \- President Trump’s tariffs on China the American auto industry, decreasing imports of Chinese auto parts by 50%, increasing American production, and keeping Ford, GM, Volvo, and other auto manufacturing plants in the U.S. \- President Trump ended Obama and Biden’s insane CAFE fuel economy standards, saving $200 billion in total costs, improving vehicle affordability, and reducing traffic fatalities by an estimated 3,300, according to the \- President Trump took to address overdependence on Chinese minerals for electric vehicle production leading to a surge in the mining of rare earth minerals. \- While Obama and Biden LOST 500 auto and auto parts factories, President Trump ADDED over 200 new auto and auto parts plants in just four years. \- Ford and General Motors collectively over $2 billion in domestic auto-manufacturing in plants across Michigan, creating approximately well over 4,000 new auto-manufacturing jobs. \- In August 2017, Toyota and Mazda their plan to build a $1.6 billion assembly plant in Huntsville, Alabama, creating 4,000 jobs. \- In March 2019, Ford an additional $850 million in Flat Rock, creating 900 jobs. \- GM expansions as part of an over $1 billion investment in March 2020 for making the Chevrolet Traverse, the Buick Enclave, and the Cadillac CT4 and CT5 in its Lansing plants, creating approximately 1,200 jobs. \- About $750 million of the GM investment went to Wayne, Michigan, where 2,700 jobs are being added over the next several years. TRANSCRIPT Joe Biden is waging war on the U.S. auto industry with a series of crippling mandates designed to force Americans into expensive electric cars, even as thousands of electric cars are piling up on car lots all unsold. This ridiculous Green New Deal crusade is causing car prices to skyrocket while setting the stage for the destruction of American auto production. These extreme left-wing policies are a disaster for families and consumers and are one of the main reasons the average cost of a new car is now over $50,000 dollars—absolutely outrageous. And there’s never been such a price before. These exorbitant prices are despite the fact that Biden is spending BILLIONS and BILLIONS of taxpayer dollars subsidizing electric cars for rich people, while normal Americans can’t afford to use one, nor do they even want to. Biden is killing American consumers and he’s also killing U.S. manufacturing. In an all-out attack on American-made pickup trucks, SUVs, and other automobiles, Biden DOUBLED CAFÉ standards—a move that is projected to cost automakers $200 billion dollars. By one estimate, Biden’s electric vehicle mandate will slaughter 117,000 U.S. auto-manufacturing jobs, with workers in Michigan, Indiana, and Ohio among the hardest hit. And I hope United Auto Workers is listening to this because I think you better endorse Trump because I am going to grow your business and they are destroying your business. They are absolutely destroying your business. How people can vote for you just because it’s an automatic Democrat vote. Look at how they have decimated the car industry over the years. Mexico has 32 percent of the business that we used to have. It’s ridiculous. But they didn’t do it while I was President, I can tell you that. If Biden’s assault is not stopped, American auto-production will be totally DEAD. That’s why I am going to terminate these Green New Deal atrocities on Day One. In my first term, I fought for autoworkers like never before, canceling TPP, which was a disaster, ending the NAFTA nightmare, the NAFTA trade deal was the worst deal ever negotiated on trade, and renegotiating Obama’s horrendous Korea trade deal. Made it a great deal from a horrible deal. I saved the American auto industry once, and now, I will save it again. Every voter in Michigan, Ohio, Indiana, Georgia, South Carolina, and North Carolina needs to know if you want to have an auto-industry, you need to defeat Joe Biden—he’s a corrupt president—and reelect President Donald Trump. Thank you very much. We will take care of you. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. body:
I don’t say this often, but she’s right about this
#

Friend, it's not often that I find myself agreeing with Marjorie Taylor Greene, but I just saw this clip of her talking about President Biden, and **she’s 100% right here:**
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/3095?c0=ap-em-july23-mtg-vid.bXbgxu&refcode=em230720-1-30&t=1&akid=1433%2E159979%2Eeb7jZg)_“Programs to address education, medical care, urban problems, rural poverty, transportation, Medicare, Medicaid, labor unions, and he still is working on it” - Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA)_
**[WATCH NOW](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/3095?c0=ap-em-july23-mtg-vid.bXbgxu&refcode=em230720-1-30&t=2&akid=1433%2E159979%2Eeb7jZg)**
As Rep. Greene so perfectly explained, President Biden and Democrats have made incredible progress these past few years. But in order to keep it going, we need two things to happen:
1. We need to reelect President Biden.

2. We need to maintain our Democratic majority in the Senate. _Because if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader, he will take every opportunity to block President Biden’s agenda and roll back all the progress we’ve made._

Protecting our planet from climate change. Defending our democracy. Investing in education for our children. **So much is possible if we continue to stand together:**
[**So please, click here to watch the clip of Marjorie Taylor Greene, and then consider making a contribution to help hold our Democratic majority and pass President Biden’s agenda.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/3095?c0=ap-em-july23-mtg-vid.bXbgxu&refcode=em230720-1-30&t=3&akid=1433%2E159979%2Eeb7jZg)**
**[WATCH + DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/3095?c0=ap-em-july23-mtg-vid.bXbgxu&refcode=em230720-1-30&t=4&akid=1433%2E159979%2Eeb7jZg)**
Thank you,
Alex
P.S. If you can’t donate right now, that’s ok — I’m still SO grateful for your support. But please, consider [**sharing the video with a friend or relative.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/3095?c0=ap-em-july23-mtg-vid.bXbgxu&refcode=em230720-1-30&t=5&akid=1433%2E159979%2Eeb7jZg)** It’s going to take a big team of us working together to beat the GOP and continue making progress for California and for America.

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1433%2E159979%2Eeb7jZg)

\-----Begin forwarded message----- Subject: FWD: We put the Nevada Way into action. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com From: Governor Joe Lombardo <[info@joelombardofornv.com](mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com)>
---
| Peter,
After my very first State of the State Address since being sworn in as the 31st Governor of Nevada, I was asked by a reporter what I was most looking forward to over the months ahead in Carson City.
My response? "Getting sh*t done."
I'm proud to report that over this past legislative session, that is EXACTLY what we've been able to do, Peter - get things done on behalf of the incredible, hardworking Nevadans who put their trust in me to continue my public service and lead as their Governor.
That has meant signing critical executive orders and working alongside my colleagues to deliver legislative victories that will leave a lasting, positive change in our great state for years to come.
Bottom line - we've been putting The Nevada Way into action!
---
| Here's just SOME of what we were able to accomplish in my first six months of serving as your Governor:
Delivered historic wins for education in our state. I ordered a statewide education audit in Nevada and signed critical legislation into law that brings more accountability and CHOICE to our education system. My Democrat colleagues may have stood against parent's rights and gridlocked some of our progress... but we made important progress and I will continue to fight for MORE choices for families!
Took action to Keep Nevada Safe. This included passing legislation aimed at stopping school violence and legislation to combat the soft-on-crime policies that have left our communities vulnerable and unsafe. I'm picking up right where I left off as Sheriff protecting you and your family!
Sent the message that Nevada is now open for business. With massive investments in our state, like Tesla's new $3.6 billion gigafactory, we are working to build a strong and diversified economy and bring unparalleled growth here to our great state.
And Peter, we're only just getting started...
If you want to help us build on the success of this first legislative session - to help us CONTINUE to strive for The Nevada Way and overcome all challenges in our path - [then I hope you'll consider making an investment in our work so we can keep delivering these victories. Rush in yours today, and let's build on our great momentum!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013ybaESJDKLG8Hld_6EXgMoR0dCO0r_PsyB4G-Y4lZu_XPFInWPlBSWm9Hjbd7_ZIiHkSDuu9TmhfqSa1NIl8jNBh81lbofsfDcB7Ihx5uMPFeq4V98D8F6U86P_wu0jHhDXjU9sx6O7Rb0O9QqMIOxA7yRSkhPfvD4plGG4QHhe4jQol7lh8hvYayYeQ937ldID-yLrbT4P4V2IvjOEoQrLz_YqbxXOpFH-7zrC0hy4=&c=Rj48CGL0P52AaEJY0JTAW1OAi9vZJCW6bN4u4ZlDv9UKlCPaV3LKKA==&ch=M7kRUPipT69SwsD5L0Huc1wcdGBhCNR6KvJAdM3JPI_ZCg070d-Vgg==)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: The Supreme Court has reversed decades of progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Last month, the Supreme Court once again reversed decades of progress when it greenlit discrimination against the LGBTQIA+ community by businesses. This attack on basic rights, one that bolsters the assault on LGBTQIA+ Americans in state legislatures across the country, is in keeping with its decisions favoring this Court’s right-wing majority.

It is heartbreaking to watch our nation go backward and see our hard-fought progress eroded. The Supreme Court is wildly out of touch with the values of modern-day Americans, and it will remain so as long as its justices are serving lifetime appointments.

Sign if you agree: We need term limits for Supreme Court justices. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/scotus-term-limits-petition?contactdata=FpHMC49vNcU4OqRXFRWZwDmirhDuuVz7zmXgwhR+9/QX8vb3bT3ns6QfIDgwYgsCWiOWMTfPvZVqf0QiQxh88cDM6T++5zAqRAMti58+bl1iTNrqBUEtOAviMHqIe2lBR8X1WDwGn/dD+98nADfYZw==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/scotus-term-limits-petition?contactdata=FpHMC49vNcU4OqRXFRWZwDmirhDuuVz7zmXgwhR+9/QX8vb3bT3ns6QfIDgwYgsCWiOWMTfPvZVqf0QiQxh88cDM6T++5zAqRAMti58+bl1iTNrqBUEtOAviMHqIe2lBR8X1WDwGn/dD+98nADfYZw==]

To re-establish the Court as an impartial, nonpartisan branch of the federal government, I introduced the Supreme Court Term Limits and Regular Appointments Act, which would create an 18-year term limit for justices.

Establishing term limits for Supreme Court justices would eliminate the incentive to play politics and plan retirements around whichever party holds the White House. The goal of this bill is to ensure that justices can focus on the law, not politics, and are not out of step with everyday Americans.

Democrats, Independents, and Republicans all agree [https://apnews.com/article/abortion-ketanji-brown-jackson-us-supreme-court-government-and-politics-only-on-ap-8adc9a08c9e8001c8ef0455906542a60] : it's time to set term limits for Supreme Court justices.

Sign the petition and show your support for the Supreme Court Term Limits and Regular Appointments Act. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/scotus-term-limits-petition?contactdata=FpHMC49vNcU4OqRXFRWZwDmirhDuuVz7zmXgwhR+9/QX8vb3bT3ns6QfIDgwYgsCWiOWMTfPvZVqf0QiQxh88cDM6T++5zAqRAMti58+bl1iTNrqBUEtOAviMHqIe2lBR8X1WDwGn/dD+98nADfYZw==]

In solidarity,
Ro

clean_body: [] Friend, Last month, the Supreme Court once again reversed decades of progress when it greenlit discrimination against the LGBTQIA+ community by businesses. This attack on basic rights, one that bolsters the assault on LGBTQIA+ Americans in state legislatures across the country, is in keeping with its decisions favoring this Court’s right-wing majority. It is heartbreaking to watch our nation go backward and see our hard-fought progress eroded. The Supreme Court is wildly out of touch with the values of modern-day Americans, and it will remain so as long as its justices are serving lifetime appointments. Sign if you agree: We need term limits for Supreme Court justices. [==] Sign the Petition [==] To re-establish the Court as an impartial, nonpartisan branch of the federal government, I introduced the Supreme Court Term Limits and Regular Appointments Act, which would create an 18-year term limit for justices. Establishing term limits for Supreme Court justices would eliminate the incentive to play politics and plan retirements around whichever party holds the White House. The goal of this bill is to ensure that justices can focus on the law, not politics, and are not out of step with everyday Americans. Democrats, Independents, and Republicans all agree [] : it's time to set term limits for Supreme Court justices. Sign the petition and show your support for the Supreme Court Term Limits and Regular Appointments Act. [==] In solidarity, Ro DONATE [] [] [] [] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com] Ro for Congress P.O Box 3513 Santa Clara, CA 95051 United States Paid for by Ro for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Did I Lie?
body:
I Have Been Accused Of Lying... This week, Fake News Outlets aka Godless Globalist Propagandists like Right Wing Watch have accused me of lying in a
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.114.1.9b7071808653299b82395f34b456ce8c) |
---
## I Have Been Accused Of Lying...
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.115.1.ca4f1b8b5a487db648dcfb8fc1e549bd)
---
This week, _Fake News Outlets_ aka _Godless Globalist Propagandists_ like **Right Wing Watch** have accused me of lying in a sermon that I preached a few weeks ago at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.116.1.a2bce98b6889b9fa6532c8e71a3ff489) OKC & Tulsa.
I took the Sunday before **Independence Day** to answer a looming question: _Was America Founded To Be A Christian Nation?_
History and specifically Church History is something that I love.
I received a B.A. and M.A. in **Theological & Historical Studies** from **Oral Roberts University** and have continued to study the history of Christianity especially in America.
I have had **David Barton** come speak at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.117.1.1749848a49dedb52b74fad12d20af4ae) in the past (David Barton once served as the Youth Pastor of Sheridan.Church many years ago) and I have read many books of his about our nation's Christian heritage.
What I shared at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.118.1.849648d89528dd142d33b76541d25cc5) has been well documented, researched and verified.
The problem with what I shared is that it exposes the **LIE** that has been used to try and remove God from all spheres of American life.
I would encourage you to watch that sermon and judge for yourself.
Watch America's True Story here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/6AHX38ChqAY?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.119.1.6f4f8897039b7399bba3531d8747d84b)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.120.1.071e92712ce3fd12f4fc36895246456c), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.121.1.0234f869fcab97586bab8ddddb7a317e), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.122.1.84e07e5646a3f1338d6fd9c00ea02da5), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.123.1.623aef33906fcb21c659f328719228bb), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.124.1.f8d2483fe84a6ede4c4a24f5c246d634), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.125.1.adad98b9692554434e41c05f685c420c)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.126.1.0c592cf19579b16d473198c7bf212b4b)
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.127.1.6607b8711db89dd10a0a6782a37ad276)
---
| | [ America's True Story ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.128.1.6403134d527d97a38c81408474072c8f)
---
---
## Two BROKE Preachers Going To Church...
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.129.1.ea7bd6bf142fe5158a3a26c1e8e159b0)
---
At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.130.1.3ac6325e04dea8f538544d9ff4e4e6b1) OKC & Tulsa, we are in a series each WKND over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.131.1.0d2069e2c71fb9ae8af8e61835ac4287): _verse by verse_.
This past WKND, we opened up **Acts 3** which is a story of two broke preachers (Peter & John) going to church and on their way encountering a man who lame from birth asking for money.
I took a different approach to this classic biblical story and I think you will be intrigued by the angel of this sermon.
Watch [Acts Pt.12](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.132.1.ecf65b0291adb81a6d216ca52e162908) here: [https://youtube.com/live/ThM7my6KqHU?feature=share ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.133.1.11820f6515f199b62912f5256c648f0b)
| | [ Acts Pt. 12 - Two Broke Preachers Going To Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.134.1.d925f15480d9a2bcc11d4cb2891e3fea)
---
---
## Why Are American Churches Struggling?
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.135.1.b2965c7dc9e9ac48d002d3c7bb05f245)
---
**American Churches** were once _booming_ like many _boom towns_ in our nation's history.
Unfortunately, the trend now for many American Churches is not the boom town experience but more like a _ghost town_...
Did you know that twelve churches per day in America **close down**? Church attendance is at an **all time low**. In 1972 around 92%of Americans identified as Christian, whereas in 2020 that number dropped to 64%.
**Why is American Christianity struggling?**
Two Sundays ago, at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.136.1.27972abfe540c03f6dd3c9288536fac5) OKC & Tulsa, I addressed that question and how a church can **BOOM**.
We have seen the **BOOM** experience at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.137.1.165e35ad18cca9fae304f14ad46861e4) in all categories: reach, influence, attendance & finances.
There are **four primary reasons** that [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.138.1.7e2225c621c2970ff60caf569009a053) has boomed and they are found in **Acts 2:42**.
This message will bless you and your local church!
Watch here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/YCcVTz88FMo?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.139.1.f0b113a29e94ce60873b3bc823540a92)
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.140.1.a6d0fafb87fd869541c194ad2f2ef175)
---
---
## When It's OK To Disobey
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.141.1.136bfff172aafe263d4271ab2ad10cfe)
---
Is there a time when it is OK to disobey civil authoirty as a Christian?
The answer is YES.
Watch Daniel Pt. 4 - When It's OK To Disobey: [https://www.youtube.com/live/4at5EzLq68c?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.142.1.95ad9dcd35e63924a2d9ed27ddba686f)
| | [ Daniel Pt. 4 - When It's OK To Disobey ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=229245.143.1.cc142eef79c595a5d924c380b8fb69bd)
---

body:

One of Lateefah’s most formidable opponents is gaining traction. Check out the slew of endorsements he rolled out yesterday:
[](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/136?t=2&akid=64%2E1163%2E7O_MOi)
We’re incredibly proud of all of the support we’ve received from our community, but this early outpouring of support didn’t blind us to the fact that**this race was going to be a tough one.**
**[HELP US FIGHT BACK »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230720?amount=10&refcode=em20230720&refcode2=64_1163_7O_MOi&akid=64%2E1163%2E7O_MOi)**
Lateefah — fighter that she is — is well prepared to face the changing dynamics of this race, win, and be a voice for her community in Congress. But there’s no denying that she needs our support today. [**And if that’s all you need to hear****, we’re asking you to rush a contribution of $10 to team Lateefah right now.**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/136?t=3&akid=64%2E1163%2E7O_MOi)****

name: Trump Watch (via DLCC.org)
subject: UPDATE: Trump could be indicted for a THIRD time
body:
If Trump is indicted in the special counsel’s investigation, he could finally be held accountable for the damage he’s done to our democracy. | | |
---
| | **UPDATE:** **** Special Counsel Jack Smith’s investigation into attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election is ramping up – **Donald Trump was just informed that he could be facing his _third_ indictment. ** If Trump is indicted in the special counsel’s investigation, he could _finally_ be held accountable for the damage he’s done to our democracy and for his role in the deadly January 6th insurrection. Trump is afraid – _on the campaign trail, he’s claiming these investigations are a conspiracy theory to halt his 2024 campaign._ But the evidence doesn’t lie, and it’s critical Trump be held responsible for his actions. | **Do you think Trump should be indicted for his attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election?**

Yes
No
Unsure

Peter,

This is former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy with some news to share with you. ⬇️⬇️

On June 10th, my opponent, Sen. Jon Tester likened President Trump to a dictator. This is what a U.S. Senator seeking reelection from a state that President Trump won by 16 points in 2020 - told a group of liberal activists, based in Boston.

**The news of the encounter is just further proof of how far-left Jon Tester has become.**

Jon Tester, a U.S. Senator from Montana, is seeking money from a progressive liberal Boston-based political group whose mission, according to the website is to “ _**find ways that citizens in Blue states can have an impact on national politics.**_ ”

**To recap this:** My opponent, who is running for his 4th term in the U.S. Senate from a state President Trump won in 2020 by 16 points,**referred to Donald Trump as a dictator to a group of liberal donors based in Boston.**

Seems to me like a great way to win over the people of Montana.

I’m curious to know if you agree with progressive Senator Jon Tester: **[Do you think President Trump is a dictator, too?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e78e6ba798cd4756ac4dfb0ef46525fe&_e=Q-03BwOl7fT2KL6bWL4oVgb8Dx_mL26JJYSD20rPqqh4nfW6Ai6L1-5fLQpspLaFpH70Nl9Rt2neNnwAPh8Bi1_tZaHa6zTTkAQoQ-4tVoSeChl0QODM8ep0sqjepJ7lN9cL9F84Ke2DH30T64mIooqmpvQzjLQ2c0Q-DG7hDK0oOijXEvjYXi_Yy8iHiglg_wqqcgtJpFq4VMcrMGq3doEJ5r5m4zUwxZKIUHuKs0dLJnNenKpTlRKY2jUF252wPjlIBOzLQFLXPOElYpB_YNmIn9dm0i4-KtPymmyYadIEzNlQr0t-b8uICOUUgx2TPxXrsvE7LKbz7nfs-VPMgGCnzRc1ce_O5x_42Y7WLhyokar01mVviPS4FNKDYU7IYuZZqKZ_pzjsS_y_q2Z95Q%3D%3D)**

Peter,there is no telling how widely this news story will be covered by the mainstream press in Montana, if at all. That’s why **I am counting on folks just like you to make sure this story gets attention it deserves.**

**[I’m emailing you today in hopes that you’ll offer me your own opinion on the matter](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e78e6ba798cd4756ac4dfb0ef46525fe&_e=Q-03BwOl7fT2KL6bWL4oVgb8Dx_mL26JJYSD20rPqqh4nfW6Ai6L1-5fLQpspLaFpH70Nl9Rt2neNnwAPh8Bi1_tZaHa6zTTkAQoQ-4tVoSeChl0QODM8ep0sqjepJ7lN9cL9F84Ke2DH30T64mIooqmpvQzjLQ2c0Q-DG7hDK0oOijXEvjYXi_Yy8iHiglg_wqqcgtJpFq4VMcrMGq3doEJ5r5m4zUwxZKIUHuKs0dLJnNenKpTlRKY2jUF252wSh01F1O3-akYaDrxkxA9k3oJ6Nh1X1ZT1HJRhpQWN38Dxnn2-LcIhE_xMAdQFYiTrgW_Yd5jbtRHoLDpIH1RZ74xyJ6sgJoce3vB1XZa-Y_MtwR-IcSqMeg979bMZJg3b9FRBY7j8CtVcboUXj6VnA%3D%3D)** , join my team, and perhaps even contribute a few dollars that we can use to inform voters that the lone Democrat- **federal and statewide elected official -** in Montana is pandering to liberal out of state donors and likening President Trump to a dictator.

On June 10th, my opponent, Sen. Jon Tester likened President Trump to a dictator. This is what a U.S. Senator seeking reelection from a state that President Trump won by 16 points in 2020 - told a group of liberal activists, based in Boston.

**The news of the encounter is just further proof of how far-left Jon Tester has become.**

Jon Tester, a U.S. Senator from Montana, is seeking money from a progressive liberal Boston-based political group whose mission, according to the website is to “ _**find ways that citizens in Blue states can have an impact on national politics.**_ ”

**To recap this:** My opponent, who is running for his 4th term in the U.S. Senate from a state President Trump won in 2020 by 16 points,**referred to Donald Trump as a dictator to a group of liberal donors based in Boston.**

clean_body: We have to fight back. | Peter — FIRST: A former Democratic representative switched parties, giving the GOP one-seat supermajorities in BOTH chambers of the General Assembly. THEN: Republicans used their ill-gotten majorities to push through an extreme abortion ban and other radical legislation, despite clear disapproval from North Carolinians. NOW: GOP legislators are TERRIFIED that their extreme agenda is so unpopular that the voters will hold them accountable at the polls. That’s why Republicans have introduced anti-voter legislation to keep some folks from having their voices heard — and plotted gerrymandering that is so partisan Democratic candidates just won’t stand a chance. Peter, Roy is fighting back to ensure Democrats can overcome the odds, because the future of our state is on the line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you! name: Protect Health care via Fairness Project
subject: 1.1 million Americans without Medicaid coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66785856/417586753/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmIzMzM1MC0zZTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEdX24_kMW8yixMmJ8-_O3vBIA3q6RZrLW3i4JwRNXo=&emci=d2a14d9d-2327-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=76b33350-3e27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=561582) **This morning, the non-partisan elections analysts at the _Cook Political Report_ moved our race from "Lean Republican" to "Toss up." Our race in CA-41 is officially one of the most crucial pickup targets in the 2024 election.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66786141/417587305/-1669222325?refcode=em-7.20.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjJjMGRmNy0zZTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1cfo7VONVNRuZ3KOt44pcdkErTRb-9OFHaDDL2sy-M=)
In an election cycle where Democrats have a chance to retake control in Congress, our district is one of the few places in the country where Democrats can go on offense and unseat a Republican.

Here are the top takeaways from their report:

**» Redistricting added thousands of new Democratic voters in the Inland Empire and desert communities like Palm Springs to CA-41.** In past elections, Ken Calvert enjoyed a strong Republican edge. Now, Democrats hold a +3,000 registration advantage.

**» Ken Calvert's voting record has been out-of-step with a district that's now trending toward Democrats.** In his 30-year tenure, Calvert voted down LGBTQ+ protections, supported Trump's plot to decertify the 2020 election, and still suggests that climate change is a hoax.

Our community has no appetite for Calvert's extremism. We’re ready for a new generation of leaders who will work on issues that matter to working folks -- health care, creating jobs and pathways to economic prosperity, strengthening American democracy, and treating climate change with the urgency it deserves.

**[Now that we're _officially_ in a toss up race, we must expand our capacity quickly and early. clean_body: | = Big news, Peter: This morning, the non-partisan elections analysts at the Cook Political Report moved our race from "Lean Republican" to "Toss up." Our race in CA-41 is officially one of the most crucial pickup targets in the 2024 election. = In an election cycle where Democrats have a chance to retake control in Congress, our district is one of the few places in the country where Democrats can go on offense and unseat a Republican. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Here are the top takeaways from their report: » Redistricting added thousands of new Democratic voters in the Inland Empire and desert communities like Palm Springs to CA-41. In past elections, Ken Calvert enjoyed a strong Republican edge. Now, Democrats hold a +3,000 registration advantage. » Ken Calvert's voting record has been out-of-step with a district that's now trending toward Democrats. In his 30-year tenure, Calvert voted down LGBTQ+ protections, supported Trump's plot to decertify the 2020 election, and still suggests that climate change is a hoax. Our community has no appetite for Calvert's extremism. We’re ready for a new generation of leaders who will work on issues that matter to working folks -- health care, creating jobs and pathways to economic prosperity, strengthening American democracy, and treating climate change with the urgency it deserves. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you! name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley + the NRSC are terrified
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
A handful of billionaire donors just put more than $1 MILLION into a Super PAC to fund ads attacking me

| Peter — Josh Hawley and the National Republican Senatorial Committee are so afraid of our movement, they’ve not only spent half a year attacking me for playing a card game... [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66786650/417588762/159802455?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230720_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiODkxOTY0LTQwMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HxNe-_tN4AlsUZBa7OgGX1PQmvXhB7EAHv2o3W75UPw=) They also just had a handful of billionaire donors dump **more than $1 MILLION** into a Super PAC to prop up Josh Hawley and fund attack ads against me. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66786651/417588763/159802455?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230720_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiODkxOTY0LTQwMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HxNe-_tN4AlsUZBa7OgGX1PQmvXhB7EAHv2o3W75UPw=) I won’t lie and say this race will be easy — but there’s a reason the NRSC is already on the offense. clean_body: I’m sharing it with YOU first. Not even the Fake News has seen it. I’m sharing it with YOU first. Not even the Fake News has seen it. | | | Friend, I'm often asked: Mr. President, how do you get the motivation to keep fighting all of these vicious witch hunts? The truth is: my supporters like YOU are my motivation to keep fighting all of the false attacks aimed at destroying our movement. You are the source of my courage, my hope, and my resolution. You are the reason I will never give up our mission to save America. That's why I decided it would be right to deliver my FIRST recorded statement to YOU - NOT the Fake News. | | The first unlawful indictment didn't break us. The second unlawful indictment didn't break us. Now, the Deep State is hoping that a THIRD unlawful indictment will finally bring us down. But these left-wing radicals who hate our country will NEVER understand the courage and patriotism of countless patriots like YOU who will do anything to save America. This movement is much bigger than me. Our movement is about giving a voice to the millions of Americans who feel betrayed by the Washington ruling class - and who feel that America has become a rigged system that benefits political insiders at the expense of the rest of us. They can try to stop me all they want with threats, indictments, and even arrests, but they can NEVER crush the spirits of 74 million patriots who want to make our country great again! NOTHING can stand in the way of a patriot 's desire to be free. As always, if you and your family are getting crushed by the very sinister and evil people who are sadly now in charge of Washington, D.C., then simply ignore what I'm about to ask... ...But if you can chip in, our movement can certainly use your support right now. | Thank you, | Donald J. Peter,

The best holiday of the year (**4th of July**) falling on a Tuesday seems to have set us back a bit in terms of fundraising for the month.

During the first week of the month, my campaign brought in just $13,346. **While I’m so grateful for the folks who stepped up to help us raise that money, unfortunately it’s not going to do the trick** - especially when one of my Democrat opponent’s is bringing in, on average, **$34,000 per day.**

I hate to be blunt, but I think that is what it’s going to take to get my point across today. I’m running against two Democrats at the moment and each of them has had a lot of success raising money for this race. During the 90 day period from April 1st to June 30th, **My Democrat opponents raised $3.1 million and $1.7 million for their campaigns, respectively.**

As the only Republican in this race, it’s paramount that we’re able to keep pace with the funds these Democrats are raising for the political operations.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: The only way that we lose the opportunity to flip this Senate seat Republican is if good people like you sit on the sidelines. | | Peter, The best holiday of the year (4th of July) falling on a Tuesday seems to have set us back a bit in terms of fundraising for the month. During the first week of the month, my campaign brought in just $13,346. While I’m so grateful for the folks who stepped up to help us raise that money, unfortunately it’s not going to do the trick - especially when one of my Democrat opponent’s is bringing in, on average, $34,000 per day. I hate to be blunt, but I think that is what it’s going to take to get my point across today. I’m running against two Democrats at the moment and each of them has had a lot of success raising money for this race. During the 90 day period from April 1st to June 30th, My Democrat opponents raised $3.1 million and $1.7 million for their campaigns, respectively. As the only Republican in this race, it’s paramount that we’re able to keep pace with the funds these Democrats are raising for the political operations. With just 11 days left in the month, As much as the mainstream media would have you believe otherwise, Arizona is still a conservative state. The only way that we lose the opportunity to flip this Senate seat Republican is if good people like you sit on the sidelines. Polling across the country shows that voters are fed up with Democrat governance, meaning conservatives like me will have the support of the people on our side when the time comes – we just need to make sure we can be in touch with them before Democrats have a chance to muddy the waters. . So, if you’re able to do your part in helping us hit that goal, please use the link below to make a gift to my U.S. Senate campaign right now. With respect, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: “The untold story of Senator John Fetterman’s battle with depression”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John has never acted like a traditional politician — so it was never a thought that he would hide his struggle with depression.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20230720-8470-header&t=1&akid=8470%2E434096%2EL-Yrbt)
Derek, I’ve always known João had a big heart. ❤️
That was clear as we built a life and a wonderful family together in Western Pennsylvania, and it was clear as he entered public service with our shared conviction that no person should be left behind and no community should be forgotten.
**But the last year has really proven that João is the bravest and strongest person I know.**
As he overcame a stroke, won a seat in the Senate, and then went public with and got treatment for his struggle with depression, he set an example for millions of people who might also need help.
**John has never _acted_ like a traditional politician — so it was never a thought that he would hide his struggle with depression.** What’s been the biggest surprise is just how strong an outpouring of support we’ve seen. From Pennsylvanians of every background and political persuasion, to Senators and their staff on both sides of the aisle, to people across the country who see themselves in João’s struggle, those well-wishes have meant the world to our family.
Now this week, João’s on the cover of TIME (I know, I could barely believe it too — and omg, how cute is he 🥰).
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49723?t=2&akid=8470%2E434096%2EL-Yrbt)
In the article, João talks openly and honestly about his journey, and Derek, I could not be more proud. This last year has been a long journey for our family. It may have been a very challenging year for you and your family as well. We were lucky to have the support of our friends, loved ones, and all of Pennsylvania — and we’ve pulled through. We are here rooting for (and fighting for policy that will support) you and yours, too.
_“Now I have a duty to pay it forward. Because I’ll be honest with you, I would be scared where I would be right now if I didn’t have the kind of help that I got at Walter Reed. And it’s a shame that those types of resources are not available to everyone.**But what is available is that I have a duty to be a champion of that.** ”
— John Fetterman_
João ran to represent Pennsylvania because he has a plan and a purpose to make sure Pennsylvania’s best days are ahead of us — and so are his. That’s what he’s hard at work in the Senate to make happen. That’s in no small part thanks to all of you.
Thank you, thank you, thank you.
— Gisele ❤️
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230720-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230720-8470&refcode2=8470_434096_L-Yrbt&akid=8470%2E434096%2EL-Yrbt)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8470%2E434096%2EL-Yrbt)

clean_body: Defend Rashida Tlaib. | | | Friend, Yesterday, Rep. Rashida Tlaib joined several progressive Members of Congress in boycotting the Israeli President’s address to Congress, protesting a government that systematically violates Palestinians’ human rights. Because of her leadership in support of Palestinians’ human rights, GOP leaders and others have denounced Rashida this week. She’s had to defend the very humanity of Palestinians like her grandmother. | It shouldn’t be bold to speak out against arming oppressors or funding apartheid. When violence occurs at the hand of the state against marginalized communities anywhere, our political leaders should speak up. But Democrats and Republicans alike keep policing women of color in Congress who dare to speak the truth about Israel’s apartheid regime, including policing Rashida. They’re out of line with the views of the American people, as polls continue to show a growing shift in support of Palestinian rights and against our government’s unconditional funding of Israel’s human rights abuses. As U.S. legislators ignore their base and try to silence legitimate criticism of the Israeli government’s racist and oppressive policies, Rashida’s bold voice and leadership are more necessary in Congress now than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | Friend,

---
Have you ever wondered why virtually EVERY Democrat-run city is falling to pieces?

---
...Homeless encampments, violent crime, _legalized_ theft, havens for illegal aliens, and you have to step over used needles on the ground just to go to the grocery store... _
_
---
In some cases, it’s incompetence. _But in most cases, it’s _**not**__.

---
The truth is: **it’s a _PURPOSEFUL_ DESTRUCTION of our country.**

---
The Left knows what they’re doing. These are sick people.

---
They don’t want the same America you and I want – secure borders, safe neighborhoods, affordable homes, strong families, peace through strength, an impartial justice system, national economic independence, pride in _American_ -made products, and a _FAIR_ system where if you’re honest and work hard, you can achieve the American Dream.

---
_If you have any doubt whether their destruction is intentional, just look at what they’re doing to our legal system..._

---
**They’ve weaponized our justice system to try and JAIL the regime’s leading opponent who happens to be fully backed by the hardworking people of our country.**

---
If you wanted to dismantle our free Republic, you’d do _EXACTLY_ what the Democrats have been doing for years.

---
That’s why I refuse to believe the Left’s radical agenda is an accident. _It’s intentional._

---
But in 2024, We The People will peacefully take back our country, and together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

---

clean_body: . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . | | | | | Friend, Have you ever wondered why virtually EVERY Democrat-run city is falling to pieces? ...Homeless encampments, violent crime, legalized theft, havens for illegal aliens, and you have to step over used needles on the ground just to go to the grocery store... In some cases, it’s incompetence. But in most cases, it’s not. The truth is: it’s a PURPOSEFUL DESTRUCTION of our country. The Left knows what they’re doing. These are sick people. They don’t want the same America you and I want – secure borders, safe neighborhoods, affordable homes, strong families, peace through strength, an impartial justice system, national economic independence, pride in American -made products, and a FAIR system where if you’re honest and work hard, you can achieve the American Dream. If you have any doubt whether their destruction is intentional, just look at what they’re doing to our legal system... They’ve weaponized our justice system to try and JAIL the regime’s leading opponent who happens to be fully backed by the hardworking people of our country. If you wanted to dismantle our free Republic, you’d do EXACTLY what the Democrats have been doing for years. That’s why I refuse to believe the Left’s radical agenda is an accident. It’s intentional. But in 2024, We The People will peacefully take back our country, and together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
This is what our Great American Comeback means to me.
---

If you would like to unsubscribe, click **[here](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=9955c8b31be54b5090a41dca462a8050&_t=_QUz1zGIDdS6REzYz0-XD7OAMTTS9HXOOQSVgZ31fv5rTyX6nKuNadNMOEckyslyhhQxQ9E9uJ4mrPUtK_RYnm2pTs8qo8YI9FcIesJ_jMk%3D)**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9955c8b31be54b5090a41dca462a8050&_e=_ZXoBSOalBF_FpIs_uk8d-TWXILtUDUPB6k02eMGQc366p6oxngpzF_HK7Tyu5Q-pCNijTZdAMvIC3Vb64C-of6LZwdZlXcFw8MraclZLwoTokRp-5TITeITf--Xukm51PGqSjxEl1YirGaknGk4MNasxmffwh31_uuOHbjpOch-IjZFPVTYPwp0AZDEIlnXStK7PtuSPWfkfT9a3dYn2I5bAI1GqsCP3qklHmOemHrHavQhX5amq3vrsLoSZLgEQA1xUJa7cZHh1DD8L6RsiHKgLnUQaZPl0MOjn1ykmUWEe9FTBxhoY6IxkbqdYzzVfZJ5cPJCPkgt197Dm3-KCUFsL3c29OTOGhfsrknpBt_nMLsaE_GRgJPH8NvMdGDFhil9gET3B1nl_UEaA9XBjQ%3D%3D)

Peter,
You know that I am running for President of the United States to lead our Great American Comeback.**I 'm here to tell you why**.

In Florida, we went out and led when it mattered. _**We chose facts over fear**_. We chose education over indoctrination. We chose Law and Order over rioting and disorder to make our state a citadel of freedom.

Over the years, I've watched the Left chip away at the freedom of our great nation. I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. **Decline is a choice**. **Success is attainable**. **And freedom is worth fighting for**.

That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults.
---
| | [Stand with me today!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9955c8b31be54b5090a41dca462a8050&_e=_ZXoBSOalBF_FpIs_uk8d-TWXILtUDUPB6k02eMGQc366p6oxngpzF_HK7Tyu5Q-pCNijTZdAMvIC3Vb64C-of6LZwdZlXcFw8MraclZLwoTokRp-5TITeITf--Xukm51PGqSjxEl1YirGaknGk4MNasxmffwh31_uuOHbjpOch-IjZFPVTYPwp0AZDEIlnXStK7PtuSPWfkfT9a3dYn2I5bAI1GqsCP3qklHmOemHrHavQhX5amq3vrsLoSZLgEpw07mCuXAwMFL0nzhau0o6ILFStB_j6iHNAxgSxltRZ7B54ZGN3QFKl5I_gdjwiVn0l6RXdljWHqh2Q0QPIYt8sUl3IlbI1Js_NKx_2jfPeCUgWcTND78F3dpR6jb1ND4dgaJmYDkjF9Kgkz14tbow%3D%3D)
---
It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed.
Peter--we will get it done. No excuses.

I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, **I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out**.
---

Ron DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9955c8b31be54b5090a41dca462a8050&_e=_ZXoBSOalBF_FpIs_uk8d-TWXILtUDUPB6k02eMGQc366p6oxngpzF_HK7Tyu5Q-pCNijTZdAMvIC3Vb64C-of6LZwdZlXcFw8MraclZLwoTokRp-5TITeITf--Xukm51PGqSjxEl1YirGaknGk4MNasxmffwh31_uuOHbjpOch-IjZFPVTYPwp0AZDEIlnXStK7PtuSPWfkfT9a3dYn2I5bAI1GqsCP3qklHmOemHrHavQhX5amq3vrsLoSZLgEsWV7hPVbm696g_mbuhEdFDgmRV3AtDFrw_ZevyK3ZtXY126GA0AIX3VflrOIC1lNCnasP8tB2uG8Q15-MBOOsg7BtdIsSm491qEHX0gGm_1H-YcxAZxDLImvbGyMjgbMWtaNMXk4wt1nmsgMKWN6OQ%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
