I am not happy with the state of this country, and I won't let it stand. We've got a lot of work to do. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. That's exactly what I'm doing. I am standing up against the woke mob's radical indoctrination of your children, Biden's disastrous economic policies that are crippling average Americans, and the invasion of our border that has allowed Mexican drug cartels to murder American children and adults. | | It's time to get this country to start working again--not just for the well-connected in Washington DC, but for working families, children under attack, veterans, and seniors. I use every ounce of my executive power to serve the people I represent, and when I am President, that will be ALL Americans. We will restore a sense of normalcy to our American communities and ensure that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue in this country. There's a lot out there that needs to be fixed. Peter--we will get it done. No excuses. I am running a fully transparent campaign--meaning you're involved at every step, I keep you informed on where your every dollar goes, and I treat you like the member of my team that you are, NOT my personal piggy bank--and I want you to be a part of it. If you're ready to join me in fighting for freedom, I am humbly asking you to donate any amount you can afford to help out. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We will get it done, Peter. I promise you that, and I have the track record to back it up. Yours in Freedom, | Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%% %%unsubcenter_url%%

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Tell Sen. Tuberville: Don’t put politics above national security
body:
It’s Chrissy. You know me – I try to see the best in everyone and work hard to lower the temperature of our politics.
| | |
---
Derek, it’s Chrissy. You know me – I try to see the best in everyone and work hard to lower the temperature of our politics.
That’s been really hard lately as I’ve watched my colleague Senator Tommy Tuberville single-handedly hold up the promotions in our military because he’s mad at President Biden.
Why is he mad? Because after SCOTUS overturned _Roe_ , President Biden announced the military would provide leave and pay for the travel costs for any woman in uniform needing reproductive care not available in the state where the military stationed her. Sen. Tuberville says he is stopping promotions until this policy is reversed.
_[**Can you sign your name and tell Sen. Tuberville to stop putting politics ahead of national security?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66788113/417593294/-629832227?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk855-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMWU5NC00NDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gjtRsyIn1SFG-wwkt1vzjT4LIXV_gnN4zUUWEOwJER4=&emci=4f266f64-2727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=646d1e94-4427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=21278485)_
With over 250 promotions stalled and critical positions going vacant – including the Marine Corps’ highest-ranking officer who is also a member of the Joint Chiefs of Staff – Sen. Tuberville is putting our national security at risk. Military leaders are already reporting an impact on retention and recruitment for our all-volunteer military.
My colleagues and I have tried to talk to him, but he won’t budge on this. And so, I’m coming to supporters like you.
**[_Please, can you sign your name and tell Sen. Tuberville to stop putting politics ahead of national security? With new threats every day, we can't afford to keep our best from performing the work they need to do._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66788114/417593295/-629832227?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk855-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMWU5NC00NDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gjtRsyIn1SFG-wwkt1vzjT4LIXV_gnN4zUUWEOwJER4=&emci=4f266f64-2727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=646d1e94-4427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=21278485)**
It’s critical to our security that we stop this holdup as soon as possible, so I’m counting on your urgent feedback.
There’s work to be done,
Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66788115/417593296/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMWU5NC00NDI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gjtRsyIn1SFG-wwkt1vzjT4LIXV_gnN4zUUWEOwJER4=&emci=4f266f64-2727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=646d1e94-4427-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=21278485). If you'd like to receive fewer emails like this one, or if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=fXF9ZFEld4RMmcZHl9MmG17pQmZxPTB2krO%2FSoopPd3nRm2rP5ydLnIKlGT%2FilpUprqqWFASD78AGbJpDK0Jj3OokLZR8IWsLgA%2FF9Mc0JOCIxIvNK%2B%2BtYz6VDNHn7ak7qou1Hf6iul8vfzbiNZ%2F62v%2B%2BiMoBJEiKr2ny5VVsUx9jgL9r4cPi7IpBZtrg1WS4RcLEzT3cLUVDN0CndNxNcGW5ZahK77R5aqCzk5x0M9nupIya4BiJNFnZNEyIuTHlj6xmTEDOqY%2B2L0UOwRY8jSgZkrZQMgq58clIEXtdykndtQ7HHMcP7IC3Rwfa6Lp5W6gONqoBO%2Bz0WaJ%2BcmJ1Oqq2N9u05V8ShE%2BA9vLgv0mfC10h9PChWgcUbj%2FDOkf4tJJFmc9rZ%2BvDJ8qOGEMv2%2Bwl0v4Jn%2BKKAzLxsXdjH%2FLqqoK%2BbK1GeKDlLWxZLQh) Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. subject: Did you know this?

body:
| This is a number we’re proud of.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=635%2E35263%2EIHlP7r)
Peter — Did you know that our work to reelect Tammy is powered by grassroots donors pitching in what they can, when they can, to emails just like this one? **In fact, our average online donation last month was just $21.** That’s a number we’re really proud to show off, Peter. It sends a powerful message about our campaign — that it’s powered by grassroots supporters (like you!), not millionaire megadonors. But here’s the rub: Mitch McConnell is looking to recruit right-wing Senate candidates who could rake in a much higher average donation, including right here in Wisconsin. In fact, not one, but TWO of Tammy’s potential opponents could write their campaigns massive checks _(to the tune of tens of millions of dollars!)_ to tilt the scales in their favor. They might have a major fundraising advantage, but together, we know this team has what it takes to fight back and keep Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue — $21 at a time. **[It’s going to take a lot of folks pitching in what they can when they can to compete with our potential opponents’ massive campaign war chests. Fellow Patriot, Unfortunately, this week we all witnessed the Biden DOJ continue its Soviet-style assault on equal justice.Yesterday, Former President Trump--President Biden's main political rival--announced that he received a letter from special counsel Jack Smith, informing him that he is the target of a Grand Jury investigation regarding January 6th. This will likely result in more unprecedented charges being filed against the Former President Trump.Please find AFL's full response to this disturbing, yet predictable, development here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-responds-to-the-dojs-january-6-grand-jury-investigation-targeting-president-trump/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AVUAAB9P8cIAAAAPFFQAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkuajdN-VyGTI5RYehvdvjeDgpKgAXqZI/2/iSiYjcWvuDk8-0clMfMaLA/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLXJlc3BvbmRzLXRvLXRoZS1kb2pzLWphbnVhcnktNi1ncmFuZC1qdXJ5LWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24tdGFyZ2V0aW5nLXByZXNpZGVudC10cnVtcC8) AFL is the tip of the spear in the fight against this out-of-control Department of Injustice, filing numerous lawsuits and FOIA requests to expose the corrupt schemes within the department.Yesterday, AFL filed a lawsuit against Attorney General Merrick Garland and the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for their failure to enforce federal law with regard to Hunter Biden. Imagine that....the chief law enforcement entity in the United States (which I worked and battled within when I was in the Trump Administration) is not enforcing the law!More here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-sues-attorney-general-merrick-garland-and-the-biden-department-of-justice-for-failing-to-require-hunter-biden-to-register-as-a-foreign-agent-while-joe-biden-was-vice-president/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AVUAAB9P8cIAAAAPFFQAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkuajdN-) As the cases against the Biden Administration continue to pile up, AFL is in need of continued support from generous patriots like you, so that we can take even more impactful action against the Radical Left's agenda to destroy our nation. Please [**_help keep us in this fight with another gift_**](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AVUAAB9P8cIAAAAPFFQAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBkuajdN-VyGTI5RYehvdvjeDgpKgAXqZI/4/pSA2UHTFyEl9b7JluHGZ5w/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vcl8yMDIzMDcyMCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXdlZWtseS1kb25vciZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBH)**** to power our legal work through the end of the summer.

This will likely result in more unprecedented charges being filed against the Former President Trump.Please find AFL's full response to this disturbing, yet predictable, development here: AFL is the tip of the spear in the fight against this out-of-control Department of Injustice, filing numerous lawsuits and FOIA requests to expose the corrupt schemes within the department.Yesterday, AFL filed a lawsuit against Attorney General Merrick Garland and the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for their failure to enforce federal law with regard to Hunter Biden. Imagine that....the chief law enforcement entity in the United States (which I worked and battled within when I was in the Trump Administration) is not enforcing the law!More here: As the cases against the Biden Administration continue to pile up, AFL is in need of continued support from generous patriots like you, so that we can take even more impactful action against the Radical Left's agenda to destroy our nation. Please **** to power our legal work through the end of the summer. Blessings, Mary Thomas | America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. subject: Tell the Senate: Don’t make flying less safe!

Senator Tammy Duckworth called out Sinema for weakening airline safety | | | Peter – Senator Kyrsten Sinema is teaming up with Republicans and big money donors to water down airline pilot safety rules―and **the American people could pay the price.** **We made this video to explain the issue. Please watch and share:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zaYbZ2Jl-UIUEfTwkdstrnZzq-YolnFug703Qj7z-3y4-XltTOslTEtbCi1Oj1Nzx61f9_-NH27TtR5AVRUi582zgHc1AfQUtQsH6anSASTBmOB7It951t1hzYWysppDoKBxF7j7D4BDZjchTZzNfVCCgBk3Au7-7GAgT6cn_ZrrZzv1Pvikf9MG9HeGMw845xXiUJvzbeMcPcKiaYVJThiGUoYWaWJMHeQ65YHojUq-eMvY1-XARVIyVMTHRQvyXGePCa67vFuQagsTo79m7iXbTmb49Ajo_ty0IixeD-Bt67YKWnR8LvzPdGcBXQ1kPDVSQD_SDAW9R-3QyeB2_l/3y1/PPMQX_gxRgGBRXx2uBgnOw/h0/PaJ5C-NXRdrguam0--LyaWsQCdeD5BLanB2A0A7vi38)Unsurprisingly, Sinema has received**OVER $750,000** in contributions from the airline industry, including more than $54,000 in 2022 alone**. body:
and more conspiracy theories are coming true1 No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-aaojy-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **It's been quite the week! Check out these recent posts shared by CaucusRoom members.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-j/) **China tells John Kerry to take a hike** [After traveling to China to address the "climate crisis" the Chinese have told John Kerry to take a hike.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-t/) That's gotta sting. **Mandatory attendance** [Activists in Canada are urging the Toronto School Board to make drag queen story hour mandatory.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-i/) These people are unwell. **Attention seeking** [Lia Thomas, having not caused enough controversy by competing in college swimming events against biological women, has decided to become a model for Antifa swag.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-d/) Super. **Another conspiracy theory confirmed** [A recent report has shown that COVID deals have been over-reported by nearly 30%.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-h/) I wonder why they inflated the numbers so much...

**Defunding gain-of-function research** [It only took the government 3 years to finally deny funding to the Wuhan Institute of Virology.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-k/) What I don't understand is why this didn't happen in, say, April 2020... **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* [A possible upside to AI drones?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-o/)

* [You've heard of Brexit... well...](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-m/)
* [If you have to say "I identify as"...](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aaojy-trhiujldw-c/)

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

subject: Sen. Tuberville is RIGHT

body:
96 Peter, it’s Senator Mike Lee.

I’m reaching out today on
behalf of Senator Tuberville.

If you didn’t know, the Department of
Defense has been going behind our back to finance servicewomen’s paid
leave for their ‘abortion tourism’ travel expenses using American
taxpayers’ dollars...yes, you heard me right.

They’ve crafted a scheme
to circumvent the Hyde Amendment and BREAK THE LAW that disallows
federal funds to be used for abortion. Due to this, Senator Tuberville
has firmly stood his ground against the Biden Administration’s illegal
activity by refusing to confirm high-ranking officer nominations in the
Senate.

I stand with Senator Tuberville and the millions of fellow
Americans who are ready and willing to hold the line for life – it’s my
hope you are one of them, Peter.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Jason Aldean
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/jason-aldean?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| Like his music or not, Jason Alden is right. The crime, rot and blight in bigger cities is seeping into rural America.
This is particularly pertinent to us considering our geographical proximity to blue-city, blue-policy Memphis.
Like many of you, my wife and I have a 4 year old daughter we’re raising here. Unlike my opponent, who just moved here in November to run for office, this is our home.
We are fully invested in DeSoto County, and for the right reasons.
I truly believe August 8th is our opportunity to protect the county we choose to live, work, worship and have a business. It’s why I decided to offer myself as your next District Attorney - because I want DeSoto County to be a place our daughter can raise her family.
This is our chance to STOP MEMPHIS and SAVE DESOTO COUNTY. I would be truly honored and grateful if you will stand with me and vote Barton on August 8.
I won’t let you down. Stop Memphis. Save Desoto.
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=9bb8238e4c&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=40c6cb980d&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.

clean_body: | | | | | | Like his music or not, Jason Alden is right. The crime, rot and blight in bigger cities is seeping into rural America. This is particularly pertinent to us considering our geographical proximity to blue-city, blue-policy Memphis. Like many of you, my wife and I have a 4 year old daughter we’re raising here. Unlike my opponent, who just moved here in November to run for office, this is our home. We are fully invested in DeSoto County, and for the right reasons. I truly believe August 8th is our opportunity to protect the county we choose to live, work, worship and have a business. It’s why I decided to offer myself as your next District Attorney - because I want DeSoto County to be a place our daughter can raise her family. This is our chance to STOP MEMPHIS and SAVE DESOTO COUNTY. I would be truly honored and grateful if you will stand with me and vote Barton on August 8. I won’t let you down. Stop Memphis. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Powering our fight for climate action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The climate crisis is not a future problem that we’ll have to face decades from now. It’s here right now.
#
Peter,
The climate crisis is not a future problem that we'll have to face decades from now. **It's here right now.**
**Our most vulnerable communities do not have the infrastructure or support to mitigate the very real effects of climate change. And every day that we waste debating whether climate change is a real issue, millions of lives continue to be put at risk.**
We must take bold, immediate action to save our planet and our future, Peter. [**If you believe that we must use every tool at our disposal from a local and state, to federal level to address the climate crisis and protect our planet, please chip in today to power our movement.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42744?refcode=em20230720-2721&t=1&akid=2721%2E420207%2E3dg8kT)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42744?refcode=em20230720-2721&t=20&akid=2721%2E420207%2E3dg8kT)**
Just last quarter, the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) released the latest report on climate change, and the truth is in the data. If we don't act with urgency, we will continue to experience unprecedented warming, extreme weather, and ecological devastation.
**Let's be clear:** just because the climate crisis is here, doesn't mean that we give up. _In fact, it means the opposite._
We did not arrive at this point by accident. Big oil, coal, and gas companies continue to lobby for billions of dollars in subsidies, consolidated near-monopolies, deregulation, and further power and influence in our elections. **Which poses the very real threat: if we continue to elect and support career politicians with broken values, we'll forever be stuck in this gridlock.**
Peter, now more than ever, we need to come together and use our collective voice to demand climate action and ensure that future generations are not subject to our messes. [**If you stand with me, please chip in $3 or any amount you can spare to boost our momentum and power this fight.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42744?refcode=em20230720-2721&t=21&akid=2721%2E420207%2E3dg8kT)
Let's do this,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230720-2721-footer&t=22&refcode2=2721_420207_3dg8kT&akid=2721%2E420207%2E3dg8kT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2721%2E420207%2E3dg8kT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2721%2E420207%2E3dg8kT)

**Did you see the latest news out of Virginia and Kentucky? **
The GOP is leading an all-out effort to take control of this critical battleground and advance their extreme agenda in the make-or-break races to come. They’re already using every trick in the book to tip elections in their favor, relying on unfair redistricting tactics and tripling down on suppressing the vote. And in Kentucky, only two months ago, the Supreme Court ruled in favor of abortion bans.
**More anti-choice Republicans will be on the ballot this November and next.** And with MAGA Republicans already whipping up the base, anti-abortion, anti-science, and anti-democracy extremists are aiming to flip blue states fully red! We won’t let that happen.
**The good news is that almost FOUR DOZEN Emerge women are running in the Virginia elections and nearly TWO DOZEN are up in Kentucky! We’re counting on them to fight back, flip the state Senate, and block the attacks on our essential rights. But we need you with us to have their backs all the way to Election Day and set the pace for Democrats in 2024.**
**[Will you give $5 or more to Emerge now – before our deadline at midnight – to empower bold Democratic women to flip seats blue and defeat the far right in the South and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66789356/417597274/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1258-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2MDQ5OTc3LTQ5MjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4ZjHkulDRJGS8RQbxeSlvQk61DfSBKESc8TQ5u4tlI8=)**
We can’t sit this one out, Peter. **Virginia remains the ONLY state in the South without a dangerous abortion ban, and that status must be protected. What’s more, Democrats everywhere are looking to elections in the South as a sign of what’s to come in 2024.** **That means the stakes of the elections this year couldn’t be higher! **
At Emerge, we know that winning real representation means being strategic and investing in leaders who respect our rights and our democratic norms. Emerge women are the answer.
**Last year, when polls and pundits told Democrats to expect defeat, Emerge women played a major role in stopping a red wave, building new Democratic trifectas, and flipping critical seats blue. We can keep this momentum going, but we urgently need your help to hit our midnight goal. **
**[Please: Donate $5 or more now – as much as you can before midnight – to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run for office and win in every state.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66789357/417597275/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1258-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2MDQ5OTc3LTQ5MjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4ZjHkulDRJGS8RQbxeSlvQk61DfSBKESc8TQ5u4tlI8=)**

name: Team Wexton
subject: Republicans are brazenly defying the courts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
They’re desperate to preserve a racial gerrymander.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789358/417597278/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q5OWE3ZC00OTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZQlI4CmyKi4TPtrF046k5W2kSmAgjg5Qmsch16eMU8=)
---
Friend,

You might recall that last month, the Supreme Court invalidated Alabama’s congressional map. They found that the district lines were deliberately drawn to minimize the voices of its Black residents, and ordered the state to redraw its districts and create a new majority-Black seat.

**Alabama state legislators are now openly defying the court.** They just submitted a new congressional map, but one that clearly falls short of adding an additional majority-Black district. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789359/417597279/822412159?ms=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_P1&refcode=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q5OWE3ZC00OTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZQlI4CmyKi4TPtrF046k5W2kSmAgjg5Qmsch16eMU8=&emci=89223774-3727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=63d99a7d-4927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=32654120) We hope that the judicial system will quickly strike this new map down. But it’s clear that Republicans feel empowered right now to test the limits of how far they can suppress minority voices through gerrymandering — in no small part because the courts have _for years_ weakened the Voting Rights Act and removed the guardrails against unfair district lines.

**It’s time for Congress to reassert its power. It needs to legislatively strengthen the Voting Rights Act and pass clear rules against racial gerrymandering.**

[**Please join Jennifer today and add your name to tell Congress to act →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789360/417597280/822412159?ms=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q5OWE3ZC00OTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZQlI4CmyKi4TPtrF046k5W2kSmAgjg5Qmsch16eMU8=&emci=89223774-3727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=63d99a7d-4927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789361/417597281/822412159?ms=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q5OWE3ZC00OTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZQlI4CmyKi4TPtrF046k5W2kSmAgjg5Qmsch16eMU8=&emci=89223774-3727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=63d99a7d-4927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=32654120) We cannot count on Republican-dominated courts to consistently uphold voting rights laws.

Republican legislators are counting on the current system to stay the way it is. It allows them to push their voter suppression tactics to the very brink. **And that is a very dangerous place for our country to be.**

Jennifer is committed to preserving our democracy – and that starts with restoring the Voting Rights Act to its fullest power at the legislative level. [**Please sign on to help amplify her call to action →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789362/417597282/822412159?ms=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q5OWE3ZC00OTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZQlI4CmyKi4TPtrF046k5W2kSmAgjg5Qmsch16eMU8=&emci=89223774-3727-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=63d99a7d-4927-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Team Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789363/417597283/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230720VRA_N_TW_FULL_7_G_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Q5OWE3ZC00OTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZQlI4CmyKi4TPtrF046k5W2kSmAgjg5Qmsch16eMU8=)****
---

Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/fiVGoHflEE-FgL2jy2tvRQ2?unsubscribedata=%2FF2wFTKeF7qCsQBvrkHOa0H1pD9U3govvbFNlyYsBJr0%2FfiMoc4kx95AXbYwhYWGgtaTVa%2FV4wiyC1td1%2FZqwdHU%2BHb%2BNt9GK9jyLbINtjcM%2BkirT%2FNnERvTXJiEbPvvgRXr%2B80NwgMVrOqQEO0DmAoG7OadL7AJxiqHV4ZhuPD2SnTeMVbI2pAvF5UDByGMKpmCTAaG7Xayd7jp4XVzaYSDGVwEFHophjjdVTNYAV%2FZOu6jRhrvL9INob3qNdaOEJJmLFcQBisnheZ2%2FOmLLzfUAIFmQNwrxIuhnJUCML%2BF9k82UTLNYfkX%2Fpi%2BwktH69bJCF9rp5ZJVWtHt3DZOjGIO28NFTY14Z8jlmVgZsA4i0DohrikxOTuND8wvQZF3zvNX%2BeFwN9kkzy%2FcuYygBsPFLc5hUo4n4MkF6SGG39MbPbc6PBscpB0yxNa3lmi).

name: Brad, Campaign Manager
subject: Hi Derek, I’m Brad — Adam’s campaign manager
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Everything Adam has accomplished during his tenure in office — the bills he’s passed, the funding he’s secured, the fight for our democracy that he continues to lead — has a profound personal impact on my family.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3034%2E5257348%2ECFfCyL)
Hi Derek, nice to meet you!
I’m Brad, Adam Schiff’s campaign manager — the person responsible for empowering every member of our team in their work to elect Adam to the Senate!
Working for Adam is a dream come true (and I’m not just saying that because he’s my boss and is _definitely_ reading).
Adam has been making real progress for his district, our state, and our country for years. _I know it because he’s my hometown Congressman._ My parents are still his constituents. So everything Adam has accomplished during his tenure in office — the bills he’s passed, the funding he’s secured, the fight for our democracy that he continues to lead — has a profound personal impact on my family.
Not only that: He’s an unbelievably kind, decent man committed to making a difference in people’s lives. No issue is too small; no task is beneath him. If you saw the guiding principles our campaign is based on in an email we sent last week, you’ll understand the operation we’re running.
**I’m proud to be a part of Team Schiff — and as campaign manager, I have the critical task of making sure we meet our budget every single quarter, month, and day.**
I’ll admit it, some days I’m really stressed about our fundraising. Sometimes (okay, I’ll be honest: frequently), I ping our finance team multiple times to check in (sorry!).
But Adam always reminds me that this grassroots team will always pull through when we need them to.
When Adam was removed from the House Intelligence Committee, this team stuck by his side. When MAGA Republicans in the House censured him, you all rallied around Adam. And when we were coming up a bit short on a fundraising goal, you chipped in what you could to help us catch up.
**[Derek, your support of this team means the world to me — and I hope you’ll chip in today, not just to make my life easier, but to show that you believe in Adam and this team’s work: can you donate today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230720_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=37&akid=3034%2E5257348%2ECFfCyL)**

Thank you so much. I’ll keep you looped in on what our campaign is working on from time to time. After all, you’re an essential part of Adam’s grassroots team — and you deserve to hear the inside scoop from us on what’s going on.
Talk soon!
— Brad
_Campaign Manager
Adam Schiff for Senate_

Working for Adam is a dream come true (and I’m not just saying that because he’s my boss and is definitely reading). Adam has been making real progress for his district, our state, and our country for years. I know it because he’s my hometown Congressman. My parents are still his constituents. So everything Adam has accomplished during his tenure in office — the bills he’s passed, the funding he’s secured, the fight for our democracy that he continues to lead — has a profound personal impact on my family. Not only that: He’s an unbelievably kind, decent man committed to making a difference in people’s lives. No issue is too small; no task is beneath him. If you saw the guiding principles our campaign is based on in an email we sent last week, you’ll understand the operation we’re running. I’m proud to be a part of Team Schiff — and as campaign manager, I have the critical task of making sure we meet our budget every single quarter, month, and day. I’ll admit it, some days I’m really stressed about our fundraising. Sometimes (okay, I’ll be honest: frequently), I ping our finance team multiple times to check in (sorry!). But Adam always reminds me that this grassroots team will always pull through when we need them to. When Adam was removed from the House Intelligence Committee, this team stuck by his side. When MAGA Republicans in the House censured him, you all rallied around Adam. And when we were coming up a bit short on a fundraising goal, you chipped in what you could to help us catch up. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you so much. I’ll keep you looped in on what our campaign is working on from time to time. After all, you’re an essential part of Adam’s grassroots team — and you deserve to hear the inside scoop from us on what’s going on. Talk soon! — Brad Campaign Manager Adam Schiff for Senate | | 135 E. name: Mark Mullet
subject: a place where everyone feels safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Washington should be a place where everyone feels safe and people want to raise their families. That’s why we need new leadership and fresh perspectives when it comes to public safety.

My top priority as governor will be to work with our cities and counties to ensure the safety of all Washingtonians.

[Do you believe that public safety should be a top priority for our next governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789597/417598755/-241193925?source=MM_EM_FR_WL_230720_1_1&refcode2=28aa23e5-4a27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&contactdata=CqZsBxahM99OQZyI+pwZ4o2IlS10Cs1c4gPsrvaF6qyWjcR/pkDP3V6ZVd9S0HsK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFhMjNlNS00YTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6msaacPP4K6qnZfBf3mgsCEP8aJd1HYtUMjfy-96ug=&emci=42242979-4627-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=28aa23e5-4a27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626167)

I’m proud of my track record of supporting gun responsibility measures in the State Senate, from enhanced background checks, ten-day waiting periods, and an assault weapons ban. I’ve worked closely with first responders to make sure they have the tools they need to keep communities safe.

Yet, the annual _Crime in Washington_ report released this month showed that while crime has decreased in other parts of the country, it has continued to rise here in Washington.

I promise to prioritize safe streets and neighborhoods to ensure that our state leads the way in public safety and protecting our families, including ensuring our first responders have the tools necessary to safely serve our communities.

[I want to hear from you. Do you agree that making Washington safe for families should be a top priority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789600/417598758/-241193925?source=MM_EM_FR_WL_230720_1_1&refcode2=28aa23e5-4a27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&contactdata=CqZsBxahM99OQZyI+pwZ4o2IlS10Cs1c4gPsrvaF6qyWjcR/pkDP3V6ZVd9S0HsK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFhMjNlNS00YTI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6msaacPP4K6qnZfBf3mgsCEP8aJd1HYtUMjfy-96ug=&emci=42242979-4627-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=28aa23e5-4a27-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626167)

clean_body: | | Washington should be a place where everyone feels safe and people want to raise their families. That’s why we need new leadership and fresh perspectives when it comes to public safety. My top priority as governor will be to work with our cities and counties to ensure the safety of all Washingtonians. | | ** | I’m proud of my track record of supporting gun responsibility measures in the State Senate, from enhanced background checks, ten-day waiting periods, and an assault weapons ban. I’ve worked closely with first responders to make sure they have the tools they need to keep communities safe. Yet, the annual Crime in Washington report released this month showed that while crime has decreased in other parts of the country, it has continued to rise here in Washington. I promise to prioritize safe streets and neighborhoods to ensure that our state leads the way in public safety and protecting our families, including ensuring our first responders have the tools necessary to safely serve our communities. | | Thank you for sharing your thoughts with me, Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Mullet for Governor (D) PO Box 2072 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Team HER Time
subject: This Barbie is fighting for women’s rights

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789838/417599430/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230720_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjhmNmE3OTUtNGIyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_pb6v6m6GRsu9r4B_AwNsTZs9s1mzvBYzdvDx1lrYw=)
---
Are you planning on seeing Barbie this weekend, Peter? Beyond all the pink and the cute outfits, there’s actually a lot to be learned from the plastic doll. Barbie has had pretty much every job known to man — **including President!** That’s a message we can all get behind. Whether in doll form or not, every little girl should be told that they have what it takes to run for office, and win. That there’s not a room in which they don’t belong. _After all, anything Ken can do Barbie can do better. _ At HER Time, we work hard every day to support women running for office. But so many other women don’t feel qualified to run, they don’t see politics as the job for them. So let’s take a lesson from Barbie now and always: [_**Women can be anything they put their minds to, including elected officials. Will you chip in $3 today to support the women who know they ARE qualified to do everything the men already do, and do it better?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789839/417599431/-605873117?amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230720_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjhmNmE3OTUtNGIyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_pb6v6m6GRsu9r4B_AwNsTZs9s1mzvBYzdvDx1lrYw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66789840/417599434/-605873117?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230720_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjhmNmE3OTUtNGIyNy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_pb6v6m6GRsu9r4B_AwNsTZs9s1mzvBYzdvDx1lrYw=)

subject: Heat waves grip 3 continents

body:
We need to start phasing out fossil fuels and end the political stronghold Big Oil companies have on our elected leaders to ensure the climate crisis doesn’t become an irreversible climate catastrophe.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66789894/417599593/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230720-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTIxN2I3LTRiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oe1Gt2x6x_oCyiojuuhQ7n4yI8ThpI1s-Q9U92W5mDE=)
---
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66789895/417599594/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230720-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTIxN2I3LTRiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oe1Gt2x6x_oCyiojuuhQ7n4yI8ThpI1s-Q9U92W5mDE=)
---
Heat waves are gripping communities across North America, Europe, and Asia, with millions of people suffering as a direct result of decades of burning fossil fuels.

The blistering heat is causing long-lasting harm to people, infrastructure, and natural resources. While some politicians deny the threat of climate change, and many others treat it as just another source of talking points, the solutions we need continue to be delayed and ignored. Even many democrats are unwilling to admit this simple truth: **the root cause of these unprecedented conditions is clear:**_**the continued burning of planet-warming fossil fuels.**_

We need to start phasing out fossil fuels and end the political stronghold Big Oil companies have on our elected leaders to ensure the climate crisis doesn’t become an irreversible climate catastrophe. **_But we cannot do this without your support – it takes all of us to power the climate movement._**

[**_Will you contribute $10 today to show your support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and help us defeat Big Oil?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66789896/417599595/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230720-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTIxN2I3LTRiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oe1Gt2x6x_oCyiojuuhQ7n4yI8ThpI1s-Q9U92W5mDE=)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66789897/417599596/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230720-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTIxN2I3LTRiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oe1Gt2x6x_oCyiojuuhQ7n4yI8ThpI1s-Q9U92W5mDE=)
---
The climate crisis is not just an issue for today, we are fighting to protect the planet for generations to come. And with you on our side, we believe we can end the reign of the fossil fuel industry.

[**_Will you contribute $10 today to join our movement to protect our planet and fight back against climate change?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66789898/417599597/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230720-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTIxN2I3LTRiMjctZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oe1Gt2x6x_oCyiojuuhQ7n4yI8ThpI1s-Q9U92W5mDE=)

clean_body: We need to start phasing out fossil fuels and end the political stronghold Big Oil companies have on our elected leaders to ensure the climate crisis doesn’t become an irreversible climate catastrophe. | = | = Heat waves are gripping communities across North America, Europe, and Asia, with millions of people suffering as a direct result of decades of burning fossil fuels. The blistering heat is causing long-lasting harm to people, infrastructure, and natural resources. While some politicians deny the threat of climate change, and many others treat it as just another source of talking points, the solutions we need continue to be delayed and ignored. Even many democrats are unwilling to admit this simple truth: the root cause of these unprecedented conditions is clear:the continued burning of planet-warming fossil fuels. We need to start phasing out fossil fuels and end the political stronghold Big Oil companies have on our elected leaders to ensure the climate crisis doesn’t become an irreversible climate catastrophe. But we cannot do this without your support – it takes all of us to power the climate movement. = | | | = The climate crisis is not just an issue for today, we are fighting to protect the planet for generations to come. And with you on our side, we believe we can end the reign of the fossil fuel industry. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight to protect our planet together, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAmC9ugvnPQytAzqeJPqb03ti-cn1ZsFeFVz6fityVRyO46Gt1WhULsHAh2Lgi_RuFzfx1XpGAnF2E-TpuPuH4rOksxoBINH85x-iCHSbte39wrc1So_ec_hfkJVXMki44qtJko2MKmuoGFrEHZUH7NxvaX67GBIWQYlHji4dcO0STLppytX_2xnMZ-tnZvcLr96V9Spxn3y1ti3IKd01R93LJmu-AHiQ5ALySQG-NJ5JK6ANyOqpMtaI3l9yxHx-hoXwT6ggzO-60UxKpM_OWwlqvSMl4nLUhxkf-pUQPXpcn9F8B5dezar-JwYTBRodGvB7Cn9i5F5F2Lg0fVsHWMZ6OnqtxB3__w0QQg2a3SXxWRPFwIIRaukt7YAsnTYd5myj24pFhpSkjMGA5b58fwA/3y1/ZX3jzbs6RtqesQZFUwkd-w/h1/GZdcOt11Ob-oOwYNuewhYNAql6kbw3pAHTHBqSoF1kM) We sure do...

Josh Hawley has always said one thing and done the other. From putting the results of a free and fair election into question to _fleeing_ from the very same insurrection he inspired and supported.

[It’s time to send Josh Hawley back to his coop. body:

**A new poll shows that in the past two years, Democrats are far more likely than Republicans to have donated to a political campaign.**

name: Jason Crow
subject: This fight is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, today marks eleven years since the 2012 Aurora theater shooting.

Colorado is home to some of the most devastating mass shootings in recent history. Each one leaves a scar on our community.

Aurora.
STEM School.
Columbine.
Colorado Springs.
Boulder.

And yet, not enough has changed. There isn’t a week when I don’t hear from kids, parents, and teachers, advocating for serious action.

As a dad, this fight is personal. I’ve made stopping gun violence a part of my campaign because I’m not willing to sit back and let this become the new normal.

No matter what the NRA and gun lobbyists say, there are commonsense steps we can take to protect our communities from gun violence.

Colorado has led the way on important gun safety reform, including raising the buying age for guns to 21, getting guns out of the hands of domestic abusers, and strengthening the state’s background check system.

There’s still much more work to be done — like getting military-grade weapons off our streets. As your representative, I promise to continue doing everything in my power to fight for safer communities.

Everytown for Gun Safety is leading the fight to end gun violence, one law at a time. Make a charitable donation now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-charity-mda]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-charity-mda]

In solidarity,

— Jason
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

[https://secure.ngpvan.com/5AdTmae3UU6fPeitwGd55w2] We believe that emails are an important way for Jason Crow for Congress to stay in contact with supporters like you. We appreciate any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. You can contact us here [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com?subject=Feedback] with any questions, concerns, or ideas. To receive text updates from Team Crow, join us here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bjvZx6_NWU2fx5btnSgikw2] .

body:
| Hi team,

Dan asked me to reach out. We are only around 150 members away from hitting our first deadline of the brand new fundraising quarter.

I am a proud member of Team Kildee, because while so much of politics is dominated by grandstanding, spreading disinformation, and special interests, Dan is in Congress to lower the temperature in politics and is focused on getting stuff done for the families of mid-Michigan. He’ll work with anyone, regardless of their party, to pass legislation that actually helps working families.

Now, I need you to help our campaign prepare for the challenges on the road to 2024, because the road to retaking the House majority starts and ends right here in MI-08.

**[The best thing you can do is join Team Kildee today as a digital member, so we can build the resources we’ll need to win come Election Day. clean_body: | Hi team, Dan asked me to reach out. We are only around 150 members away from hitting our first deadline of the brand new fundraising quarter. I am a proud member of Team Kildee, because while so much of politics is dominated by grandstanding, spreading disinformation, and special interests, Dan is in Congress to lower the temperature in politics and is focused on getting stuff done for the families of mid-Michigan. He’ll work with anyone, regardless of their party, to pass legislation that actually helps working families. Now, I need you to help our campaign prepare for the challenges on the road to 2024, because the road to retaking the House majority starts and ends right here in MI-08. = = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Best, Isa Finance Director, Friends of Dan Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. name: Team Engel
subject: The numbers on Kirsten's opponent are in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
At the end of June, every federal campaign in the country had to report their fundraising numbers to the FEC.
For the first time since we launched this campaign, we can see how Kirsten's opponent is raising.
Here's the good news: we brought in hundreds of more individual donations than our opponent. We're a people-powered campaign, and to already see such incredible grassroots support turning out for Kirsten is really exciting.
Here's the bad news: Ciscomani's campaign outraised us — by a lot.
While Kirsten is refusing to take donations from corporate PACs, her opponent is pocketing big checks from fossil fuel giants, Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and Kevin McCarthy.
Look, we don't have special interests flooding our campaign because we have something better: you!
Our campaign is by the people, for the people. Kirsten will always put her constituents' interests before anything else — but first, we need your help to get her elected. Can you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072023_CiscomaniEOQ_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072023_CiscomaniEOQ_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072023_CiscomaniEOQ_act]
Thank you so much!
— Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072023_CiscomaniEOQ_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072023_CiscomaniEOQ_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_072023_CiscomaniEOQ_act]

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a41e14a842804717bb5771b385dd4fe0&_e=GSFqsdTn3AWEOprbmvQ-9nYTZr4mDZ5BVNJC7SEYR9GSX8yB3TM_c01m7S6TV6ypoIWIR0aYBfNsd-skfL1NNL0q-QZSAMS3RrLANbLot4Wuel3W3ohmY6zvJurL-DdM9EHb6Eo1clY-ZqfsPyb35FHGE57AmRpv69J8HsAQJ3qUgJ0TztRbi-6_I96YYDSAECyruLk2AVFSsYS1esIewLMK9tDhS5wfKpKLzZDTwA1_ywDcBFd9-pBCjf2FWYM1Cu7BZG1-0JiTl5mZg4MFpA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a41e14a842804717bb5771b385dd4fe0&_e=GSFqsdTn3AWEOprbmvQ-9nYTZr4mDZ5BVNJC7SEYR9GSX8yB3TM_c01m7S6TV6ypoIWIR0aYBfNsd-skfL1NNL0q-QZSAMS3RrLANbLot4Wuel3W3ohmY6zvJurL-DdMNzD_0Y4cFg1c5iecnFopZiGgiwPtKPNGwizV5aa_p7QvTukd8sZQH35E0_5fh7cL5npmC9txD7Qta09G7eRPB38wnCrm0mYlcAZFdd5nVFTJGrUa3uuHDmQFfY_WBivos1EvK0-WG72N6dFXDq117w%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a41e14a842804717bb5771b385dd4fe0&_e=GSFqsdTn3AWEOprbmvQ-9nYTZr4mDZ5BVNJC7SEYR9GSX8yB3TM_c01m7S6TV6ypoIWIR0aYBfNsd-skfL1NNL0q-QZSAMS3RrLANbLot4Wuel3W3ohmY6zvJurL-DdMNckvd3s939oIDt_dwFRQldDfPEF4_JObGT4U7MRg1wSFCXvyhrRrWdYU64_QlhF69zUy_F2u_z068cRvGrFGOIQ2E3mEZKnzxXCugAmlPbq6h8CP9aDRJ3zdF3MctlzeCKKhESUYX3LYoKhCeJq0LA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a41e14a842804717bb5771b385dd4fe0&_e=GSFqsdTn3AWEOprbmvQ-9nYTZr4mDZ5BVNJC7SEYR9GSX8yB3TM_c01m7S6TV6ypoIWIR0aYBfNsd-skfL1NNL0q-QZSAMS3RrLANbLot4Wuel3W3ohmY6zvJurL-DdMwo2wY1PBh6lKO8M0ej7b61D3C3FvvFR48h8uuFjOLgu0roqwKVB4Dsk9n1GGCD55I7UzM-TQrqh6WtL6tJAkZfz1aQWEqO8CXSd-9IfM-URhHU7zCeWofCKnIXFzVZdyL9OcSgYr0u0Ib0ayN0i9lg%3D%3D)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5051045ed4045e6ba769c9e7e3ae938&_e=i864Q-eZIkWm4Me6lYnogBoGdhEgH0EoMTQBQP0fZMwZtd3Et2uGrvBQfxZTyMFx2EKI222fn712aeLE_qYIPjUsjUvYhbypFRz3d0MlOBmituSZ3TmC9PcunzbpTCjtoT-JxTFhcmTOqFR8Uku8bJJoepvyrLFzmzcbkY_JbgXjD1kcYbxqqx1nTRsS57cufAtn_3nXAp4psQH7ay-76_MUO3TfFz1ooka6clHD8koKU-GQGke5zpZhrfR1ZBMRfJfZqgtVyaXXaW-AiQtg9Q%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5051045ed4045e6ba769c9e7e3ae938&_e=i864Q-eZIkWm4Me6lYnogBoGdhEgH0EoMTQBQP0fZMwZtd3Et2uGrvBQfxZTyMFx2EKI222fn712aeLE_qYIPjUsjUvYhbypFRz3d0MlOBmituSZ3TmC9PcunzbpTCjtVD8EqJvl8EhLQMxLbSRLsyrAnU-29qjZvN1ErxYq8HdjdQ7YMkyBLWDeplO1plKRMvv4Kb5i0G-dukMMJ73hu7bqKo-FHUmGC-Fg2bDZrIeyeCjvnuXzLVZFrZASYVvRi3QX5H3HOTSM5vXijq0OHg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. Flipping this seat blue will not be easy. We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us and we can't afford to be outraised. = | = Thanks, Team Nguyen | | | = | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Team Casey

**Knock, knock, knock.**

_It’s the scariest sound you’ll hear when you live in a communist country._

_It’s the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away._

_It’s the sound of always living in fear, and it’s my family’s real-life story._

We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth.

**America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back.**

I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, and Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world.

I love this country - but right now, it’s taken a dark turn.

Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden’s Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election.

_And he’s doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets._

We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it.

I’ve been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go.

**It’s time to save America while we still have a chance.**

**I’m Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I’m running for the United States Senate.**

**[If you’re all-in to defend the greatest country on Earth, join our team today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=578570e1ee114c99a562ffa0146fa07b&_e=qjKfGIYSgZIuW4Jy90ezedAYhsdML68g0GHnchKOMC-HZkxVMxfM2KY8unrTeW8e_93pEbVdItagf_VYY-SUdXb8HUfdLWpzXG-aZOREQkq9U79-Aw2u2Y0ee316InNB6Fsh5qfe4ceMjx_V16_UwQb5ckzCUVQLt76VeyPIJocyKyMjR59edsOGfpBQ1x7rSqb5RW-vocHVvyzjJoD_dvuflUvZfyWtxh1q8fNZgW5g06vuXX4NfwdO9AI_X71qplfeWtdbIRfcFC1C_2sahu_-JjrSUiA9attC8aoMYdJS4QMOz2YmaMpNQux3kzK9uDmLCjXR_GXAsa0cJ_1QDX_P2SKdjcEbjIteZWZKEuUsGBu-HGB3le0LQgj9Jns9)**

I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Fellow Patriot.

And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it.

We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom made suits.

If we’re going to preserve our freedoms, we can’t be intimidated. We must be fearless.

**[It’s time to fight for the American greatness that lies within us. subject: Knock knock knock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth.| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=010e6a37f62a4c468d209c33117db6a1&_t=Vgv6ScqsWPtVbWUpnGdqkd-gTcW3D_aJzdz9QWpcegacvsUHOQUKbUvtTzD-pFckvS-yWRkQaxtwTF-Hx15Zrv-qJQSIDWM14QYNhvtn_68%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=010e6a37f62a4c468d209c33117db6a1&_t=Vgv6ScqsWPtVbWUpnGdqkd-gTcW3D_aJzdz9QWpcegacvsUHOQUKbUvtTzD-pFckvS-yWRkQaxtwTF-Hx15Zrv-qJQSIDWM14QYNhvtn_68%3D)

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=010e6a37f62a4c468d209c33117db6a1&_e=98seRRCkAa5_753oC-Ni6uNYa8OHzgzTSCqXbleGh1CWqw9eub6zP3SOSqQ107ZeYVieOMC47N4UMyzOoQ_WTupL_BVHAkWrrnPNiszE2G87EIw67Te9CokWeX8QhTY_sul2Fc9w0dt-e-XmiaRRHxRm7pZ5eWn9ItTFpeuY5PUQOTYQiorbSTyjWgYujFgeJvgLQFTbF-QY0ZJ8EBACO_XfXeoUchcJBOGprOysaG2e_xwWh3nKQ1-7rzL1Ya38nkwVhjNgoRf-zEuNDza7ap1uRqjBaGRWC3o7_iKVPqjyU_eqtyzXzT9IdoPxNKwQbvsuZhX1fjKvorE9zvYXPEFp0TF6mA4hxCK0N8gHyjOyIeWqj-Nkwr9mvd4LBr0f)

**Knock, knock, knock.**

_It’s the scariest sound you’ll hear when you live in a communist country._

_It’s the last sound my parents heard when their fathers were taken away._

_It’s the sound of always living in fear, and it’s my family’s real-life story._

We escaped from Vietnam just days before Saigon fell to the communists, and we were given a new life in the most generous country on Earth.

**America saved my life, and I dedicated my life to paying her back.**

I graduated from the United States Naval Academy and served for 25 years in Navy Special Operations in Iraq, Afghanistan, Somalia, and Pakistan and 40 other countries around the world.

I love this country - but right now, it’s taken a dark turn.

Now, the knocks are coming from Joe Biden’s Department of Justice. Sending two dozen armed agents to arrest a pro-life activist in front of his family. Raiding gun shops and seizing records from law-abiding gun owners. Arresting his challenger in the next election.

_And he’s doing it all while real criminals are free to roam our streets._

We are losing our country. You know it. But you also know we can save it.

I’ve been all over the world. Believe me when I tell you, if America fails, there is nowhere else to go.

**It’s time to save America while we still have a chance.**

**I’m Hung Cao, retired Navy Captain, and I’m running for the United States Senate.**

**[If you’re all-in to defend the greatest country on Earth, join our team today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=010e6a37f62a4c468d209c33117db6a1&_e=98seRRCkAa5_753oC-Ni6uNYa8OHzgzTSCqXbleGh1CWqw9eub6zP3SOSqQ107ZeYVieOMC47N4UMyzOoQ_WTupL_BVHAkWrrnPNiszE2G87EIw67Te9CokWeX8QhTY_sul2Fc9w0dt-e-XmiaRRHxRm7pZ5eWn9ItTFpeuY5PUQOTYQiorbSTyjWgYujFgeJvgLQFTbF-QY0ZJ8EBACO_XfXeoUchcJBOGprOysaG2ynzj1DReExHghvs9mtFmjtc3xDO_lwvesztB5dhqGUr8EPFUJmBpwkBIYgE5UlMcacSed5gsFO9E5I2I1ZQ1qkDvgqOAJZAVlNo6_xsY3RoqJhkKJurhluYAechdHWZuLyMZw9zB7cWeRTM8V2ZqC)**
---
[**JOIN THE TEAM - STAND WITH ME TODAY**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=010e6a37f62a4c468d209c33117db6a1&_e=98seRRCkAa5_753oC-Ni6uNYa8OHzgzTSCqXbleGh1CWqw9eub6zP3SOSqQ107ZeYVieOMC47N4UMyzOoQ_WTupL_BVHAkWrrnPNiszE2G87EIw67Te9CokWeX8QhTY_sul2Fc9w0dt-e-XmiaRRHxRm7pZ5eWn9ItTFpeuY5PUQOTYQiorbSTyjWgYujFgeJvgLQFTbF-QY0ZJ8EBACO_XfXeoUchcJBOGprOysaG18uubXoALrtGcReEeUiTSGYwEnObsXhX64PAXtC04a15VIKefJDzEKLVlprwEDX_-bM9BnJl__N6pyAil0FcDIhbvL-rQBrhM-xYgCHiPy0CHvGXXnUbAO3VR8-vcCg6Wvcm0igPZIYuW9ykpedNht)

I still believe America can be the land of opportunity, Fellow Patriot.

And as someone who owes their life to the American Dream, I have an obligation to fight back against those who have trampled on it.

We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom made suits.

If we’re going to preserve our freedoms, we can’t be intimidated. We must be fearless.

**[It’s time to fight for the American greatness that lies within us. Join our team today - because I know you haven’t given up on America yet either.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=010e6a37f62a4c468d209c33117db6a1&_e=98seRRCkAa5_753oC-Ni6uNYa8OHzgzTSCqXbleGh1CWqw9eub6zP3SOSqQ107ZeYVieOMC47N4UMyzOoQ_WTupL_BVHAkWrrnPNiszE2G87EIw67Te9CokWeX8QhTY_sul2Fc9w0dt-e-XmiaRRHxRm7pZ5eWn9ItTFpeuY5PUQOTYQiorbSTyjWgYujFgeJvgLQFTbF-QY0ZJ8EBACO_XfXeoUchcJBOGprOysaG3afjrYYF0_S1vr1C2kxeesu-lKBrr38MzrB6Nn4ymVJlVUMUBhtnpkxRLY8uPASpEWPgKSWMqCyQJgHXRYSamfahw-2fDpLFyHGuZibq5JMSblMfzDDhEiCveWK-VAyFEPnADSF8b8GQg7zTjSt1MX)**
