name: CRITICAL ELECTION UPDATE
subject: Everything is about to change, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaRose for Senate
body:
CRITICAL update for you, Friend >> Today, Frank LaRose officially announced his candidacy for this MUST-WIN Senate seat. Will you join the team today & help send this Army Green Beret to the Senate?

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Frank LaRose.

You may have heard of me. But if not, let me tell you a little more:

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0ea75c7ada244a28854989f1a58ac71b&_e=LVoeaCRn02xumMOUEp2z53zvUbbiFjHwApVCTy0xaZbYdSUKTM3bfN7uOyCFPaYi6-nUjuHJM3UbFucI1wEfRPjZ0HMz97fjNDVPU9PU9ADqES4iMcfhR4nZ2ww-mHF-BGSLbV0ovx9z_x88tf8huG9aPnLfHB4xElISEHHvuSe35MxupHcyyS0IK8c7cWWO1nD_Ax39lMQWB5w-sIsr3oBtu-SLDPgRTb51nSuRfLI6bqKDbBI2G4sEEyK5svdYrv6ffify4cbi3rSwV4tUmHAK64frk6SM6GezWvUuQFRPVk6_QlncUVaorX0D85DsPj4kbJzDNgdPZCwqU0uPemCUuxppHESXJye4Kul46UGFJDMdSW3wF5jwQ1Q6GS5zq4U-wuyJ2oShhFSlmcfM2LUTXQ0O6L80LdQBossHpKdGfuvkv5UXEtEQPl2x7jYliW4u9-40Q1gh-vX76SQ6pg%3D%3D)
---

I grew up working on a small, family-owned farm in Northeast Ohio.

After high school, I decided to serve my country by joining the Army. At the age of 20, I became the youngest ever Sergeant in the 101st Airborne. I completed Special Forces training & was eventually awarded the Green Beret.

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0ea75c7ada244a28854989f1a58ac71b&_e=LVoeaCRn02xumMOUEp2z53zvUbbiFjHwApVCTy0xaZbYdSUKTM3bfN7uOyCFPaYi6-nUjuHJM3UbFucI1wEfRPjZ0HMz97fjNDVPU9PU9ADqES4iMcfhR4nZ2ww-mHF-BGSLbV0ovx9z_x88tf8huG9aPnLfHB4xElISEHHvuSe35MxupHcyyS0IK8c7cWWO1nD_Ax39lMQWB5w-sIsr3oBtu-SLDPgRTb51nSuRfLI6bqKDbBI2G4sEEyK5svdYrv6ffify4cbi3rSwV4tUmHAK64frk6SM6GezWvUuQFRPVk6_QlncUVaorX0D85DsoppTjLWLh04KSih-_-S43qsuXgY8YVNYiidKKlN2o3oEy3pYZnCuQVAZRhbFwDzsRjUL61p-dK0sJngYratGKjLTKhMaPBi6O9CeLWzU3y9btk2jgM9OP5jTPpbFHe7g7JDlHb3Hs68C0eg5LjPR6Q%3D%3D)
---

During my decade in uniform around the globe in places like Iraq & Kosovo, I saw first-hand the horrific lengths that corrupt regimes would go to in order to hold onto power.

When I finished my deployment, I promised myself that I'd never allow our country to sink to that level of corruption.

_**So when I see the DC "elite" use the overwhelming power of the state to silence conservatives & imprison their political opponents, it makes me sick to my stomach.**_

**That 's why today I'm announcing my candidacy for the most important Senate race in the country.**

I'm not a career politician or DC swamp creature. I'm a husband, father, Christian, & strong conservative who's tired of the lies & corruption.

I'm reaching out because I'm running against a Far-Left Liberal Senator who votes with Biden 98% of the time & has Hollywood donors lining his pockets with millions to crush me - he raised $3.4 million in the last three months alone!

So if we're going to take back our country, it's going to be because of the support from Patriots like you.

**[I'm humbly asking, Friend, will you chip in just $9 today to help this Green Beret & strong conservative win?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0ea75c7ada244a28854989f1a58ac71b&_e=LVoeaCRn02xumMOUEp2z53zvUbbiFjHwApVCTy0xaZbYdSUKTM3bfN7uOyCFPaYi6-nUjuHJM3UbFucI1wEfRPjZ0HMz97fjNDVPU9PU9ADqES4iMcfhR4nZ2ww-mHF-BGSLbV0ovx9z_x88tf8huG9aPnLfHB4xElISEHHvuSe35MxupHcyyS0IK8c7cWWO1nD_Ax39lMQWB5w-sIsr3oBtu-SLDPgRTb51nSuRfLI6bqKDbBI2G4sEEyK5svdYrv6ffify4cbi3rSwV4tUmHAK64frk6SM6GezWvUuQFStWXoSJXkrxcou7Z6-YX35rPK7sw4ufqR8ZWFKd9KSLbdnw_4TO_M6WePe7NAajR1ArwbCJCtUXFQMrmMsjp1Hl5q87qfAoAEJ5gNMclp77Fb-Vl68CG-0qQ1rGHmsNrz1q9UUq2ZWzLCcyroy-v7ID999ShzQME6eqBZZvH4JRwBiPdsASUB_axJC_qACIN0%3D "I’m humbly asking, Friend, will you chip in just $9 today to help this Green Beret & strong conservative win?")**

---
| | [CHIP IN TODAY](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0ea75c7ada244a28854989f1a58ac71b&_e=LVoeaCRn02xumMOUEp2z53zvUbbiFjHwApVCTy0xaZbYdSUKTM3bfN7uOyCFPaYi6-nUjuHJM3UbFucI1wEfRPjZ0HMz97fjNDVPU9PU9ADqES4iMcfhR4nZ2ww-mHF-BGSLbV0ovx9z_x88tf8huG9aPnLfHB4xElISEHHvuSe35MxupHcyyS0IK8c7cWWO1nD_Ax39lMQWB5w-sIsr3oBtu-SLDPgRTb51nSuRfLI6bqKDbBI2G4sEEyK5svdYrv6ffify4cbi3rSwV4tUmHAK64frk6SM6GezWvUuQFRPVk6_QlncUVaorX0D85DsosvbN5ndSEeDdYYoMinvYFTw76NDAy1Ei1TLWxCI8Q88ajseowOvTGI50toNkyP5_dvHT04n3RehxeE-GZh71ZrxdX0NkHSVKhmziuyRtiBKUFboApi9zCHSwLTC25xqfA8s3wTPjw339NTqbNENLw%3D%3D)
---

We can't take back our country without you.

Please, help me start my campaign strong & I promise I will make you proud.

Yours in service,

clean_body: CRITICAL update for you, Friend >> Today, Frank LaRose officially announced his candidacy for this MUST-WIN Senate seat. Will you join the team today & help send this Army Green Beret to the Senate? | | | | | Friend, this is Frank LaRose. You may have heard of me. But if not, let me tell you a little more: | I grew up working on a small, family-owned farm in Northeast Ohio. After high school, I decided to serve my country by joining the Army. At the age of 20, I became the youngest ever Sergeant in the 101st Airborne. I completed Special Forces training & was eventually awarded the Green Beret. | During my decade in uniform around the globe in places like Iraq & Kosovo, I saw first-hand the horrific lengths that corrupt regimes would go to in order to hold onto power. When I finished my deployment, I promised myself that I'd never allow our country to sink to that level of corruption. So when I see the DC "elite" use the overwhelming power of the state to silence conservatives & imprison their political opponents, it makes me sick to my stomach. That 's why today I'm announcing my candidacy for the most important Senate race in the country. I'm not a career politician or DC swamp creature. I'm a husband, father, Christian, & strong conservative who's tired of the lies & corruption. I'm reaching out because I'm running against a Far-Left Liberal Senator who votes with Biden 98% of the time & has Hollywood donors lining his pockets with millions to crush me - he raised $3.4 million in the last three months alone! So if we're going to take back our country, it's going to be because of the support from Patriots like you. "I’m humbly asking, Friend, will you chip in just $9 today to help this Green Beret & strong conservative win?" | | We can't take back our country without you. Please, help me start my campaign strong & I promise I will make you proud. Yours in service, Frank LaRose | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend >> BEFORE YOU GO! "Can you chip in a monthly recurring $5 donation and become a founding member of Frank’s campaign?" If we're going to take back the Senate from extreme liberal politicians like Sherrod Brown, it starts with WINNING THIS RACE. But in order to do that, we need a HUGE coalition of grassroots patriots like YOU to step up. Sherrod Brown has already raised over $8 MILLION in 2023, and we need to catch up FAST. So please, please, please: Can we count on you to step up today? | | | LaRose is a member of the U.S. Army Reserve. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by LaRose for Senate 228 S Washington St Ste 115 Alexandria, VA 22314 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Barbara Boxer
subject: Infuriating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49813?t=6&akid=9277%2E878179%2E2yYSh5) Friend, this is infuriating.

We watched Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies try to censure and sue a sitting Democrat for daring to hold Donald Trump accountable.

If that's not enough, extremists like Lauren Boebert are now pushing Congress to _impeach_ President Joe Biden.

Let’s be clear: these folks aren't interested in governing. What they are interested in is weakening our President. What they are interested in is attacking women's rights, banning books, and making it harder for working families to get by in this country.

**That’s why I'm fighting so hard to take back our majority, and an important step you can take to join me is making sure Will Rollins has the funds he needs to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st District.**

Flipping _five House seats_ in the coming election puts Democrats back in control. Will is running in a "must-win" district that almost went blue in 2022.

[**Before Will's next fundraising deadline, split a donation of $10, or whatever you can afford, between the Voter Protection Project and Will’s campaign to stop Republicans from destroying everything we've worked so hard to build.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49813?t=7&akid=9277%2E878179%2E2yYSh5)

I’m proud of what Democrats have accomplished:

– The creation of more jobs in two years than any other president in history
– Created 13 million jobs in President Biden's first term.
– Enacted the Child Tax Credit which cut child poverty in half.
– Made life-saving vaccines available to every American.
– And much more...

We've made incredible progress, but Republicans in the House will stop at nothing to put a halt to our work. I refuse to stand for it and you shouldn't either.

[**That's why I need you to split a contribution of $10 between the Voter Protection Project and Will's campaign before his next deadline hits. We can’t afford to fall short -- not with so much at stake.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49813?t=8&akid=9277%2E878179%2E2yYSh5) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49814?t=9&akid=9277%2E878179%2E2yYSh5)

Thanks,

Barbara Boxer

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9277%2E878179%2E2yYSh5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9277%2E878179%2E2yYSh5).**

---
Peter, I proudly stand with the members of SAG-AFTRA and WGA as they strike against Hollywood here in California.

[**If you agree that ALL Americans deserve fair wages, benefits, and working conditions, will you sign my petition in support of striking workers? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66791450/417604547/82593943?refcode=MTFC_20230720_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWY5ZDg5MS01MjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRq3qfBQEIPsfxKdldop4q2gsVsbLSZQpof3-e__Le0=&emci=591bda82-3527-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=81f9d891-5227-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=18839602) | [JOIN THE MOVEMENT: SIGN ON TO SUPPORT OUR NEIGHBORS IN LA DEMANDING FAIR WORKING CONDITIONS! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66791451/417604548/82593943?refcode=MTFC_20230720_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWY5ZDg5MS01MjI3LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRq3qfBQEIPsfxKdldop4q2gsVsbLSZQpof3-e__Le0=&emci=591bda82-3527-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&emdi=81f9d891-5227-ee11-a9bb-00224832e1ba&ceid=18839602)
---
Peter, these folks deserve our support. Some people think Hollywood workers are all rich and famous. _Nothing could be further than the truth._

**The thousands of folks who are currently picketing in the heat are everyday Americans.** They are journalists, background actors, and stunt performers – _often middle class and struggling to pay the bills in a gig industry._

Democrats will pour every dollar they can into this race to try and buy North Carolina, but we can’t give up. They outraised us last quarter, but we must come back stronger.

Would you take a moment to read Mark’s email below and consider chipping in any amount today?

Thanks for your support,

Jonathan

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

clean_body: | Peter - my name is Jonathan and I currently serve as the campaign manager for Mark Walker. He sent you the below message earlier this week and I want to ensure you saw it because it is instrumental to the success of our campaign. I’ve been in countless meetings with our finance and fundraising teams and one thing is clear: we can’t afford to fall behind. Democrats will pour every dollar they can into this race to try and buy North Carolina, but we can’t give up. They outraised us last quarter, but we must come back stronger. Would you take a moment to read Mark’s email below and consider chipping in any amount today? Thanks for your support, Jonathan Campaign Manager Mark Walker for Governor \---BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE--- From: Mark Walker Date: Tuesday, July 18, 2023 at 10:20 AM To: Subject: Can’t get ahead of ourselves Peter – my name is Jonathan and I currently serve as the campaign manager for Mark Walker. He sent you the below message earlier this week and I want to ensure you saw it because it is instrumental to the success of our campaign. I’ve been in countless meetings with our finance and fundraising teams and one thing is clear: we can’t afford to fall behind. | | Peter, As you know, Team Walker was so blessed to announce last week that we EXCEEDED our fundraising goal of $500,000 for the quarter. While this is a massive win for the campaign, we can’t get too far ahead of ourselves. My Democratic opponent taunted a massive fundraising haul of millions so far this year. The money he raised will go directly towards smearing my name, rolling out attack ads on me, and trying to BUY this election. He may have outraised us this time, With a race as competitive as the North Carolina governor’s race, we can’t leave anything up to chance. Gratefully, Mark Walker | Meet Mark Walker Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan. In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action: ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

That’s why we need your help. | | | | | Our records show you haven’t donated this month. | | JULY SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: REPRESENTING: local Democrats DONOR STATUS: PENDING YOUR SUGGESTED GIFT:$7 With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single existing majority. But we can’t stop now. We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections over the next several months, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to help elect state Democrats now. By chipping in today, you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. With your investment in our movement, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extreme agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in? name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Full transparency about our financial situation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Over the last few months, we’ve sent emails being transparent about how
our fundraising has been in decline for more than a year. And we keep
sending these emails because the situation is dire.

Last week, we had to lay off nine of our twenty members of staff.

Justice Democrats is at a crossroads as an organization. What we raise in
the coming weeks and months will set the trajectory of how we show up and
what we can accomplish this cycle and beyond.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136079?refcode=em20230720-29991&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29991%2E1203867%2E7KkUIG ]Will you make your
first donation of $3 right now to ensure we
can sustain our organization and have the resources to continue to recruit
and elect change-making progressives like AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal
Bowman?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136079?refcode=em20230720-29991&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29991%2E1203867%2E7KkUIG ]Donate $3

I want to be clear as Executive Director that I made the most responsible
decision that honors our work, the staff, and stakeholders like you. Our
work and the mission this organization set out with is so much bigger than
any one person, and our decision-making is rooted in what is best for our
strategy and mission.

I, and our entire team, don’t want to exist as an organization just to
exist.

There are plenty of progressive groups doing great work. But we want to
keep going because we believe our work is uniquely important in the
progressive ecosystem with our laser focus on primaries and holding
federal democratic leadership accountable when they don’t deliver.

Justice Democrats was started by just a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers
and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for
president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions
of people for the first time — myself included.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing
more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly
endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a
fraction of what they can raise.

Our work is only possible because of our grassroots supporters. I truly
mean that.

Thank you so much for being a part of our movement to challenge the entire
political establishment and elect more progressive changemakers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136079?refcode=em20230720-29991&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=29991%2E1203867%2E7KkUIG ]→ Will you now dig deep and make your first contribution of
$3 right now to support our critical work?

Thank you.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=29991%2E1203867%2E7KkUIG ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=29991%2E1203867%2E7KkUIG ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230720-29991-footer&t=1025&refcode2=29991_1203867_7KkUIG&akid=29991%2E1203867%2E7KkUIG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=29991%2E1203867%2E7KkUIG

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| | Friend,

---
When I took the podium at Mar-a-Lago last November and announced my candidacy for president, alarm bells went off in the minds of every Deep State thug, Swamp crook, and left-wing radical in Washington.

---
You see, I could have walked away from it all...

---
I could have chosen not to run, enjoyed time with my incredible family, the sunshine at Mar-a-Lago, and golfed, and never once had to think about these sick and twisted tyrants ever again.

---
_But Friend, walking away would have meant condemning our Free Republic and YOU to a lifetime of tyranny._

---
And that is why I will ALWAYS stand right where I belong – between _**YOU**_ and them.

---
I knew that by running for president once more to FIRE the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House, every last arrow in the Left’s arsenal would be shot my way.

---
Crooked Joe and the Democrats believe that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts and attempting to **JAIL me for _LIFE_** that I’ll eventually throw up my hands and cave.

---
You would think you were watching an 80’s gangster movie, but the sad reality is that in America in 2023, Biden’s Department of _Injustice_ and the radicals running our country truly are gangsters.

---
This is quite literally a SHAKEDOWN the likes of which our country has never seen.

---
But even now, _even after being told that I’m likely staring down yet**ANOTHER INDICTMENT** despite being a completely innocent man_, I do not regret my decision to fight for this country — and YOU — for even a second.

---
**Nothing, and I mean NOTHING, will _EVER_ get me to shut down this campaign!**

---
**Because I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny.**

---
_And with freedom in America hanging on by a mere thread, I know that YOU will never surrender either._

---

clean_body: This is an attempted shakedown, plain and simple.| | | | | Friend, When I took the podium at Mar-a-Lago last November and announced my candidacy for president, alarm bells went off in the minds of every Deep State thug, Swamp crook, and left-wing radical in Washington. You see, I could have walked away from it all... I could have chosen not to run, enjoyed time with my incredible family, the sunshine at Mar-a-Lago, and golfed, and never once had to think about these sick and twisted tyrants ever again. But Friend, walking away would have meant condemning our Free Republic and YOU to a lifetime of tyranny. And that is why I will ALWAYS stand right where I belong – between YOU and them. I knew that by running for president once more to FIRE the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House, every last arrow in the Left’s arsenal would be shot my way. Crooked Joe and the Democrats believe that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts and attempting to JAIL me for LIFE that I’ll eventually throw up my hands and cave. You would think you were watching an 80’s gangster movie, but the sad reality is that in America in 2023, Biden’s Department of Injustice and the radicals running our country truly are gangsters. This is quite literally a SHAKEDOWN the likes of which our country has never seen. But even now, even after being told that I’m likely staring down yetANOTHER INDICTMENT despite being a completely innocent man, I do not regret my decision to fight for this country — and YOU — for even a second. Nothing, and I mean NOTHING, will EVER get me to shut down this campaign! Because I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny. And with freedom in America hanging on by a mere thread, I know that YOU will never surrender either. | | Thank you, Donald J.
